title: North Pacific meltwater weakens the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation and preconditions Heinrich Stadial 1
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Heinrich Stadials provide insights into a potential future weakening of the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC), yet the mechanisms driving AMOC weakening during these intervals remain elusive. While Heinrich Stadials are associated with iceberg-discharge events over the North Atlantic (i.e., Heinrich events), AMOC weakening is known to precede Heinrich events. Here we run freshwater hosing experiments to show that contemporaneous Northeast Pacific iceberg-discharge events (i.e., Siku events), which consistently occur at the onsets of Heinrich Stadials, could trigger AMOC weakening by transporting freshwater to the North Atlantic deepwater formation regions. This initial weakening may subsequently be amplified by further meltwater release from the British and Laurentide Ice Sheets, induced by stepwise subsurface warming in the northeastern and northern North Atlantic. Our findings suggest that Siku events may have played a critical role in preconditioning the North Atlantic for Heinrich events, underscoring the interconnected nature of the global ocean–cryosphere system.
title_zh: 北太平洋融水削弱了大西洋经向翻转环流并为 Heinrich Stadial 1 奠定了先决条件
abstract_zh: Heinrich Stadials 提供了有关大西洋经向翻转环流 (AMOC) 未来可能减弱的见解，但在这些时间间隔内驱动 AMOC 减弱的机制仍然难以捉摸。虽然海因里希·斯塔迪亚尔斯与北大西洋的冰山放电事件（即海因里希事件）有关，但已知 AMOC 减弱先于海因里希事件。在这里，我们进行了淡水冲洗实验，以表明同期东北太平洋冰山排放事件（即 Siku 事件）持续发生在 Heinrich Stadials 爆发时，可能会通过将淡水输送到北大西洋深水形成区域来引发 AMOC 减弱。这种最初的减弱随后可能会因北大西洋东北部和北部的地下逐步变暖而引起的英国和劳伦太德冰原的进一步融水释放而放大。我们的研究结果表明，Siku 事件可能在北大西洋海因里希事件的预处理中发挥了关键作用，强调了全球海洋-冰冻圈系统相互关联的性质。

title: Morphogenetic mechanical metamaterials: Emerging tensor properties from self-organized structures
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Understanding how living organisms spontaneously develop complex functional structures motivates new strategies in engineering design. Here, we introduce a decentralized generative model based on morphogenesis to autonomously grow mechanical structures with controlled tensorial properties. By adapting Turing’s reaction-diffusion concept through anisotropic diffusion, our approach enables the local emergence of microstructures exhibiting tailored stiffness and anisotropy, achieving target orthotropic tensors without adjoint or topology optimization loops. The synthesis of these structures relies on a database linking morphogenetic parameters to effective elastic tensors obtained through homogenization techniques. We experimentally demonstrate this concept through a mechanical cloaking example, validating our method’s capability to independently control local anisotropy and rigidity, and effectively conceal structural defects from mechanical fields. This approach circumvents the iterative global solves required by topology optimization, while preserving local control over anisotropy and stiffness across large design domains.
title_zh: 形态发生机械超材料：自组织结构中出现的张量特性
abstract_zh: 了解生物体如何自发地形成复杂的功能结构激发了工程设计的新策略。在这里，我们引入了一种基于形态发生的分散生成模型，可以自主生长具有受控张量属性的机械结构。通过各向异性扩散采用图灵的反应扩散概念，我们的方法能够局部出现表现出定制刚度和各向异性的微结构，无需伴随或拓扑优化循环即可实现目标正交各向异性张量。这些结构的合成依赖于将形态发生参数与通过均质化技术获得的有效弹性张量联系起来的数据库。我们通过机械隐身示例实验证明了这一概念，验证了我们的方法独立控制局部各向异性和刚度的能力，并有效隐藏机械场中的结构缺陷。这种方法规避了拓扑优化所需的迭代全局求解，同时保留了对跨大型设计域的各向异性和刚度的局部控制。

title: Sub-parts-per-billion CO2 Detection based on Dissipative Whispering Gallery Mode Microcavity Sensor
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Whispering gallery mode microcavities provide strong light–matter interactions owing to their ultrahigh optical confinement, but the small gas refractive index change limits their ability to sense trace gases. Here we show that gas absorption can be detected using a dissipative sensing mechanism in a non-functionalized whispering gallery mode microcavity. Instead of tracking resonance frequency shifts used in conventional dispersive sensing, our method converts optical absorption into variations in resonance depth through thermally induced dissipation. Quantitative carbon dioxide detection was achieved over a concentration range of 1.5 to 400 parts per million with a correlation coefficients exceeding 0.99. The sensor reached a detection limit of 168 parts per trillion at an integration time of 400 seconds and an accuracy of approximately 0.4%. Continuous monitoring further demonstrated stable operation under ambient conditions. These results establish dissipative microcavity sensing as a promising approach for compact, low-cost, and highly sensitive trace gas detection.
title_zh: 基于耗散回音壁模式微腔传感器的亚十亿分之一二氧化碳检测
abstract_zh: 由于其超高的光学限制，回音壁模式微腔提供了强烈的光-物质相互作用，但微小的气体折射率变化限制了它们感测痕量气体的能力。在这里，我们展示了可以在非功能化回音壁模式微腔中使用耗散传感机制来检测气体吸收。我们的方法不是跟踪传统色散传感中使用的谐振频移，而是通过热诱导耗散将光学吸收转换为谐振深度的变化。在百万分之1.5至400的浓度范围内实现了二氧化碳的定量检测，相关系数超过0.99。该传感器在 400 秒的积分时间内达到了万亿分之 168 的检测极限，精度约为 0.4%。连续监测进一步证明了在环境条件下的稳定运行。这些结果表明耗散微腔传感是一种有前途的紧凑、低成本和高灵敏度痕量气体检测方法。

title: Specificity and exon target space of splicing modifying compounds
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Modulation of splicing is an established therapeutic strategy with clinical applications and potential to target specific exons to influence gene expression. Small-molecule splicing modifiers such as Risdiplam and Branaplam induce inclusion of exons typically skipped due to weak {5}^{{\prime} } splice sites. Risdiplam preferentially induces exons with an N−3G−2A−1 sequence at the {3}^{{\prime} } exon end, whereas Branaplam favors A−3G−2A−1-ending exons. However, determinants of specificity remain unclear, as many motif-matching exons are not induced. Here, we investigate the molecular basis of splicing-modulator specificity. Using biochemical assays, transcriptome analyses, and genetic perturbations, we identify sequence-dependent features that determine exon responsiveness to splicing-modulator induction. We further demonstrate that specificity can be reprogrammed through manipulation of U1 snRNA. These findings refine the determinants of splicing-modulator target space and may support identification of additional target exons and compounds.
title_zh: 剪接修饰化合物的特异性和外显子靶空间
abstract_zh: 剪接调节是一种既定的治疗策略，具有临床应用和靶向特定外显子以影响基因表达的潜力。小分子剪接修饰剂（例如 Risdiplam 和 Branaplam）会诱导包含通常由于较弱的 {5}^{{\prime} } 剪接位点而被跳过的外显子。 Risdiplam 优先在 {3}^{{\prime} } 外显子末端诱导具有 N−3G−2A−1 序列的外显子，而 Branaplam 则倾向于 A−3G−2A−1 结尾的外显子。然而，特异性的决定因素仍不清楚，因为许多基序匹配的外显子未被诱导。在这里，我们研究了剪接调节剂特异性的分子基础。使用生化测定、转录组分析和遗传扰动，我们确定了决定外显子对剪接调节剂诱导的反应性的序列依赖性特征。我们进一步证明，可以通过操纵 U1 snRNA 来重新编程特异性。这些发现完善了剪接调节剂靶空间的决定因素，并可能支持其他靶外显子和化合物的鉴定。

title: The BZR1-BLH1-PIF4 feedback module acts as a molecular amplifier for precise thermomorphogenesis in Arabidopsis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Global increases in the intensity and frequency of elevated temperatures is threatening ecosystem stability and crop yield. Understanding plant thermomorphogenesis is critical for developing climate-resilient crops, yet the underlying mechanisms remain to be clarified. Here, we identify the BEL1-LIKE HOMEODOMAIN transcription factor BLH1 as a critical negative regulator of thermomorphogenesis that modulates the key BRASSINAZOLE-RESISTANT 1 (BZR1)-PHYTOCHROME INTERACTING FACTOR 4 (PIF4) thermomorphogenic regulatory module. Overexpression of BLH1 or its homologs confers high-temperature (HT) insensitivity, whereas blh higher-order mutants exhibit HT hypersensitivity. BLH1 expression is directly repressed by BZR1 and is down-regulated by HT. We further demonstrate that BLH1 directly binds to the PIF4 promoter to repress its transcription and concurrently interacts with the PIF4 protein to inhibit its activity. Overexpression of BLH1 rescues the elongated hypocotyl phenotype in bzr1-1D or PIF4 overexpression plants. Our findings define a BZR1-BLH1-PIF4 regulatory axis that modulates the BZR1-PIF4-auxin-BR-BZR1 positive feedback loop, ensuring a balanced thermomorphogenic response to HT.
title_zh: BZR1-BLH1-PIF4 反馈模块充当拟南芥中精确热形态发生的分子放大器
abstract_zh: 全球气温升高的强度和频率的增加正在威胁生态系统的稳定性和作物产量。了解植物热形态发生对于开发气候适应型作物至关重要，但其潜在机制仍有待阐明。在这里，我们将 BEL1-LIKE HOMEODOMAIN 转录因子 BLH1 确定为热形态发生的关键负调节因子，调节关键的BRASSINAZOLE-RESISTANT 1 (BZR1)-PHYTOCHROME INTERACTING FACTOR 4 (PIF4)热形态发生调节模块。 BLH1 或其同源物的过度表达会导致高温 (HT) 不敏感，而 blh 高阶突变体则表现出 HT 超敏性。 BLH1 表达受 BZR1 直接抑制，并受 HT 下调。我们进一步证明BLH1直接结合PIF4启动子以抑制其转录，同时与PIF4蛋白相互作用以抑制其活性。 BLH1 的过表达可挽救 bzr1-1D 或 PIF4 过表达植物中伸长的下胚轴表型。我们的研究结果定义了 BZR1-BLH1-PIF4 调节轴，该轴调节 BZR1-PIF4-生长素-BR-BZR1 正反馈环，确保对 HT 的平衡热形态发生反应。

title: CSF1R regulates monocyte subset differentiation and intracellular metabolism
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Monocytes are key circulating effectors of vascular homeostasis, innate immunity and inflammation. Following their generation in mouse bone marrow, classical (Ly6Chigh) monocytes are mobilized into the blood circulation where they mature into non-classical (Ly6Clow) patrolling monocytes or are recruited into peripheral tissues where they differentiate into tissue resident or inflammatory macrophages. Monocytes and macrophages express CSF1R (CD115), the receptor for lineage-specific growth factors CSF1 and IL-34. Here, we report that acute CSF1R blockade or genetic deletion negatively interferes with monocyte intracellular metabolism and reduces blood Ly6Clow monocytes in part by blunting differentiation of Ly6Chigh monocytes. Based upon lineage-specific deletion of Glutamine-Fructose-6-Phosphate Transaminase 1 (GFPT1), the hexosamine biosynthetic pathway (HBP) is identified as an important regulator of CSF1R expression and monocyte subsets. Inhibition of receptor tyrosine kinases CSF1R and FLT3 rewires and partially impairs metabolic activity in human monocytes. Our findings provide insights into the link between CSF1R signaling, metabolic regulation, and monocyte survival and differentiation.
title_zh: CSF1R 调节单核细胞亚群分化和细胞内代谢
abstract_zh: 单核细胞是血管稳态、先天免疫和炎症的关键循环效应器。在小鼠骨髓中产生后，经典 (Ly6Chigh) 单核细胞被动员到血液循环中，在那里它们成熟为非经典 (Ly6Clow) 巡逻单核细胞，或者被招募到外周组织中，在那里它们分化为组织驻留或炎症巨噬细胞。单核细胞和巨噬细胞表达 CSF1R (CD115)，即谱系特异性生长因子 CSF1 和 IL-34 的受体。在这里，我们报告说，急性 CSF1R 阻断或基因缺失会负面干扰单核细胞的细胞内代谢，并部分通过削弱 Ly6Chigh 单核细胞的分化来减少血液 Ly6Clow 单核细胞。基于谷氨酰胺-果糖-6-磷酸转氨酶 1 (GFPT1) 的谱系特异性缺失，己糖胺生物合成途径 (HBP) 被确定为 CSF1R 表达和单核细胞亚群的重要调节因子。抑制受体酪氨酸激酶 CSF1R 和 FLT3 重新连接并部分损害人类单核细胞的代谢活动。我们的研究结果提供了对 CSF1R 信号传导、代谢调节以及单核细胞存活和分化之间联系的见解。

title: Cryo-EM structure of African horse sickness virus VP2 receptor-binding protein enables nanoparticle vaccine design
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: African horse sickness virus (AHSV) is a lethal equine pathogen with no licensed vaccine other than vaccines containing attenuated virus, which pose safety risks. Endemic to sub-Saharan Africa, AHSV has caused epizootics in Spain and Portugal, Cyprus, Morocco, the Middle East, India and Pakistan and, most recently, Thailand. Here, we resolve the 3.11 Å cryo-EM structure of full-length VP2 from AHSV serotype 4, adopting its native triskelion architecture and shedding light on an α-helical domain anchoring the triskelion core, which is absent in other structurally characterized orbiviruses. Structure-guided mapping identified a subdomain of VP2 as a key target of neutralizing antibodies. Displayed on nanoparticles using the SpyCatcher/SpyTag technology, the domain conferred complete protection from clinical disease after viral challenge infection in mice and elicited robust and long-lasting immune responses in horses, the target species of AHSV. These findings provide a structural blueprint for the next generation of recombinant vaccines against AHSV and related orbiviruses.
title_zh: 非洲马瘟病毒 VP2 受体结合蛋白的冷冻电镜结构使纳米颗粒疫苗设计成为可能
abstract_zh: 非洲马瘟病毒（AHSV）是一种致命的马病原体，除了含有减毒病毒的疫苗外，没有获得许可的疫苗，存在安全风险。 AHSV 是撒哈拉以南非洲地区的流行病，已在西班牙、葡萄牙、塞浦路斯、摩洛哥、中东、印度和巴基斯坦以及最近的泰国引发动物流行。在这里，我们解析了 AHSV 血清型 4 的全长 VP2 的 3.11 Å 冷冻电镜结构，采用其天然的 triskelion 结构，并揭示了锚定 triskelion 核心的 α 螺旋结构域，这在其他结构特征的环状病毒中是不存在的。结构引导映射将 VP2 的一个子结构域确定为中和抗体的关键靶点。该结构域利用 SpyCatcher/SpyTag 技术显示在纳米颗粒上，为小鼠在病毒攻击感染后提供了针对临床疾病的完全保护，并在 AHSV 的目标物种马中引发了强大而持久的免疫反应。这些发现为下一代针对 AHSV 和相关环状病毒的重组疫苗提供了结构蓝图。

title: Reprogramming macrophage immunometabolism via glutamine antagonism potentiates colorectal cancer therapy in mice
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Colorectal cancer (CRC) often exhibits a suppressive tumor microenvironment that is associated with elevated glutamine metabolism and induction of immunosuppressive macrophages. Glutamine antagonists such as 6-diazo-5-oxo-L-norleucine (DON) and its prodrug JHU-083 can limit tumor growth, but their toxicity and immune cell selectivity remain suboptimal. Here, we conjugate DON with the macrophage-targeting moiety artesunate to develop WGF-T17 (T17), which blocks glutamine metabolism in macrophages. In vitro, T17 rewires macrophage metabolism toward glycolysis, inducing lactate buildup and histone lactylation, enhancing mitochondrial fission and phagocytic activity, and thereby reprogramming macrophages to an inflammatory state. In vivo, T17 controls tumor growth better than JHU-083 via macrophage-dependent pathways, and also increases the efficacy of immunotherapy, chemotherapy and anti-angiogenic therapy in female mice carrying subcutaneous CRC tumors. Our findings thus hint T17 as a promising treatment strategy for CRC by targeting macrophage glutamine metabolism to reverse immune suppression.
title_zh: 通过谷氨酰胺拮抗作用重编程巨噬细胞免疫代谢可增强小鼠结直肠癌治疗
abstract_zh: 结直肠癌 (CRC) 通常表现出抑制性肿瘤微环境，该微环境与谷氨酰胺代谢升高和免疫抑制巨噬细胞的诱导有关。谷氨酰胺拮抗剂，如 6-重氮-5-氧代-L-正亮氨酸 (DON) 及其前药 JHU-083 可以限制肿瘤生长，但其毒性和免疫细胞选择性仍然不理想。在这里，我们将 DON 与巨噬细胞靶向部分青蒿酯结合，开发出 WGF-T17 (T17)，它可以阻断巨噬细胞中的谷氨酰胺代谢。在体外，T17 将巨噬细胞代谢重新连接至糖酵解，诱导乳酸积累和组蛋白乳酸化，增强线粒体裂变和吞噬细胞活性，从而将巨噬细胞重新编程为炎症状态。在体内，T17 通过巨噬细胞依赖性途径比 JHU-083 更好地控制肿瘤生长，并且还提高了携带皮下 CRC 肿瘤的雌性小鼠的免疫治疗、化疗和抗血管生成治疗的疗效。因此，我们的研究结果表明，T17 通过靶向巨噬细胞谷氨酰胺代谢来逆转免疫抑制，是一种有前途的 CRC 治疗策略。

title: Targeted long-read sequencing enables comprehensive analysis of the genetic and epigenetic landscape of inherited myopathies
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The genetic variants that cause inherited myopathies vary widely in type, size and sequence context, encompassing small sequence variants, large structural variants, repeat expansions, and more complex events, such as the D4Z4 macrosatellite contraction and hypomethylation that causes facioscapulohumeral muscular dystrophy. Many of these are challenging to characterise using next-generation sequencing and other older molecular technologies. To address this, we developed a targeted long-read sequencing assay and bioinformatics analysis framework that captures the full suite of genes, variants and epigenetic signatures currently implicated in inherited myopathies. Applying this to a cohort of myopathy patients, we demonstrate the analytical validity of our approach and its improved accuracy and resolution compared to existing methods. Our assay led to new genetic diagnoses in 35.5% (11/31) of patients who remained undiagnosed after standard clinical genetic testing. This methodology constitutes a single streamlined assay for comprehensive genetic and epigenetic characterisation of inherited myopathies.
title_zh: 靶向长读长测序能够全面分析遗传性肌病的遗传和表观遗传景观
abstract_zh: 导致遗传性肌病的遗传变异在类型、大小和序列背景上差异很大，包括小序列变异、大结构变异、重复扩增和更复杂的事件，例如导致面肩肱型肌营养不良的 D4Z4 大卫星收缩和低甲基化。使用下一代测序和其他旧的分子技术来表征其中许多都具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种有针对性的长读长测序分析和生物信息学分析框架，捕获目前与遗传性肌病有关的全套基因、变异和表观遗传特征。将其应用于一组肌病患者，我们证明了我们的方法的分析有效性以及与现有方法相比提高的准确性和分辨率。我们的检测对 35.5% (11/31) 的经过标准临床基因检测后仍未确诊的患者进行了新的基因诊断。该方法构成了遗传性肌病的全面遗传和表观遗传特征的单一简化测定。

title: Causal Dynamics of Social Gaze in Primate Prefrontal-Amygdala Networks Revealed by Dynamic Bayesian Modeling
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Social gaze is a fundamental channel of primate communication, shaping dynamic interactions and fostering mutual understanding. While prior studies have mapped the behavioral correlates of social gaze across the prefrontal-amygdala circuits, the causal architecture of these interactions remains poorly understood. Here, we develop an algorithm to integrate independently recorded sessions from male macaques into “super-sessions”, validated using ground-truth synthetic data, enabling the reconstruction of simultaneous multi-area recordings aligned to matched gaze sequences. Applying Dynamic Bayesian Network analysis to these super-sessions, we uncover temporally structured, behavior-dependent causal interactions among the amygdala, orbitofrontal cortex, dorsomedial prefrontal cortex (dmPFC), and anterior cingulate cortex. When macaques were the targets of social gaze, the brain-behavior network exhibited positive temporal modulations, with the dmPFC emerging as the dominant source and the amygdala as a primary recipient of influence. When macaques directed their gaze toward their partners, the dmPFC and amygdala retained their respective roles. Prefrontal regions positively modulated one another, while the amygdala acted solely as a downstream target receiving exclusively negatively modulated prefrontal inputs. These findings reveal previously unknown directional interactions in the primate social brain and highlight distinct causal architectures underlying the bidirectional dynamics of social attention.
title_zh: 动态贝叶斯模型揭示灵长类动物前额叶-杏仁核网络中社交凝视的因果动力学
abstract_zh: 社交凝视是灵长类动物交​​流的基本渠道，可塑造动态互动并促进相互理解。虽然之前的研究已经绘制了前额叶-杏仁核回路中社交凝视的行为相关性，但这些相互作用的因果结构仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们开发了一种算法，将雄性猕猴独立记录的会话整合到“超级会话”中，并使用地面实况合成数据进行验证，从而能够重建与匹配的注视序列对齐的同时多区域记录。将动态贝叶斯网络分析应用于这些超级会话，我们揭示了杏仁核、眶额皮层、背内侧前额叶皮层（dmPFC）和前扣带皮层之间的时间结构、行为依赖的因果相互作用。当猕猴成为社交目光的目标时，大脑行为网络表现出正向时间调节，dmPFC 成为主要来源，杏仁核成为影响的主要接受者。当猕猴将目光转向它们的伴侣时，dmPFC 和杏仁核保留了各自的角色。前额叶区域相互正向调节，而杏仁核仅作为下游目标，接收专门负向调节的前额叶输入。这些发现揭示了灵长类动物社交大脑中以前未知的定向相互作用，并强调了社会注意力双向动态背后的独特因果结构。

title: Programmable memtransistor array with temporal dynamics modulation for efficient time-series data processing
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Hardware-based reservoir computing systems promise energy-efficient time-series data processing. However, their non-adjustable temporal dynamics at the hardware level limit multiscale feature extraction and computing capacity. Here, we present a programmable dynamic memtransistor featuring a dual-functional gate stack that enables hardware-level control of dynamic behavior without constant biasing or input preprocessing. The memtransistor integrates a charge storage layer for volatile temporal processing and a charge trap layer for non-volatile modulation of the band structure, enabling a 5-fold tunability in relaxation time constants. By configuring memtransistors with distinct dynamics in parallel, we realize a wide reservoir computing system capable of processing signals across multiple timescales. This architecture delivers a 40-fold reduction in the error for the multiple superimposed oscillator prediction task compared to a single reservoir baseline, and achieves software-comparable accuracy in forecasting the chaotic Lorenz attractor. Our results establish a compact and energy-efficient hardware platform for scalable wide reservoir computing implementation.
title_zh: 具有时间动态调制功能的可编程记忆晶体管阵列，可实现高效的时间序列数据处理
abstract_zh: 基于硬件的油藏计算系统有望实现节能的时间序列数据处理。然而，它们在硬件级别上的不可调节时间动态限制了多尺度特征提取和计算能力。在这里，我们提出了一种可编程动态记忆晶体管，具有双功能门堆栈，可实现动态行为的硬件级控制，而无需持续偏置或输入预处理。该忆晶体管集成了用于易失性时间处理的电荷存储层和用于能带结构的非易失性调制的电荷陷阱层，从而实现了弛豫时间常数的 5 倍可调性。通过并行配置具有不同动态的存储器晶体管，我们实现了能够跨多个时间尺度处理信号的广泛存储计算系统。与单个储层基线相比，该架构将多个叠加振荡器预测任务的误差减少了 40 倍，并在预测混沌洛伦兹吸引子方面实现了与软件相当的精度。我们的结果建立了一个紧凑且节能的硬件平台，用于可扩展的宽储层计算实施。

title: Signaling downstream of tumor–stroma interaction regulates mucinous colorectal adenocarcinoma apicobasal polarity
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Mucinous colorectal carcinoma (MUC CRC) metastasis to multiple organs, and to the peritoneum, is associated with poor prognosis. Disseminating MUC CRCs exhibit either conventional (apical-in) or inverted (apical-out) polarity that influence patient outcomes. Therefore, it is critical to identify how MUC CRC polarity is regulated. Here, we analyze patient-derived MUC CRC xenografts with either apical-in or apical-out polarity. Single-cell analyses reveal α2β1-integrin as a key collagen-binding receptor in these models. Collagen–α2β1-integrin interaction activates Src and upregulates SorLA, an endosomal sorting receptor. SorLA supports apical-in polarity by promoting integrin recycling and HER2/HER3 expression. We observe positive correlation between HER2, HER3 and SorLA in patient samples and higher HER2 expression in apical-in-presenting tissues. Clinically relevant HER2/HER3-targeting antibodies revert tumor sphere polarity, and impede collagen remodeling and adhesion to mouse peritoneum. This SorLA—integrin—HER2/HER3 axis could represent a MUC CRC-patient stratification approach and be relevant for other carcinomas with apical-out phenotypes.
title_zh: 肿瘤-间质相互作用的下游信号传导调节粘液性结直肠腺癌顶端基底极性
abstract_zh: 粘液性结直肠癌（MUC CRC）转移至多个器官和腹膜，与不良预后相关。播散性 MUC CRC 表现出影响患者预后的传统（顶端向内）或反向（顶端向外）极性。因此，确定如何调节 MUC CRC 极性至关重要。在这里，我们分析了具有顶端向内或顶端向外极性的患者来源的 MUC CRC 异种移植物。单细胞分析表明 α2β1-整合素是这些模型中关键的胶原蛋白结合受体。胶原蛋白 - α2β1 - 整合素相互作用激活 Src 并上调 SorLA（一种内体分选受体）。 SorLA 通过促进整合素回收和 HER2/HER3 表达来支持顶端极性。我们观察到患者样本中的 HER2、HER3 和 SorLA 与心尖呈现组织中较高的 HER2 表达呈正相关。临床相关的 HER2/HER3 靶向抗体可恢复肿瘤球极性，并阻止胶原蛋白重塑和与小鼠腹膜的粘附。该 SorLA-整合素-HER2/HER3 轴可以代表 MUC CRC 患者分层方法，并且与具有顶端外表型的其他癌症相关。

title: Joint trajectories of brain atrophy, white matter hyperintensities and cognition quantify brain maintenance
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Brain maintenance – the preservation of brain structure or function relevant to cognitive performance – remains challenging to quantify. Here, we propose a domain-general brain maintenance index derived by jointly modelling the longitudinal co-evolution of ageing-related atrophy (via medial temporal lobe to ventricle ratio, MTLV-ratio), white matter hyperintensities (WMH), and global cognition assessed by the preclinical Alzheimer’s cognitive composite (PACC5) using latent growth curve modelling. We demonstrate its utility in 543 cognitively unimpaired older adults from the DELCODE cohort, followed annually over four years. We show that changes in MTLV-ratio and WMH additively predict cognitive change. We further show that higher neuroticism, depressive symptoms, lower openness, and faster biological ageing are related to unfavourable domain-specific trajectories and poorer brain maintenance. Our findings highlight the combined relevance of WMH and ageing-related atrophy dynamics for brain maintenance. Maintaining cerebrovascular and mental health alongside cognitive engagement could promote brain maintenance, delay cognitive decline and dementia.
title_zh: 脑萎缩、白质高信号和认知的联合轨迹量化大脑维护
abstract_zh: 大脑维护——与认知表现相关的大脑结构或功能的保存——仍然难以量化。在这里，我们提出了一个领域通用的大脑维护指数，该指数是通过对衰老相关萎缩（通过内侧颞叶与心室比率，MTLV比率）、白质高信号（WMH）和使用潜在生长曲线建模的临床前阿尔茨海默氏症认知复合物（PACC5）评估的整体认知的纵向共同进化进行联合建模而得出的。我们在 DELCODE 队列中的 543 名认知未受损的老年人中展示了它的实用性，并在四年内每年进行一次跟踪。我们发现 MTLV 比率和 WMH 的变化可以相加地预测认知变化。我们进一步表明，较高的神经质、抑郁症状、较低的开放性和较快的生物衰老与不利的特定领域轨迹和较差的大脑维护有关。我们的研究结果强调了 WMH 和衰老相关萎缩动力学对大脑维护的综合相关性。保持脑血管和心理健康以及认知参与可以促进大脑维护，延缓认知能力下降和痴呆。

title: metilene3: identifying DMRs across multiple conditions with auto-classification
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: DNA methylation is a critical epigenetic mark across numerous species, and identifying differentially methylated regions (DMRs) is essential for understanding genome regulation. Most existing DMR detection methods require predefined sample conditions, limiting the discovery of new epigenetic patterns, especially when group identities are unknown or uncertain, as is common in clinical settings. Additionally, only a very few approaches enable comparisons across multiple conditions. To address this significant gap, we present metilene3, a method for rapid, multi-condition DMR detection that operates in both supervised and unsupervised modes, using user-provided labels or autonomously clustering unlabeled samples. By segmenting the genome based on multiple pairwise methylation difference signals, metilene3 enables sample classification and DMR-anchored inference of epigenetic relationships. Using simulated and diverse human datasets, we show that metilene3 accurately detects DMRs, robustly clusters samples, and holds the potential to reveal new regulatory elements and sample stratifications. Specifically, in a pancreatic tissue dataset, metilene3 identifies DMRs enriched for key transcription factors involved in pancreatic cancer development, hinting towards an altered NFKB-NFAT regulatory program. Together, metilene3 provides a fast, interpretable framework for exploring heterogeneous methylomes and discovering epigenetic patterns across complex biological and clinical datasets.
title_zh: metilene3：通过自动分类识别多种条件下的 DMR
abstract_zh: DNA 甲基化是许多物种的关键表观遗传标记，识别差异甲基化区域 (DMR) 对于了解基因组调控至关重要。大多数现有的 DMR 检测方法需要预定义的样本条件，限制了新的表观遗传模式的发现，特别是当群体身份未知或不确定时，这在临床环境中很常见。此外，只有极少数方法可以跨多种条件进行比较。为了解决这一重大差距，我们提出了 metilene3，这是一种快速、多条件 DMR 检测的方法，可以在监督和无监督模式下运行，使用用户提供的标签或自动聚类未标记的样本。通过基于多个成对甲基化差异信号对基因组进行分段，metilene3 能够实现样本分类和表观遗传关系的 DMR 锚定推断。使用模拟和多样化的人类数据集，我们表明 metilene3 可以准确检测 DMR，稳健地对样本进行聚类，并具有揭示新的调控元件和样本分层的潜力。具体来说，在胰腺组织数据集中，metilene3 识别出富含参与胰腺癌发展的关键转录因子的 DMR，暗示 NFKB-NFAT 调控程序发生了改变。 metilene3 共同提供了一个快速、可解释的框架，用于探索异质甲基化组并发现复杂的生物和临床数据集中的表观遗传模式。

title: ZNF689 loss impairs homologous recombination sensitizing triple-negative breast cancer to combined PARP and PD-L1 inhibition
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) is the most aggressive subtype of breast cancer, characterized by a poor prognosis due to the lack of effective targeted therapies. While poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) inhibitors benefit BRCA1/2-mutated TNBC, their efficacy in BRCA wild-type tumors remains limited. In this study, we uncover a critical role of zinc-finger protein 689 (ZNF689) in regulating homologous recombination (HR) repair in TNBC. Our findings reveal that in response to DNA damage, ZNF689 is phosphorylated by ATM and promotes NBS1 ubiquitination via E3 ligase SKP2, leading to the stabilization of the MRN complex and subsequent ATM activation, thereby facilitating HR repair. ZNF689 loss markedly enhances sensitivity to PARP inhibitors in TNBC, particularly when combined with paclitaxel. Furthermore, PARP inhibition upregulates PD-L1 expression in ZNF689-deficient TNBC cells through activation of the STING pathway. Notably, ZNF689 loss enhances the therapeutic efficacy of PARP inhibition plus anti-PD-L1 immunotherapy. Together, these findings suggest ZNF689 as a crucial regulator of HR repair and provide proof-of-concept for combining PARP inhibition and PD-L1 blockade in patients with ZNF689-low TNBC.
title_zh: ZNF689 缺失会损害同源重组，从而使三阴性乳腺癌对 PARP 和 PD-L1 联合抑制敏感
abstract_zh: 三阴性乳腺癌（TNBC）是乳腺癌中最具侵袭性的亚型，由于缺乏有效的靶向治疗，其特点是预后不良。虽然聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）抑制剂有利于 BRCA1/2 突变的 TNBC，但它们对 BRCA 野生型肿瘤的疗效仍然有限。在这项研究中，我们发现了锌指蛋白 689 (ZNF689) 在调节 TNBC 同源重组 (HR) 修复中的关键作用。我们的研究结果表明，响应 DNA 损伤，ZNF689 被 ATM 磷酸化，并通过 E3 连接酶 SKP2 促进 NBS1 泛素化，从而导致 MRN 复合物的稳定和随后的 ATM 激活，从而促进 HR 修复。 ZNF689 缺失显着增强了 TNBC 对 PARP 抑制剂的敏感性，特别是与紫杉醇联合使用时。此外，PARP 抑制可通过激活 STING 通路上调 ZNF689 缺陷的 TNBC 细胞中的 PD-L1 表达。值得注意的是，ZNF689 缺失增强了 PARP 抑制加抗 PD-L1 免疫疗法的治疗效果。总之，这些发现表明 ZNF689 是 HR 修复的关键调节因子，并为 ZNF689 低 TNBC 患者结合 PARP 抑制和 PD-L1 阻断提供了概念验证。

title: Visual learning at fast and slow timescales is driven by distinct plasticity rules in primate inferotemporal cortex
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: We learn to recognize a vast array of familiar objects, a process involving learning-related changes in inferotemporal cortex (IT) activity. A challenge to discovering mechanisms of familiarity learning is that it spans multiple timescales from minutes to days, and is accompanied by simultaneous changes in cellular, synaptic, and network properties. We leverage an integrated experimental-theoretical approach, using IT recordings in two male macaques during familiarity learning within and across sessions to infer underlying plasticity mechanisms. We identified two timescales of learning-related changes spanning minutes to days, consistent with distinct synaptic and cellular mechanisms. Across sessions, averaged responses gradually decreased with familiarity, consistent with synaptic plasticity. In contrast, within-session changes, including rapid response decay and increased spontaneous activity, aligned with intrinsic plasticity mechanisms. Recurrent networks endowed with learning rules inferred from experiments replicated the observed learning dynamics, supporting our hypothesis of distinct learning mechanisms - slow, synaptic plasticity at long timescales and fast, intrinsic plasticity at short timescales.
title_zh: 快速和慢速时间尺度的视觉学习是由灵长类动物颞下皮层的独特可塑性规则驱动的
abstract_zh: 我们学习识别大量熟悉的物体，这个过程涉及颞下皮层（IT）活动中与学习相关的变化。发现熟悉性学习机制的一个挑战是，它跨越从几分钟到几天的多个时间尺度，并且伴随着细胞、突触和网络属性的同时变化。我们利用综合实验理论方法，使用两只雄性猕猴在会话内和会话间熟悉度学习期间的 IT 记录来推断潜在的可塑性机制。我们确定了与学习相关的变化的两个时间尺度，从几分钟到几天，与不同的突触和细胞机制一致。在整个会话中，平均反应随着熟悉程度逐渐下降，这与突触可塑性一致。相反，会话内的变化，包括快速响应衰减和自发活动增加，与内在的可塑性机制相一致。赋予从实验中推断出的学习规则的循环网络复制了观察到的学习动态，支持了我们对不同学习机制的假设——长时间尺度上的缓慢的突触可塑性和短时间尺度上的快速的内在可塑性。

title: Positional interpretation of cis-regulatory code and nucleosome organization with deep learning models
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Sequence-to-function neural networks learn cis-regulatory sequence rules driving many types of genomic data. Interpreting these models to relate the sequence rules to underlying biological processes remains challenging, especially for complex genomic readouts such as MNase-seq, which maps nucleosome occupancy but is confounded by experimental bias. Here, we introduce pairwise influence by sequence attribution (PISA), which uses attribution to combinatorially decode which bases contributed to the readout at a specific genomic coordinate. PISA visualizes the effects of transcription factor motifs, detects undiscovered motifs with complex contribution patterns, and reveals experimental biases. By learning the bias for MNase-seq, PISA enables unprecedented nucleosome prediction models. These models allow the de novo discovery of nucleosome-positioning motifs and reveal the basis of Micro-C chromatin domain boundaries through systematic motif perturbations. Finally, these models allow the design of sequences with altered nucleosome configurations. These results show that PISA is a versatile tool that expands our ability to train and interpret sequence-to-function neural networks on genomics data and understand the underlying cis-regulatory code.
title_zh: 利用深度学习模型对顺式调控代码和核小体组织进行位置解释
abstract_zh: 序列到功能神经网络学习驱动多种类型基因组数据的顺式调控序列规则。解释这些模型以将序列规则与潜在的生物过程联系起来仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于复杂的基因组读数，例如 MNase-seq，它映射核小体占据，但受到实验偏差的混淆。在这里，我们引入了序列归因的成对影响（PISA），它使用归因来组合解码哪些碱基对特定基因组坐标的读数有贡献。 PISA 可视化转录因子基序的影响，检测具有复杂贡献模式的未被发现的基序，并揭示实验偏差。通过了解 MNase-seq 的偏差，PISA 实现了前所未有的核小体预测模型。这些模型允许从头发现核小体定位基序，并通过系统基序扰动揭示 Micro-C 染色质结构域边界的基础。最后，这些模型允许设计具有改变的核小体配置的序列。这些结果表明，PISA 是一种多功能工具，可以扩展我们在基因组数据上训练和解释序列功能神经网络并理解底层顺式调控代码的能力。

title: Eco-evolutionary responses of species distributions to climate change
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Species elevational shifts are well-documented responses to climate change, with many moving upslope to track suitable conditions. However, these shifts can vary considerably in both direction and rate, and the underlying causes of this variability are not well understood. This study examines how elevational shifts depend on geographical zones along with species’ climatic niches, global prevalence, and evolutionary history by analyzing paired lower and upper edge shifts across 845 plant and animal species records worldwide. We find distinct effects of these drivers on upper versus lower distribution limits. Tropical species experienced more rapid upward shifts of their lower edges than did temperate species. Species with warmer and wetter optimal climatic niches displayed faster upper-edge shifts, while those only with wetter ones showed more rapid lower-edge shifts. Globally prevalent species expanded their distributions with climate change by combining faster upper-edge advances with slower lower-edge contractions, likely reflecting their drier climatic adaptation. Importantly, these ecological effects overlapped substantially with phylogenetic effects, and phylogenetic conservatism independently explained a notable portion of the variation in elevational responses. These findings highlight the complexity of evolutionary history and ecological processes in shaping species’ climate responses and underscore the climate vulnerability of some species due to their evolutionary inertia.
title_zh: 物种分布对气候变化的生态进化反应
abstract_zh: 物种海拔变化是对气候变化的有据可查的反应，许多物种向上坡移动以追踪合适的条件。然而，这些变化在方向和速率上都有很大差异，而且这种变化的根本原因尚不清楚。本研究通过分析全球 845 个动植物物种记录中成对的下缘和上缘变化，探讨了海拔变化如何取决于地理区域以及物种的气候生态位、全球流行率和进化历史。我们发现这些驱动因素对分配上限和分配下限有明显的影响。热带物种的下缘向上移动速度比温带物种更快。具有更温暖和更湿润的最佳气候生态位的物种表现出更快的上边缘变化，而那些只有更湿润的气候生态位的物种则表现出更快的下边缘变化。全球流行的物种通过将较快的上缘进步与较慢的下缘收缩相结合，随着气候变化扩大了它们的分布，这可能反映了它们对干燥气候的适应。重要的是，这些生态效应与系统发育效应基本重叠，而系统发育保守主义独立解释了海拔反应变化的显着部分。这些发现凸显了进化历史和生态过程在影响物种气候反应方面的复杂性，并强调了某些物种由于其进化惯性而面临的气候脆弱性。

title: A likelihood-based method for identifying replay from spike sequences
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Hippocampal replay—sequential reactivation of place cells—has been implicated in memory recall, consolidation and planning, but traditional analyses rely on spatial tuning and exclude non-place cells, limiting their scope. Model-based analyses without spatial templates often depend on predefined parameters and constrained pattern definitions, making them parameter-sensitive and potentially biased. To address these limitations, we developed an analysis that estimates the likelihood of spike sequences based on pairwise firing order probabilities observed during active behavior regardless of their behavioral correlates. We validated the method using simulations, rat single-unit recordings, and mouse calcium imaging, showing strong agreement with conventional replay metrics and broad applicability. When applied to head-fixed mice passively viewing naturalistic movie stimuli, the method detected significant replay in both hippocampus and visual cortex, demonstrating its utility in uncovering structured replay across brain regions and sensory domains.
title_zh: 一种基于似然性的尖峰序列重放识别方法
abstract_zh: 海马体重放（位置细胞的顺序重新激活）与记忆回忆、巩固和规划有关，但传统分析依赖于空间调谐并排除非位置细胞，从而限制了其范围。没有空间模板的基于模型的分析通常依赖于预定义的参数和约束模式定义，这使得它们对参数敏感并且可能存在偏差。为了解决这些限制，我们开发了一种分析方法，根据在主动行为期间观察到的成对发射顺序概率来估计尖峰序列的可能性，而不管它们的行为相关性如何。我们使用模拟、大鼠单单元记录和小鼠钙成像验证了该方法，显示出与传统重放指标的强烈一致性和广泛的适用性。当应用于被动观看自然电影刺激的头部固定小鼠时，该方法在海马体和视觉皮层中检测到显着的重放，证明了其在揭示跨大脑区域和感觉域的结构化重放方面的实用性。

title: Glutamatergic signaling underlies brain structural organization for mathematical and reading abilities in children
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The neurochemical mechanisms underlying individual differences in children’s mathematical and reading abilities remain largely unknown. Here we investigate how neurotransmitter systems relate to brain structural organization supporting these abilities in two independent cohorts of children (N = 991). We mapped brain-wide structural phenotypes associated with academic performance onto a comprehensive PET atlas of 19 neurotransmitter receptors and transporters. Across both domains and cohorts, NMDA glutamatergic receptor distribution showed the most consistent associations with brain structural organization supporting academic abilities (replication Bayes factors >9e4 for mathematics; >4 for reading). NMDA receptor density corresponded with multiple functional networks for mathematical abilities but showed more spatially focused associations within visual networks for reading, suggesting both shared and domain-specific neurochemical mechanisms. Dopaminergic, cholinergic, serotonergic, and GABAergic systems showed weaker, non-replicable associations. These findings bridge molecular neurochemistry and macro-scale brain architecture supporting academic skills, identifying glutamatergic signaling as a candidate target for interventions addressing learning disabilities.
title_zh: 谷氨酸信号是儿童数学和阅读能力的大脑结构组织的基础
abstract_zh: 儿童数学和阅读能力个体差异背后的神经化学机制仍然很大程度上未知。在这里，我们研究了两个独立儿童群体（N = 991）中神经递质系统如何与支持这些能力的大脑结构组织相关。我们将与学习成绩相关的全脑结构表型映射到包含 19 种神经递质受体和转运蛋白的综合 PET 图谱上。在这两个领域和队列中，NMDA 谷氨酸受体分布显示出与支持学术能力的大脑结构组织最一致的关联（数学的复制贝叶斯因子 >9e4；阅读的复制贝叶斯因子 >4）。 NMDA 受体密度与数学能力的多个功能网络相对应，但在阅读的视觉网络中显示出更多的空间集中关联，表明共享的和特定领域的神经化学机制。多巴胺能、胆碱能、血清素能和 GABA 能系统表现出较弱、不可复制的关联。这些发现将分子神经化学和支持学术技能的宏观大脑结构联系起来，将谷氨酸信号确定为解决学习障碍干预措施的候选目标。

title: Closed-loop readout of anterior insula high-gamma activity steers value-based decisions
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The decision-making field has long attempted to understand the origins of human choice variability. A potential source of variability lies in spontaneous fluctuations of ongoing neural activity, which may influence behavior across several cognitive domains. Here, we developed a closed-loop intracranial brain-computer interface that detects transient fluctuations of broadband gamma activity (BGA, 70–150 Hz) to trigger stimulus presentations contingent on high or low neural states. Using this approach, we examined how spontaneous activity in the anterior insula influences accept/reject decisions involving multi-attribute offers combining pleasant and unpleasant components. Offers preceded by high BGA in the anterior insula were associated with a transient post-offer suppression in anterior insula activity, which biased decisions toward accepting an unpleasant item in exchange for a pleasant one in hypothetical multi-attribute choices. These findings demonstrate that sub-second endogenous neural fluctuations directly modulate choice behavior, challenging current neuro-computational models by emphasizing the critical role of intrinsic brain states in shaping decision variability.
title_zh: 前岛叶高伽玛活动的闭环读数可引导基于价值的决策
abstract_zh: 决策领域长期以来一直试图了解人类选择变异性的起源。变异性的潜在来源在于正在进行的神经活动的自发波动，这可能会影响多个认知领域的行为。在这里，我们开发了一种闭环颅内脑机接口，可检测宽带伽玛活动（BGA，70-150 Hz）的瞬态波动，以触发取决于高或低神经状态的刺激呈现。使用这种方法，我们研究了前岛叶的自发活动如何影响接受/拒绝决策，涉及结合愉快和不愉快成分的多属性提议。前岛叶高 BGA 之前的提议与前岛叶活动的短暂提议后抑制相关，这使得在假设的多属性选择中倾向于接受不愉快的项目以换取愉快的项目。这些发现表明，亚秒内源性神经波动直接调节选择行为，通过强调内在大脑状态在塑造决策可变性中的关键作用，对当前的神经计算模型提出了挑战。

title: The BRCA1-A complex restricts replication fork reversal-dependent DNA repair in ATM deficient cells
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Ataxia Telangiectasia Mutated (ATM) kinase deficiency results in cancer susceptibility and drug hypersensitivity. Deficiency in either the BRCA1 interacting A complex or XRCC4/Ligase 4 confers resistance to Topoisomerase I or PARP1 inhibitors in ATM-deficient cells. This suggests that BRCA1-A directs toxicity to fork-damaging agents in ATM mutated cells via illegitimate end-joining. Here, we show that ATM inhibition triggers combined SUMO and ubiquitin mediated BRCA1-A damaged fork recognition to restrict end-resection and cause Topoisomerase I inhibitor hypersensitivity. BRCA1-A deficient cells display elevated chromatin accessibility and nuclease activity at damaged forks, coupled with restored resection and drug resistance. Electron microscopy evidence demonstrates that ATM inhibition prevents replication fork reversal, which is restored by BRCA1-A loss to generate substrates for end resection. These findings reveal that BRCA1-A enforces a restrictive chromatin state to suppress the genesis of resection substrates, implicating fork reversal as a key determinant of chemotherapy response in ATM deficient cells.
title_zh: BRCA1-A 复合物限制 ATM 缺陷细胞中复制叉逆转依赖性 DNA 修复
abstract_zh: 共济失调毛细血管扩张突变 (ATM) 激酶缺陷会导致癌症易感性和药物过敏。 BRCA1 相互作用 A 复合物或 XRCC4/连接酶 4 的缺陷会导致 ATM 缺陷细胞对拓扑异构酶 I 或 PARP1 抑制剂产生耐药性。这表明 BRCA1-A 通过非法末端连接对 ATM 突变细胞中的叉损伤剂产生毒性。在这里，我们表明，ATM 抑制会触发 SUMO 和泛素介导的 BRCA1-A 受损叉识别相结合，以限制末端切除并引起拓扑异构酶 I 抑制剂超敏反应。 BRCA1-A 缺陷细胞在受损叉处显示出更高的染色质可及性和核酸酶活性，同时恢复了切除和耐药性。电子显微镜证据表明，ATM 抑制可防止复制叉逆转，而 BRCA1-A 丢失可恢复复制叉逆转，从而生成用于末端切除的底物。这些发现表明，BRCA1-A 强制限制性染色质状态来抑制切除底物的发生，表明叉逆转是 ATM 缺陷细胞化疗反应的关键决定因素。

title: Ectomesenchyme contributes to epidermal stem cell formation through mesenchymal-to-epithelial transition
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Cutaneous development is initiated by crosstalk between non-neural ectodermal epithelium and underlying mesenchymal cells. Recent studies have shown that some mesenchymal cells contribute to keratinocyte regeneration in injured skin. However, whether mesenchymal cells contribute to keratinocyte formation in physiologically normal skin remains unclear. Here we show, using lineage tracing, single-cell transcriptome and epigenome analyses of mouse skin, that the interfollicular epidermis consists largely of mesenchymal-lineage cells. Further lineage-tracing and live-imaging analysis of mouse embryos indicate that these mesenchymal-lineage epidermal progenitor cells arise from ectomesenchyme and contribute to the surface ectoderm through a mesenchymal-to-epithelial transition-like process between embryonic days 8.5 and 9.5. We also establish human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived ectomesenchyme and demonstrate that it generates p63-expressing keratinocytes. These data reveal a previously unappreciated contribution of ectomesenchyme to cutaneous development and provide insight into skin diseases involving epidermal mosaicism.
title_zh: 外源间充质通过间充质到上皮的转变有助于表皮干细胞的形成
abstract_zh: 皮肤发育是由非神经外胚层上皮和下面的间充质细胞之间的串扰启动的。最近的研究表明，一些间充质细胞有助于受损皮肤角质形成细胞的再生。然而，间充质细胞是否有助于生理正常皮肤中角质形成细胞的形成仍不清楚。在这里，我们利用小鼠皮肤的谱系追踪、单细胞转录组和表观基因组分析表明，滤泡间表皮主要由间充质谱系细胞组成。对小鼠胚胎的进一步谱系追踪和实时成像分析表明，这些间充质谱系表皮祖细胞源自外胚层，并通过胚胎第 8.5 天和第 9.5 天之间的间充质到上皮过渡样过程，形成表面外胚层。我们还建立了人类诱导多能干细胞来源的外胚充质，并证明它能产生表达 p63 的角质形成细胞。这些数据揭示了外间充质对皮肤发育的先前未被认识到的贡献，并为涉及表皮嵌合的皮肤疾病提供了见解。

title: A large-scale multi-ancestry mitochondrial variant association analysis for cardiometabolic traits
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Studies linking mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) with complex traits are often limited by small sample sizes or focused on specific phenotypes in clinically selected cohorts. Here, we use data from >600,000 participants in the Million Veteran Program (MVP) to perform a multi-ancestry analysis of mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) variation and cardiometabolic phenotypes across European (EUR), African (AFR), Admixed American (AMR), and East Asian (EAS) populations. After validating 248 mtDNA loci, we identify 10 ancestry-stratified single-variant associations (8 EUR, 2 AFR) and 23 additional signals in sex- and type 2 diabetes (T2D)–stratified analyses. Four variants tagging haplogroup J, D-loop MT228G > A, MT-ND3 MT10398A > G (p.Thr114Ala), MT-ND5 MT13708G > A (p.Ala458Thr), and MT-CYB MT14798T > C (p.Phe18Leu), are associated with hypothyroidism in EUR and replicated in UK Biobank (UKBB) with concordant effects. In EUR females, MT-RNR1 MT1555A > G increases the risk of carditis and heart failure phenotypes, supporting prior reports of maternally inherited cardiomyopathy. Gene-based rare-variant tests (minor allele frequency ≤2%) yield 26 associations (12 EUR, 10 AFR, 2 AMR, 2 EAS), including mitochondrial tRNA burdens linked to primary cardiomyopathy (females) and exophthalmos (males). Twenty-three of the 33 single-variant signals map to the endocrine/metabolic category, indicating significant enrichment (Fisher’s exact P = 0.003). These results define ancestry- and context-specific contributions of mtDNA to cardiometabolic disease, with a notable concentration in endocrine traits, and provide a framework for mtDNA analysis across diverse biobank cohorts.
title_zh: 心脏代谢特征的大规模多祖先线粒体变异关联分析
abstract_zh: 将线粒体 DNA (mtDNA) 与复杂性状联系起来的研究通常受到样本量较小的限制，或者侧重于临床选择的队列中的特定表型。在这里，我们使用来自百万退伍军人计划 (MVP) 的超过 600,000 名参与者的数据，对欧洲 (EUR)、非洲 (AFR)、美洲混血 (AMR) 和东亚 (EAS) 人群的线粒体 DNA (mtDNA) 变异和心脏代谢表型进行多祖先分析。在验证 248 个 mtDNA 位点后，我们在性别和 2 型糖尿病 (T2D) 分层分析中确定了 10 个祖先分层的单变异关联（8 EUR，2 AFR）和 23 个附加信号。标记单倍群 J、D 环 MT228G > A、MT-ND3 MT10398A > G (p.Thr114Ala)、MT-ND5 MT13708G > A (p.Ala458Thr) 和 MT-CYB MT14798T > C (p.Phe18Leu) 的四个变体与欧洲的甲状腺功能减退症相关，并在英国复制生物样本库 (UKBB) 具有一致的效果。在欧洲女性中，MT-RNR1 MT1555A > G 会增加心脏炎和心力衰竭表型的风险，这支持了先前关于母系遗传性心肌病的报道。基于基因的罕见变异测试（次要等位基因频率≤2%）产生 26 个关联（12 EUR、10 AFR、2 AMR、2 EAS），包括与原发性心肌病（女性）和眼球突出（男性）相关的线粒体 tRNA 负荷。 33 个单变异信号中有 23 个映射到内分泌/代谢类别，表明显着富集（Fisher 精确 P = 0.003）。这些结果定义了 mtDNA 对心脏代谢疾病的祖先和背景特定的贡献，其中显着集中在内分泌特征和公害方面。

title: Click-polymerized polyenamine membranes for efficient lithium extraction
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The clean energy transition drives burgeoning global demand for lithium, highlighting the critical role of nanofiltration (NF) and reverse osmosis (RO) membranes for selective lithium extraction. However, conventional polyamide NF membranes, typically fabricated from hydrolysis-susceptible acyl chlorides, exhibit limited Li+/Mg2+ separation efficiency. Here, we report the fabrication of polyenamine membranes via amino-yne Michael addition reaction by substituting hydrolysis-susceptible acyl chlorides with activated alkyne monomers. The resulting NF membranes feature a positively charged surface, narrow pore size distribution, and exceptional chemical stability, achieving a high Li+/Mg2+ selectivity of 309. Similarly, by employing amine monomers that generate reduced intrinsic cavity, the same chemistry also affords RO membranes with NaCl rejection > 97%. Module-scale evaluations validated the potential of coupling click-polymerized NF and RO membranes for battery-grade Li2CO3 (> 99.9%) production from salt-lake brines and spent lithium-ion batteries. This versatile click-chemistry platform provides an alternative to conventional polyamides for sustainable critical resource recovery.
title_zh: 用于高效锂提取的点击聚合多烯胺膜
abstract_zh: 清洁能源转型推动了全球对锂的需求不断增长，凸显了纳滤 (NF) 和反渗透 (RO) 膜在选择性锂提取中的关键作用。然而，传统的聚酰胺纳滤膜通常由易水解的酰氯制成，其 Li+/Mg2+ 分离效率有限。在这里，我们报道了通过用活化的炔单体取代易水解的酰氯，通过氨基-炔迈克尔加成反应制备多烯胺膜。所得纳滤膜具有带正电荷的表面、窄孔径分布和出色的化学稳定性，实现了 309 的高 Li+/Mg2+ 选择性。同样，通过使用产生减少内腔的胺单体，相同的化学物质还可以提供 NaCl 截留率 > 97% 的 RO 膜。模块规模评估验证了耦合点击聚合纳滤膜和反渗透膜在从盐湖卤水和废锂离子电池中生产电池级 Li2CO3 (> 99.9%) 的潜力。这种多功能点击化学平台为可持续关键资源回收提供了传统聚酰胺的替代品。

title: Octahedral-motif-guided design of optoelectronic semiconductors via interpretable machine learning
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Halide perovskites’ remarkable optoelectronic properties stem from their metal halide octahedra. This connection underscores the promise of systematically extracting the physical rules encoded in octahedral motifs to steer the discovery of optoelectronic materials. Here, we develop an octahedral motif-centric, data-driven framework that couples interpretable machine learning with high-throughput first-principles calculations to accelerate the discovery of optoelectronic semiconductors. We construct motif-based descriptors to train a gradient boosting regression tree model for thermodynamic stability evaluation, achieving a low mean absolute error of 83 meV per atom on datasets comprising ~104 materials. Leveraging the model to accelerate materials discovery, we identify 19 unexplored thermodynamically stable semiconductors with favorable optoelectronic properties. Among them Ca2GaCoO5 was successfully synthesized and experimentally verified to exhibit a strong visible light photoresponse. These results support the effectiveness of the machine learning framework for octahedra-containing semiconductors and suggest its potential for extension to other motif-based materials families.
title_zh: 通过可解释的机器学习进行光电半导体的八面体基序引导设计
abstract_zh: 卤化物钙钛矿的卓越光电特性源于其金属卤化物八面体。这种联系强调了系统地提取八面体图案中编码的物理规则以引导光电材料的发现的前景。在这里，我们开发了一个以八面体图案为中心、数据驱动的框架，将可解释的机器学习与高通量第一原理计算结合起来，以加速光电半导体的发现。我们构建基于基序的描述符来训练用于热力学稳定性评估的梯度增强回归树模型，在包含约 104 种材料的数据集上实现每个原子 83 meV 的低平均绝对误差。利用该模型加速材料发现，我们确定了 19 种未经探索的热力学稳定半导体，它们具有良好的光电特性。其中Ca2GaCoO5被成功合成并经实验验证表现出很强的可见光光响应。这些结果支持了含八面体半导体的机器学习框架的有效性，并表明其扩展到其他基于基序的材料系列的潜力。

title: Multiscale artificial spider web for comprehensive pressure sensing and human-machine interaction
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Flexible pressure sensors are key components of Internet of Things systems for monitoring environmental and physiological signals, yet simultaneously achieving a high sensitivity, a fast response time, and a high mechanical durability remains challenging owing to the lack of sophisticated structural designs that balance sensing performance and robustness. Here, we demonstrate a multiscale artificial spider web (MASW) fabricated via copper-mesh-assisted electrospinning of biodegradable polylactic acid, forming a nanofiber network that efficiently transmits stress while enhancing mechanical stability. The resulting pressure sensor simultaneously shows a high sensitivity of 39.85 [kPa]−1, a fast response of 42 ms and high durability over 6000 loading cycles, enabling reliable and versatile neural-network-assisted real-time monitoring of multiple physiological signals, including pulse, breathing, and vocalization. Furthermore, leveraging precise joint movement signal acquisition, a human-machine interaction system was developed with potential applications in fine motor rehabilitation for Parkinson’s disease, suggesting strong promise for sustainable healthcare and IoT systems.
title_zh: 用于全面压力传感和人机交互的多尺度人工蜘蛛网
abstract_zh: 柔性压力传感器是物联网系统中用于监测环境和生理信号的关键组件，但由于缺乏平衡传感性能和鲁棒性的复杂结构设计，同时实现高灵敏度、快速响应时间和高机械耐用性仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们展示了通过铜网辅助静电纺丝可生物降解的聚乳酸制造的多尺度人造蜘蛛网（MASW），形成纳米纤维网络，有效传递应力，同时增强机械稳定性。由此产生的压力传感器同时表现出 39.85 [kPa]−1 的高灵敏度、42 ms 的快速响应和超过 6000 个加载周期的高耐用性，从而能够对多种生理信号（包括脉搏、呼吸和发声）进行可靠且多功能的神经网络辅助实时监测。此外，利用精确的关节运动信号采集，开发了人机交互系统，该系统在帕金森病的精细运动康复中具有潜在的应用，这表明可持续医疗保健和物联网系统的前景广阔。

title: Ancient plume-reinforced lithosphere modulates present-day crustal fluid migration and deformation
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Understanding how ancient mantle plume residues modify lithospheric structure and influence tectonic deformation remains challenging, especially in plume-peripheral regions where basalts are not exposed at the surface. Here, we present magnetotelluric imaging across the Huayingshan Fault in the outer zone of the Permian Emeishan large igneous province, China. The resistivity model reveals a vertically extensive high-resistivity structure beneath the fault that coincides with high seismic velocities and high density, and is most consistently interpreted as the crystallized product of mantle-derived basaltic melts from the Emeishan plume. We use upper-mantle-scale geodynamic simulations to examine how plume-driven melting and plume-derived material interact with lithospheric heterogeneity. While these models do not explicitly simulate small-scale melt extraction or crustal emplacement, they suggest that pre-existing lithospheric heterogeneity can shape the lateral redistribution of plume-derived material. We infer that residual plume material crystallized in situ within the fault zone formed a low-permeability, mechanically strong lithospheric barrier that may impede or redirect crustal-fluid migration. This plume-reinforced lithosphere may promote stress localization on its northwestern side, where present-day earthquakes are preferentially clustered. Together, these results suggest that plume-modified lithosphere can preserve a long-lived structural imprint that modulates crustal-fluid migration and continental deformation.
title_zh: 古代羽流强化岩石圈调节当今地壳流体迁移和变形
abstract_zh: 了解古代地幔柱残留物如何改变岩石圈结构并影响构造变形仍然具有挑战性，特别是在玄武岩未暴露在地表的地幔柱外围区域。在这里，我们展示了中国二叠纪峨眉山大型火成岩省外区华蓥山断层的大地电磁成像。电阻率模型揭示了断层下方垂直广泛的高电阻率结构，与高地震速度和高密度相一致，并且最一致地解释为来自峨眉山地幔柱的地幔玄武岩熔体的结晶产物。我们使用上地幔尺度的地球动力学模拟来研究羽流驱动的熔化和羽流衍生的物质如何与岩石圈异质性相互作用。虽然这些模型没有明确模拟小规模熔体提取或地壳侵位，但它们表明预先存在的岩石圈异质性可以塑造羽流衍生材料的横向重新分布。我们推断，在断层带内原位结晶的残余羽流材料形成了低渗透性、机械强度高的岩石圈屏障，可能会阻碍或改变地壳流体的迁移方向。这种羽流强化的岩石圈可能会促进其西北侧的应力局部化，那里是当今地震优先聚集的地方。总之，这些结果表明，羽流改变的岩石圈可以保留调节地壳流体迁移和大陆变形的长期结构印记。

title: Electric field tunable coupling strength and quantum metric hot spots in a moiré flatband superconductor
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Alternating twisted multilayer graphene presents a compelling multiband system, with a coexistence of Dirac bands and flat bands, for exploring superconductivity. However, the roles of flat bands and Dirac bands played in determining the superconductivity remain elusive. Here, we focus on the alternating twisted quadralayer graphene to reveal unconventional superconducting behaviors. We disentangle Dirac bands and flat bands, revealing a Coulomb interaction-induced band broadening effect. We further quantify the electric-field-dependent evolution of the critical temperature and coherence length, and estimate the flat-band Fermi velocity and superfluid stiffness via critical current measurements. Our results demonstrate an electric-field–tunable coupling strength within the superconducting phase, revealing unconventional properties with vanishing Fermi velocity and large superfluid stiffness. Combined with our theoretical analysis, these observations support a picture in which displacement-field-driven hybridization between flat and Dirac-like bands enhances the quantum-metric contribution to superconductivity, offering new insight into multiband flat-band superconductivity in moiré systems.
title_zh: 莫尔平带超导体中的电场可调耦合强度和量子度量热点
abstract_zh: 交替扭曲的多层石墨烯呈现出一种引人注目的多带系统，狄拉克带和平带共存，用于探索超导性。然而，平带和狄拉克带在确定超导性中所起的作用仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们重点关注交替扭曲的四层石墨烯，以揭示非常规的超导行为。我们解开了狄拉克能带和平带，揭示了库仑相互作用引起的能带展宽效应。我们进一步量化了临界温度和相干长度的电场相关演化，并通过临界电流测量来估计平带费米速度和超流体刚度。我们的结果证明了超导相内的电场可调耦合强度，揭示了费米速度消失和大超流体刚度的非常规特性。结合我们的理论分析，这些观察结果支持这样一种观点：平带和类狄拉克带之间的位移场驱动的杂化增强了对超导性的量子度量贡献，为莫尔系统中的多带平带超导性提供了新的见解。

title: A high-dexterity soft neuroprosthetic hand for daily activities
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Robotic prostheses are the primary replacement for upper-limb amputees’ lost hands. Although various neuroprosthetic hands have been developed, featuring both rigid and soft mechanisms, they typically offer grasping-oriented functionality with fewer degrees of freedom (DOFs, ≤6). Herein, we report a dexterous soft neuroprosthetic hand with 11 active DOFs that restores common grasping and fine manipulation, validated by four amputee subjects (aged 38–70 years, male and female). The neuroprosthetic hand integrates soft fingers with thumb-palm articulations for dexterity and adaptivity via a 2-channel myoelectric interface with amplitude-speed decoding, enabling amputees to outperform current prostheses in standardized tests and maintain control robustness. Furthermore, the neuroprosthetic hand improves amputees’ participation in daily activities and interactions, such as hair braiding, pill taking, scissor manipulation, car steering, and continuous bulb screwing, while reducing compensatory body movements. These results demonstrate that the high-dexterity soft-robotic hand enhances both prosthesis versatility and compliant interaction.
title_zh: 用于日常活动的高灵活性软神经假手
abstract_zh: 机器人假肢是上肢截肢者失去双手的主要替代品。尽管已经开发了各种具有刚性和软机构的神经假手，但它们通常提供以抓取为导向的功能，但自由度较少（DOF，≤6）。在此，我们报告了一种灵巧的软神经假手，具有 11 个主动自由度，可以恢复常见的抓握和精细操作，并经过四名截肢受试者（年龄 38-70 岁，男性和女性）的验证。神经假手通过具有幅度速度解码功能的 2 通道肌电接口将柔软的手指与拇指手掌关节集成在一起，以实现灵活性和适应性，使截肢者能够在标准化测试中超越当前的假肢，并保持控制的鲁棒性。此外，神经假手还可以改善截肢者对日常活动和互动的参与，例如编发、服药、剪刀操作、汽车转向和连续拧紧灯泡，同时减少代偿性身体运动。这些结果表明，高灵活性软机器人手增强了假肢的多功能性和顺应性交互。

title: Single twistable tendon-driven continuum robots
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Tendon-driven continuum robots with spatial manipulability face fundamental challenges in miniaturization, stemming from the space required to accommodate multiple actuation tendons. Conventional multi-tendon designs create an inherent trade-off between miniaturization, 3D manipulability, and force output. Here, we introduce a class of continuum robots that achieves controllable body twist and full omnidirectional motion driven by pushing, pulling, and twisting a single tendon, breaking this long-standing design constraint. The resulting robot features an outer diameter of 2.0-3.5 mm and a circumferential hollow ratio exceeding 57%, nearly doubling spatial utilization efficiency over multi-tendon designs. Compared to conventional mechanisms, manipulability improves by over 1000-fold while retaining at least 70% of tip force across all directions. We derive the kinematics for this robot class and provide an open-source simulator. We demonstrate capabilities in teleoperation, navigation in tortuous environments, chopstick-like continuum grippers for in-gripper manipulation, and potential medical applications. Our design redefines actuation paradigms for tendon-driven continuum robots.
title_zh: 单扭腱驱动连续体机器人
abstract_zh: 具有空间可操纵性的肌腱驱动连续体机器人在小型化方面面临着根本性挑战，这源于容纳多个驱动肌腱所需的空间。传统的多腱设计在小型化、3D 可操作性和力输出之间建立了固有的权衡。在这里，我们介绍一类连续体机器人，它通过推、拉和扭转单个肌腱来实现可控的身体扭转和全向运动，打破了这一长期存在的设计限制。由此产生的机器人外径为2.0-3.5毫米，圆周空心率超过57%，空间利用效率比多筋设计提高了近一倍。与传统机构相比，可操纵性提高了 1000 倍以上，同时在所有方向上保留至少 70% 的尖端力。我们推导了该机器人类的运动学并提供了一个开源模拟器。我们展示了远程操作、曲折环境中的导航、用于夹钳内操作的筷子式连续夹钳以及潜在的医疗应用的能力。我们的设计重新定义了肌腱驱动连续体机器人的驱动范例。

title: Ridge catalysis unlocking water oxidation activity of pentlandite
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The ridge at the intersection of two adjacent non-equivalent facets of single crystalline particles holds great potential to harmonize catalytic activity and durability. However, conventional facet engineering usually yields crystals with sparse ridges, impeding ridge catalysis. Here, we implement a programmed growth strategy via a decomposable evaporative eutectic system, enabling alternating BFDH-driven -preferential growth and Wulff-guided -preferential growth in pentlandite to produce dense ridges between {111} and {200} facets. The facet-dependent surface reconstruction induces the selective formation of NiOOH and (Fe,Ni)OOH on the {111} and {200} facets, respectively, to create highly active NiOOH/(Fe,Ni)OOH interfacial sites precisely at their ridges, which overcomes the Fe/Ni-equivalent homogeneity constraints of pentlandite to unlock its activities in oxygen evolution reaction (186 mV at 10 mA cm−2 and >1000 h stability at 100 mA cm−2). In an anion-exchange membrane water electrolyzer, such pentlandite microcrystals deliver the current density of 1.0 A cm−2 at 1.95 V with 160 h stability at 500 mA cm−2. This work establishes ridge engineering as a paradigm for stable, high-activity catalysts.
title_zh: 岭催化解锁镍黄铁矿的水氧化活性
abstract_zh: 单晶颗粒两个相邻非等价面交叉处的脊具有协调催化活性和耐久性的巨大潜力。然而，传统的晶面工程通常会产生具有稀疏脊的晶体，阻碍脊催化。在这里，我们通过可分解的蒸发共晶系统实施程序化生长策略，从而能够交替进行 BFDH 驱动的择优生长和 Wulff 引导的镍黄铁矿择优生长，从而在 {111} 和 {200} 面之间产生致密的脊。依赖于小面的表面重建分别诱导在{111}和{200}面上选择性地形成NiOOH和(Fe,Ni)OOH，从而在其脊处精确地形成高活性的NiOOH/(Fe,Ni)OOH界面位点，这克服了镍黄铁矿的Fe/Ni等效均质性限制，从而解锁了其在析氧反应中的活性（10 mA cm−2时为186 mV， 100 mA cm−2 时>1000 小时稳定性）。在阴离子交换膜水电解槽中，这种镍黄铁矿微晶可在 1.95 V 电压下提供 1.0 A cm−2 的电流密度，并在 500 mA cm−2 电流下保持 160 小时的稳定性。这项工作将脊工程确立为稳定、高活性催化剂的范例。

title: Dual-interface stabilization of low-iridium anodes for durable proton exchange membrane water electrolysis
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The durability and cost of iridium-based anodes remain key challenges for high-current density operation of proton exchange membrane water electrolyzers. Here, we report a dual-interface stabilization strategy based on atomic layer deposition of TiO2 onto IrO2 catalysts. The resulting anodes sustain operation at 3.0 A cm−2 for 2600 h with near-zero voltage degradation at an iridium loading of 0.4 mg cm−2, whereas bare IrO2 exhibits continuous voltage decay over 1000 h at a rate of 31.5 mV kh−1. Combined experimental characterization and theoretical calculations reveal that interfacial Ti-O-Ir coupling suppresses Ir over-oxidation and dissolution, while the TiO2-coated surface strengthens ionomer-catalyst interactions and preserves mass-transport pathways during prolonged operation. This strategy is fully compatible with roll-to-roll manufacturing, enabling industrially scalable implementation. This interfacial engineering approach offers a generalizable design principle for extending electrolyzer lifetime and reducing precious-metal loading across diverse electrochemical energy conversion technologies.
title_zh: 低铱阳极的双界面稳定，用于耐用的质子交换膜水电解
abstract_zh: 铱基阳极的耐用性和成本仍然是质子交换膜水电解槽高电流密度运行的关键挑战。在这里，我们报告了一种基于 TiO2 原子层沉积到 IrO2 催化剂上的双界面稳定策略。由此产生的阳极可在 3.0 A cm−2 下维持运行 2600 小时，在铱负载量为 0.4 mg cm−2 时电压衰减接近于零，而裸 IrO2 则以 31.5 mV kh−1 的速率在 1000 小时内呈现连续电压衰减。综合实验表征和理论计算表明，界面 Ti-O-Ir 耦合抑制了 Ir 的过度氧化和溶解，而 TiO2 涂层表面增强了离聚物与催化剂的相互作用，并在长时间运行过程中保留了传质路径。该策略与卷对卷制造完全兼容，可实现工业规模化实施。这种界面工程方法提供了一种通用的设计原理，可延长电解槽的使用寿命并减少各种电化学能量转换技术中的贵金属负载。

title: Dielectric-dependent hybrid functional based on meta-GGA
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Semilocal density functionals such as the Perdew-Burke-Ernzerhof (PBE) functional substantially underestimate experimental band gaps. Hybrid functionals address this band gap problem by admixing a fraction of Fock exchange to semilocal exchange. The optimal mixing parameter depends on the specific material and can be identified as the inverse dielectric constant (dielectric-dependent hybrid functional, DDH). Here, we show that dielectric constants obtained using the r2SCAN meta-GGA functional are significantly more accurate than dielectric constants obtained using the semilocal PBE functional. We propose the DD-r2SCANH functional, a dielectric-dependent hybrid functional based on r2SCAN. DD-r2SCANH can outperform the standard PBE-based DDH in terms of band gaps and other electronic structure properties. Particularly marked improvements are obtained for narrow-gap semiconductors such as Ge and InAs, where PBE wrongly predicts a metallic phase, but r2SCAN opens a band gap.
title_zh: 基于meta-GGA的介电相关混合泛函
abstract_zh: 半局域密度泛函，例如 Perdew-Burke-Ernzerhof (PBE) 泛函，大大低估了实验带隙。混合泛函通过将 Fock 交换的一部分与半局部交换混合来解决这个带隙问题。最佳混合参数取决于具体材料，并且可以被识别为反介电常数（介电相关混合泛函，DDH）。在这里，我们证明使用 r2SCAN meta-GGA 泛函获得的介电常数明显比使用半局部 PBE 泛函获得的介电常数更准确。我们提出了 DD-r2SCANH 泛函，这是一种基于 r2SCAN 的介电相关混合泛函。 DD-r2SCANH 在带隙和其他电子结构特性方面优于基于 PBE 的标准 DDH。 Ge 和 InAs 等窄带隙半导体取得了特别显着的改进，其中 PBE 错误地预测了金属相，但 r2SCAN 打开了带隙。

title: Proton shuttling at electrochemical interfaces under alkaline hydrogen evolution
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Electrochemical water splitting is a promising method for sustainable hydrogen production, with alkaline electrolysis being a mature and cost-effective option for large-scale use. However, the hydrogen evolution reaction proceeds slowly in alkaline media, and its mechanism remains less understood than in acidic conditions. In particular, the role of alkali metal cations in water dissociation is unclear, despite their influence on hydrogen-bond structures of water. To investigate this, surface-sensitive terahertz spectroscopy is required for observing hydrogen-bond dynamics. Here, we show that interfacial water dynamics during hydrogen evolution reaction can be detected using surface-enhanced Raman scattering combined with vibrational analysis in a density-of-states format. Evidence from a KOH/Au interface shows that proton shuttling is facilitated by the constrained translational and rotational motion of water molecules around K⁺ ions. These findings provide molecular-level insights that could guide the design of more efficient alkaline electrolysis systems.
title_zh: 碱性析氢条件下电化学界面的质子穿梭
abstract_zh: 电化学水分解是一种有前途的可持续制氢方法，而碱性电解是大规模使用的成熟且经济高效的选择。然而，析氢反应在碱性介质中进行缓慢，其机理仍比在酸性条件下了解得少。特别是，碱金属阳离子在水离解中的作用尚不清楚，尽管它们对水的氢键结构有影响。为了研究这一点，需要表面敏感的太赫兹光谱来观察氢键动力学。在这里，我们表明，可以使用表面增强拉曼散射结合状态密度格式的振动分析来检测析氢反应期间的界面水动力学。来自 KOH/Au 界面的证据表明，K+ 离子周围水分子的受限平移和旋转运动促进了质子穿梭。这些发现提供了分子水平的见解，可以指导更高效的碱性电解系统的设计。

title: A multi-fidelity tabular prior-data fitted network model for accurate prediction and uncertainty quantification
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Accurate prediction of unknown labels from feature-label datasets using machine learning is critical for applications spanning drug discovery, disease diagnostics, and climate science. However, challenges persist with limited data, high-dimensional inputs, and multi-fidelity scenarios. We developed multi-fidelity tabular prior-data fitted network (MFTabPFN), a general-purpose multi-fidelity model integrating low- and high-fidelity data through a hierarchical transformer architecture to enhance prediction accuracy and uncertainty quantification (UQ). MFTabPFN captures cross-fidelity correlations while seamlessly adapting to single-fidelity data. An active learning framework further enhances scalability by prioritizing high-value data for model refinement, minimizing resource demands in resource-intensive tasks. Evaluated on various tasks such as forest fire burned area prediction, wine quality assessment, and computational fluid dynamics, MFTabPFN outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving varying degrees of prediction accuracy improvement. Its versatility and robust prediction and UQ capabilities across single- and multi-fidelity datasets position MFTabPFN as a promising tool for data-driven discovery in diverse applications.
title_zh: 用于准确预测和不确定性量化的多保真表格先验数据拟合网络模型
abstract_zh: 使用机器学习从特征标签数据集中准确预测未知标签对于药物发现、疾病诊断和气候科学等应用至关重要。然而，有限的数据、高维输入和多保真度场景仍然存在挑战。我们开发了多保真表格先验数据拟合网络（MFTabPFN），这是一种通用多保真模型，通过分层变压器架构集成低保真度和高保真度数据，以提高预测精度和不确定性量化（UQ）。 MFTabPFN 捕获交叉保真度相关性，同时无缝适应单保真度数据。主动学习框架通过优先考虑高价值数据进行模型细化，进一步增强可扩展性，最大限度地减少资源密集型任务中的资源需求。在森林火灾烧毁面积预测、葡萄酒质量评估和计算流体动力学等各种任务上进行评估，MFTabPFN 的性能优于最先进的方法，实现了不同程度的预测精度提高。其跨单保真度和多保真度数据集的多功能性、强大的预测和 UQ 功能使 MFTabPFN 成为各种应用中数据驱动发现的有前景的工具。

title: Quantum interference in a twisted high-Tc SQUID senses emergent interfacial order
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Engineering artificial systems by twisting van der Waals materials provides an excellent platform for exploring emergent quantum phenomena. Recent advances in fabrication enable studies of interfacial superconductivity in twisted cuprates. In our work, we fabricate superconducting quantum interference devices (SQUID) that utilize the twisted interface of Bi2Sr2CaCu2O8+δ, a high-Tc cuprate superconductor. By measuring the magnetic field modulation of differential resistance, we find a π phase difference between the two Josephson junction arms of the SQUID reflecting chiral time-reversal symmetry-broken superconducting order – a crucial aspect inaccessible to single Josephson junction. Our observations also indicate co-tunneling of the Cooper pairs. Additionally, these SQUIDs are well-suited for use as state-of-the-art flux sensors near 77 K. Stabilizing superconducting orders using twisted interfaces and probing them via quantum interference opens avenues for understanding unconventional superconductors. Our architecture can probe charge transport and superconducting order symmetry at interfaces in other systems, demonstrating broad applicability beyond cuprates.
title_zh: 扭曲高温 SQUID 中的量子干涉感知紧急界面秩序
abstract_zh: 通过扭曲范德华材料来工程人造系统为探索涌现的量子现象提供了一个极好的平台。制造方面的最新进展使得能够研究扭曲铜酸盐的界面超导性。在我们的工作中，我们利用高 Tc 铜酸盐超导体 Bi2Sr2CaCu2O8+δ 的扭曲界面制造了超导量子干涉器件 (SQUID)。通过测量差分电阻的磁场调制，我们发现 SQUID 的两个约瑟夫森结臂之间的 π 相位差反映了手性时间反转对称性破缺的超导序——这是单个约瑟夫森结无法达到的关键方面。我们的观察还表明库珀对的共隧道效应。此外，这些 SQUID 非常适合用作 77 K 附近最先进的通量传感器。使用扭曲界面稳定超导秩序并通过量子干涉探测它们，为理解非常规超导体开辟了途径。我们的架构可以探测其他系统界面处的电荷传输和超导有序对称性，展示了铜酸盐之外的广泛适用性。

title: Twist-angle-controlled anomalous gating in bilayer graphene/BN heterostructures
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Anomalous gating effects—such as ineffective electrostatic control and strong hysteresis in resistance—have been observed in graphene-based systems encapsulated in boron nitride (BN) and linked to a possible ferroelectric state. However, their origin, stability and reproducibility remain under debate. Here we show, using dual-gated, dynamically rotatable van der Waals heterostructures based on bilayer graphene encapsulated in BN, that the angular alignment between the two BN layers—rather than the presence of a moiré superlattice with graphene—is the key parameter governing these effects. The relevant alignment between the two BN layers, to observe the anomalous gating effect at room temperature, lies between approximately 15° and 45°, with no evidence of the expected 60° periodicity. Both gate ineffectiveness and hysteresis are highly sensitive to small angular changes, which we classify into three distinct regimes. Our results clarify the conditions necessary to reproduce these phenomena and pave the way for theoretical investigation of their microscopic origins.
title_zh: 双层石墨烯/BN异质结构中扭转角控制的反常门控
abstract_zh: 在封装在氮化硼 (BN) 中的基于石墨烯的系统中观察到异常选通效应，例如无效的静电控制和强的电阻滞后，并与可能的铁电态相关。然而，它们的起源、稳定性和再现性仍然存在争议。在这里，我们使用基于 BN 中封装的双层石墨烯的双门动态旋转范德华异质结构证明，两个 BN 层之间的角度对齐（而不是石墨烯莫尔超晶格的存在）是控制这些效应的关键参数。为了观察室温下的反常选通效应，两个 BN 层之间的相关排列位于大约 15° 和 45° 之间，没有证据表明预期的 60° 周期性。栅极无效和滞后都对小角度变化高度敏感，我们将其分为三种不同的状态。我们的结果阐明了重现这些现象所需的条件，并为其微观起源的理论研究铺平了道路。

title: NIR-II photothermal-driven pulsatile PTH release for osteoporotic bone repair
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Integrating light-controlled intelligent materials into 3D printing technology holds great promise for bone tissue engineering, enabling spatiotemporal control over in situ drug dosing. However, this integration faces a critical molecular design challenge, as incorporated photoresponsive molecules must simultaneously fulfill the dual demands of high UV-stability during UV-mediated photopolymerization, and strong long-wavelength absorption for deep-tissue activation. Here, we report a wavelength-selective quinolinium dye (QC7CN) as photoresponsive ‘dye ink’ for addressing this dilemma. This dye features high UV-transparency that ensures stability during printing process, while possessing robust second near infrared (NIR-II) absorbance for deep-seated photothermal responsiveness. Leveraging these properties, we engineer a NIR-II light-controlled 3D-printed scaffold, composed of methacryloylated gelatin and calcium phosphate oligomers as printing matrix, thermosensitive phase-transformable microspheres as parathyroid hormone (PTH) drug carrier, and QC7CN as photothermal trigger. Upon NIR-II laser irradiation, QC7CN induces localized mild hyperthermia to drive gel-sol phase transition of microspheres, thereby manipulating pulsatile PTH release for deep-tissue osteoporotic bone repair. As such, our study provides a full demonstration in molecular design and additive manufacturing to push the limits of intelligent materials in precision medicine.
title_zh: NIR-II 光热驱动脉冲 PTH 释放用于骨质疏松骨修复
abstract_zh: 将光控智能材料集成到 3D 打印技术中，为骨组织工程带来了巨大的希望，可以实现原位药物剂量的时空控制。然而，这种集成面临着关键的分子设计挑战，因为合并的光响应分子必须同时满足紫外线介导的光聚合期间的高紫外线稳定性和深层组织激活的强长波长吸收的双重要求。在这里，我们报告了一种波长选择性喹啉鎓染料（QC7CN）作为光响应“染料墨水”来解决这一困境。该染料具有高紫外线透明度，可确保打印过程中的稳定性，同时具有强大的第二近红外 (NIR-II) 吸光度，可实现深层光热响应。利用这些特性，我们设计了一种 NIR-II 光控 3D 打印支架，由甲基丙烯酰化明胶和磷酸钙低聚物作为打印基质，热敏相变微球作为甲状旁腺激素 (PTH) 药物载体，QC7CN 作为光热触发器组成。在 NIR-II 激光照射下，QC7CN 诱导局部温和热疗，驱动微球的凝胶-溶胶相变，从而操纵脉动 PTH 释放，实现深部组织骨质疏松骨修复。因此，我们的研究为分子设计和增材制造提供了充分的论证，以突破智能材料在精准医学中的极限。

title: Germanium ligand redox cooperativity: A key to ambiphilicity and switchable two- and four-electron transfer
source: Chem
abstract: This work shows that a main-group compound can be designed to engage in multielectron transfer chemistry often associated with transition metals. By pairing germanium with a redox-active ligand, the molecule can direct either two- or four-electron pathways and display both electron-donating and electron-accepting behavior at one site. This design offers a simple principle for building more versatile, earth-abundant systems for oxygen activation and related transformations in main-group chemistry.
title_zh: 锗配体氧化还原协同性：两亲性和可切换的二电子和四电子转移的关键
abstract_zh: 这项工作表明，可以设计主族化合物来参与通常与过渡金属相关的多电子转移化学。通过将锗与氧化还原活性配体配对，该分子可以引导二电子或四电子路径，并在一个位点表现出电子供体和电子接受行为。该设计提供了一个简单的原理，用于构建更通用、地球资源丰富的系统，用于主族化学中的氧活化和相关转化。

title: Multimodal scanning-probe quantum sensing of quantum materials
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Spin-defect-based quantum microscopy has recently made transformative advances in cutting-edge scientific research and technological innovation. The high sensitivity, high spatial resolution and excellent measurement modalities of quantum spin defects open up a range of opportunities at the forefront of condensed-matter physics research. Many of the advantages of this approach result from the quantum mechanical nature of the sensors, which offer functionalities that are not available with their classical counterparts. In this Review, we provide an overview of progress on scanning-probe nitrogen-vacancy quantum sensing research and its application to investigating the physics of emergent quantum materials with nanoscale spatial resolution. We also discuss quantum sensing platforms built on more recently discovered spin defects in one-dimensional and two-dimensional materials beyond nitrogen-vacancy centres. We conclude with an outlook on future directions and opportunities for these rapidly advancing quantum sensing technologies.
title_zh: 量子材料的多模态扫描探针量子传感
abstract_zh: 基于自旋缺陷的量子显微镜最近在尖端科学研究和技术创新方面取得了革命性的进展。量子自旋缺陷的高灵敏度、高空间分辨率和出色的测量方式为凝聚态物理研究的前沿开辟了一系列机会。这种方法的许多优点源于传感器的量子力学性质，它提供了传统传感器所不具备的功能。在这篇综述中，我们概述了扫描探针氮空位量子传感研究的进展及其在研究具有纳米级空间分辨率的新兴量子材料物理方面的应用。我们还讨论了基于最近发现的氮空位中心之外的一维和二维材料中的自旋缺陷构建的量子传感平台。最后，我们对这些快速发展的量子传感技术的未来方向和机遇进行了展望。

title: Stepping ahead toward custom-designed autonomous motor proteins
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: An artificial protein walker ‘Tumbleweed’ demonstrates ligand-driven stepping on DNA tracks, marking a key advance toward modular, custom-designed autonomous motor proteins.
title_zh: 朝着定制设计的自主运动蛋白迈进
abstract_zh: 人工蛋白质行走器“Tumbleweed”展示了配体驱动的 DNA 轨迹行走，标志着模块化、定制设计的自主运动蛋白质的关键进步。

title: Clocked stepping of an artificial protein walker along a DNA track
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Molecular motors are fundamental to life because they transduce free energy into mechanical work, a capability rooted in the chemical and structural complexity of their constituent proteins. Although motors based on small molecules and DNA have been developed, the creation of an artificial protein motor has remained an elusive goal in synthetic biology. Here we report the realization of an artificial, externally controlled protein motor, termed Tumbleweed (TW). TW was engineered using a modular design strategy that combines proteins with well-characterized properties to produce emergent motor function and directionality. TW comprises three ‘legs’, each containing a ligand-gated DNA-binding domain that enables selective interaction with specific sites along a DNA track. Using single-molecule fluorescence assays in conjunction with a programmable microfluidic device, we show that TW takes directional 16 nm steps along a designed DNA substrate in response to a defined sequence of ligand inputs. Moreover, both the timing and direction of stepping can be precisely controlled on a timescale of seconds. This approach provides a versatile platform for engineering dynamic and sophisticated protein-based nanomachines, as well as for probing the physical principles governing protein walkers with precisely defined architectures.
title_zh: 人工蛋白质行走器沿着 DNA 轨道进行计时步进
abstract_zh: 分子马达是生命的基础，因为它们将自由能转化为机械功，这种能力植根于其组成蛋白质的化学和结构复杂性。尽管基于小分子和DNA的马达已经被开发出来，但人工蛋白质马达的创造仍然是合成生物学中一个难以捉摸的目标。在这里，我们报告了一种人工的、外部控制的蛋白质马达的实现，称为风滚草（TW）。 TW 采用模块化设计策略进行设计，该策略将具有良好表征特性的蛋白质结合起来，以产生新兴的运动功能和方向性。 TW 由三个“腿”组成，每个腿都包含一个配体门控 DNA 结合域，能够与 DNA 轨道上的特定位点选择性相互作用。使用单分子荧光测定与可编程微流体装置相结合，我们表明 TW 沿着设计的 DNA 底物采取定向 16 nm 步长，以响应定义的配体输入序列。而且，迈步的时机和方向都可以在秒级的时间尺度上精确控制。这种方法提供了一个多功能平台，用于设计动态和复杂的基于蛋白质的纳米机器，以及探索具有精确定义的架构的蛋白质行走者的物理原理。

title: Spectral visualization of excitonic pair breaking at individual impurities in Ta2Pd3Te5
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Excitonic insulators host the condensates of bound electron–hole pairs, offering a platform for studying correlated bosonic quantum states and for next-generation device applications. However, how macroscopic coherence emerges from locally collapsed pairing remains elusive. Here, using scanning tunnelling spectroscopy, we report the impurity-induced pair breaking in the excitonic insulator Ta2Pd3Te5. Individual Te vacancies generate a pair of spectral peaks within the excitonic gap. Their energies depend sensitively on the defect configurations and are continuously tunable using tip electric field, indicating controllable impurity scatterings. Spectral mapping shows spatially anisotropic and electronically coupled electron–hole components of the subgap states. These observations, together with mean-field modelling, suggest an excitonic pair-breaking origin. In the strongly electron–hole-imbalanced region, a secondary pair-breaking effect, manifesting an additional pair of subgap states with distinctly lower energies, emerges and displays the interplay of pairing breakings with different excitonic order parameters. Our findings demonstrate the spectroscopic fingerprint of local excitonic depairing at the atomic level, offering a crucial clue to the critical behaviour across excitonic condensation.
title_zh: Ta2Pd3Te5 中单个杂质激子对断裂的光谱可视化
abstract_zh: 激子绝缘体承载束缚电子空穴对的凝聚体，为研究相关玻色子量子态和下一代器件应用提供了平台。然而，宏观一致性如何从局部崩溃的配对中出现仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们使用扫描隧道光谱，报告了激子绝缘体 Ta2Pd3Te5 中杂质引起的电子对断裂。单个 Te 空位在激子间隙内产生一对光谱峰。它们的能量敏感地取决于缺陷配置，并且可以使用尖端电场连续可调，表明杂质散射是可控的。谱图显示了亚能隙态的空间各向异性和电子耦合电子空穴分量。这些观察结果与平均场模型一起表明了激子对断裂的起源。在强电子-空穴不平衡区域中，出现了二次配对断裂效应，表现为一对能量明显较低的额外的亚带隙态，并显示出配对断裂与不同激子级数参数的相互作用。我们的研究结果证明了原子水平上局部激子脱配对的光谱指纹，为激子凝聚的关键行为提供了重要线索。

title: Catecholamine modulation of frontal cortical ignition during wakefulness, sleep, and anesthesia
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Conscious awareness—diminished during non-rapid-eye-movement (NREM) sleep and general anesthesia—is prevalent during wakefulness, but the underlying mechanism remains poorly understood. Here we show that activity of catecholamine neurons, known to be higher during wakefulness than NREM sleep, enhances cortical ignition, a process closely associated with conscious awareness. Chemogenetic activation and inactivation of catecholamine neurons, particularly dopaminergic neurons in the ventral tegmental area (VTA), respectively increased and decreased the amplitude of anterior cingulate area (ACA) excitation evoked by visual cortex (V1) stimulation. Ketamine and isoflurane, two commonly used general anesthetics, greatly reduced V1-to-ACA activity propagation. In addition to suppressing ongoing cortical activity, these general anesthetics significantly reduced the activity of VTA dopaminergic and basal forebrain (BF) cholinergic neurons, with dopaminergic activity dropping well below its level during NREM sleep. The strong inhibition of frontal cortical activity evoked by V1 stimulation, prominent during NREM sleep, was also absent under ketamine and isoflurane anesthesia. These results indicate that general anesthesia and NREM sleep suppress global ignition through overlapping but non-identical mechanisms.
title_zh: 儿茶酚胺对清醒、睡眠和麻醉期间额叶皮质点火的调节
abstract_zh: 在非快速眼动 (NREM) 睡眠和全身麻醉期间，清醒意识普遍存在，但其潜在机制仍知之甚少。在这里，我们发现儿茶酚胺神经元的活动（已知在清醒状态下比非快速眼动睡眠时更高）增强了皮质点火，这是一个与意识意识密切相关的过程。儿茶酚胺神经元，特别是腹侧被盖区（VTA）中的多巴胺能神经元的化学遗传学激活和失活分别增加和减少了视觉皮层（V1）刺激引起的前扣带区（ACA）兴奋的幅度。氯胺酮和异氟烷是两种常用的全身麻醉剂，可大大降低 V1 至 ACA 活性的传播。除了抑制正在进行的皮质活动外，这些全身麻醉药还显着降低了 VTA 多巴胺能和基底前脑 (BF) 胆碱能神经元的活性，其中多巴胺能活性降至远低于 NREM 睡眠期间的水平。 V1 刺激引起的额叶皮层活动的强烈抑制在 NREM 睡眠期间很明显，但在氯胺酮和异氟烷麻醉下也不存在。这些结果表明全身麻醉和 NREM 睡眠通过重叠但不相同的机制抑制全局点火。
