                    近断层强震、大地测量和远震数据联合反演的 7.7 缅甸地震。破裂始于震中附近高达约 5 m 的显着滑移。局部断层几何复杂性和应力不均匀性可能导致小规模滑移分段和间歇性超剪切破裂。向北的破裂传播总体上是亚剪切的，并在 2012 年地震的部分应力阴影内延伸约 80 公里后迅速终止。相比之下，向南破裂传播约380公里，完全穿越了自1839年以来一直未破裂的预定地震间隙，并经历了加速和减速循环，其中包括至少两次间歇性超剪切破裂，然后在穿越1930年破裂的区段后逐渐停止。超过3 m的滑移仅限于15 km锁定深度以上的浅断层，平均静态应力降为4.7 MPa。实皆断层中部多个凹凸不平处的长期应力积累促进了离散事件中的局部破裂，但有时会导致具有间歇性超剪切行为的级联破裂，如2025年。局部滑动持续时间也表现出南北不对称性，在震中附近较长，在结束前向南逐渐缩短。这种模式可能与震中附近较低的刚性和破裂动力学的调节有关

title: Fracture-driven weakening amplifies projected ice loss from West Antarctica
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Ice shelves buttress the flow of the Antarctic ice sheet, but this stabilizing effect weakens as fractures form, reducing ice viscosity and accelerating ice discharge toward the ocean. Here, we incorporate physically consistent damage mechanics into an ice-sheet model and apply it across the Amundsen Sea Embayment, the largest current contributor to Antarctic mass loss. Simulations reproduce key satellite-derived damage patterns under present-day conditions. Projections to 2300 show that allowing damage to evolve strongly amplifies future ice loss, increasing sea-level contributions by up to a factor of
                    
                      
                        ∼
                      
                    
                    4.5. Even when damage is held fixed at its present-day extent, projected contributions increase by 50 to 130
                    
                      
                        %
                      
                    
                    , indicating that existing fractures already commit the system to enhanced ice loss. Basal crevasses dominate this response, accounting for
                    
                      
                        ∼
                      
                    
                    90% of damage-induced amplification. Healing mechanisms substantially moderate damage, as neglecting gravitational crevasse closure and compressive healing overestimates ice loss by almost 50%. Together, these results suggest that fracture-driven weakening substantially alters Antarctic ice-sheet dynamics and should be represented in projections of future sea-level rise.
title_zh: 裂缝驱动的减弱加剧了南极洲西部预计的冰损失
abstract_zh:
冰架支撑着南极冰盖的流动，但这种稳定作用会随着裂缝的形成而减弱，从而降低冰的粘度并加速冰向海洋的排放。在这里，我们将物理上一致的损伤力学纳入冰盖模型中，并将其应用于阿蒙森海海湾，这是目前南极质量损失的最大贡献者。模拟再现了当今条件下由卫星产生的关键损伤模式。到 2300 年的预测表明，允许损害不断发展会极大地加剧未来的冰损失，使海平面的贡献增加高达 1 倍
                    
                      
                        ～
                      
                    
                    4.5.即使损害维持在目前的程度，预计贡献也会增加 50 至 130
                    
                      
                        %
                      
                    
                    ，表明现有裂缝已经导致系统冰损失加剧。基底裂缝主导了这种反应，解释了
                    
                      
                        ～
                      
                    
                    90% 的伤害引起放大。愈合机制大大减轻了损害，因为忽略重力裂缝闭合和压缩愈合会高估冰损失近 50%。总之，这些结果表明，裂缝驱动的减弱极大地改变了南极冰盖的动态，应该在项目中体现出来。

title: Spatial transcriptomic mapping of postnatal mouse uterine development
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Postnatal uterine development requires precise coordination of epithelial differentiation, gland formation, and stromal organization, yet how transcriptional programs are spatially integrated during this process remains poorly understood. Here, we generated a spatially resolved transcriptomic map of the mouse uterus across key postnatal stages from day 3 to day 21 by combining high resolution in situ transcriptomics with histology, proteomics, genetic models, and functional assays. This approach defines the temporal emergence and spatial arrangement of all major uterine cell types and demonstrates that endometrial glands arise from luminal epithelium through progressive transcriptional reprogramming rather than from a prespecified progenitor population. Spatial analysis reveals marked compartmentalization of signaling pathways during adenogenesis. Luminal epithelium is enriched for Wnt ligands and hormone receptors, whereas glandular epithelium engages inhibitory and negative feedback programs that constrain Wnt activity while supporting proliferation and differentiation. Functional genetic studies establish that epithelial canonical Wnt signaling is essential for prepubertal gland establishment and long-term epithelial maintenance but is dispensable for postpartum gland regeneration. Retinoic acid synthesis becomes increasingly concentrated within glands, while hedgehog signaling polarizes into an epithelial to stromal axis during gland morphogenesis. Additional pathways including RTK, Notch, TGFβ, BMP, hypoxia, Hippo, and PI3K-mTOR exhibit distinct spatial biases that collectively shape epithelial identity and tissue maturation. Together, these findings provide a comprehensive spatial framework for uterine gland development and reveal how compartment specific signaling networks coordinate postnatal uterine morphogenesis.
title_zh: 小鼠出生后子宫发育的空间转录组图谱
abstract_zh: 出生后子宫发育需要上皮分化、腺体形成和基质组织的精确协调，但在此过程中转录程序如何在空间上整合仍知之甚少。在这里，我们通过将高分辨率原位转录组学与组织学、蛋白质组学、遗传模型和功能测定相结合，生成了从出生后第 3 天到第 21 天的小鼠子宫的空间分辨转录组图。这种方法定义了所有主要子宫细胞类型的时间出现和空间排列，并证明子宫内膜腺体是通过渐进转录重编程从管腔上皮产生的，而不是从预先指定的祖细胞群产生的。空间分析揭示了腺发生过程中信号通路的明显区隔。管腔上皮富含 Wnt 配体和激素受体，而腺上皮参与抑制和负反馈程序，限制 Wnt 活性，同时支持增殖和分化。功能遗传学研究表明，上皮经典 Wnt 信号传导对于青春期前腺体的建立和长期上皮维持至关重要，但对于产后腺体再生来说是可有可无的。视黄酸合成越来越集中在腺体内，而刺猬信号在腺体形态发生过程中极化为上皮至基质轴。其他通路包括 RTK、Notch、TGFβ、BMP、缺氧、Hippo 和 PI3K-mTOR 表现出明显的空间偏差，

title: Identification and distribution of a downregulatory signaling alkyloxazole in Streptomyces
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Streptomyces
                    
                    use small molecules to dictate morphological development and secondary metabolism. Most of these signaling compounds are inducers derived from γ-butyrolactone (GBL)-synthesizing enzymes. As such, biosynthetically distinct and downregulatory signaling molecules remain understudied in
                    
                      Streptomyces
                    
                    . Here, we report the identification of alkyloxaozle (AOX,
                    1
                    ), a downregulator of sporulation and antibiotic production in
                    
                      Streptomyces
                    
                    .
                    1
                    ’s structure features an oxazole head flanked by an alkyl tail synthesized by a nonribosomal peptide synthetase (NRPS) that has not been reported in
                    
                      Streptomyces
                    
                    signaling molecules. Functional studies found that
                    1
                    downregulated sporulation and secondary metabolism in several
                    
                      Streptomyces
                    
                    strains. Genome mining identified 45 homologous biosynthetic gene clusters (BGCs) only distributed in
                    
                      Streptomyces
                    
                    , underscoring the importance of AOXs to this productive genus. Altogether, this report presents a downregulatory class of signaling molecules that broadly affect
                    
                      Streptomyces
                    
                    and highlights their importance to the genus.

title: Feeding health inequality through platform-based food delivery in China
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: This study examines how the expansion of online food delivery platforms affects health inequality in China. Exploiting the staggered rollout of platforms across counties and nationally representative panel data from 2010 to 2022, we find that platform entry increases overweight among low-income individuals while reducing it among high-income individuals. This divergence operates through two channels: low-income users increase consumption of fried foods and reallocate time from cooking to sedentary leisure, whereas high-income users reduce intake of calorie-dense foods and increase physical activity. These behavioral changes accumulate into downstream health consequences affecting weight-related chronic diseases and children's overweight in low-income households. Equal access to digital convenience thus does not translate into equal health benefits, suggesting that technological diffusion may amplify health disparities.
title_zh: 中国通过基于平台的食品配送加剧健康不平等
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了在线食品配送平台的扩张如何影响中国的健康不平等。利用跨县平台的交错推出和 2010 年至 2022 年具有全国代表性的面板数据，我们发现低收入个人的超重增加了平台进入，而高收入个人的超重减少了。这种差异通过两个渠道发挥作用：低收入用户增加油炸食品的消费，并将时间从烹饪重新分配到久坐休闲，而高收入用户则减少高热量食物的摄入并增加体力活动。这些行为变化累积成下游健康后果，影响与体重相关的慢性疾病和低收入家庭儿童超重。因此，平等获得数字便利并不能转化为平等的健康福利，这表明技术传播可能会扩大健康差距。

title: Selective and direct hydrogen generation from mixed plastic waste via alkaline thermal treatment with inherent carbon storage
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The global accumulation of plastic waste has spurred extensive research into chemical recycling methods to mitigate environmental issues and convert waste into valuable resources. A major challenge in plastic recycling is the requirement for presorting, which complicates processing and increases costs. Here, we demonstrate alkaline thermal treatment (ATT) as a highly efficient strategy for directly converting mixed plastic waste, including polyethylene terephthalate (PET), polyethylene (PE), and polypropylene (PP), into clean hydrogen energy at low temperatures and atmospheric pressure. Unlike conventional gasification, NaOH-assisted ATT enables plastic decomposition at significantly lower temperatures while producing high-purity hydrogen and minimizing carbon emissions. A key advancement in this work is the oxidation pretreatment of PP and PE, which enhances their reactivity in ATT and allows efficient hydrogen generation even from typically resistant polyolefins. Through systematic optimization of the NaOH-to-plastic ratio and thermal oxidation conditions, hydrogen yields of 43.7, 51.9, and 30.2 mmol/g
                    plastic
                    were achieved for PET, PE, and PP, respectively. Furthermore, ATT efficiently converts both individual and mixed plastic waste without requiring extensive separation, demonstrating its commercial potential and scalability with real-world waste compositions. Overall, this study establishes ATT as a promising and sustainable solution for plastic waste management and clean energy production, providing an economically viable low-carbon pathway for hydrogen generation.
title_zh: 通过碱性热处理和固有的碳储存，从混合塑料废物中选择性直接产生氢气
abstract_zh:
全球塑料废物的积累促使人们对化学回收方法进行广泛研究，以减轻环境问题并将废物转化为宝贵的资源。塑料回收的一个主要挑战是需要进行预分类，这使加工变得复杂并增加了成本。在这里，我们展示了碱性热处理（ATT）作为一种高效策略，可在低温和常压下直接将混合塑料废物（包括聚对苯二甲酸乙二醇酯（PET）、聚乙烯（PE）和聚丙烯（PP））转化为清洁氢能。与传统气化不同，NaOH 辅助的 ATT 能够在显着降低的温度下分解塑料，同时产生高纯度氢气并最大限度地减少碳排放。这项工作的一个关键进展是 PP 和 PE 的氧化预处理，这增强了它们在 ATT 中的反应性，甚至可以从通常具有耐受性的聚烯烃中有效地产生氢气。通过系统优化 NaOH 与塑料的比例和热氧化条件，氢气产率为 43.7、51.9 和 30.2 mmol/g
                    塑料
                    分别针对 PET、PE 和 PP 实现了这一目标。此外，ATT 可以有效地转化单个和混合塑料废物，而无需进行广泛的分离，这证明了其商业潜力和现实世界废物成分的可扩展性。总体而言，这项研究将 ATT 确立为塑料废物管理和清洁能源生产的一种有前途且可持续的解决方案，提供了一种经济上可行的低能耗解决方案。

title: Histone chaperone HIRA regulates adiponectin expression and obesity-associated adipose expansion by facilitating Pol II pause release
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Adipose tissue is essential for maintaining glucose and lipid homeostasis in mammals. However, epigenomic mechanisms underlying adipose tissue function remain largely unclear. Here, we identify the histone chaperone HIRA as an epigenomic regulator of adipose tissue function. Adipose tissue-specific knockout of
                    Hira
                    in mice impairs insulin sensitivity and restrains adipose tissue expansion during high-fat diet-induced obesity. Mechanistically, HIRA is required for the expression of
                    Adipoq
                    , encoding the adipokine adiponectin, and lipid metabolism genes in adipose tissue. Genomic mapping reveals that HIRA binds to promoters and enhancers of
                    Adipoq
                    and lipid metabolism genes in adipocytes. Acute HIRA depletion using the dTAG system, followed by nascent RNA-Seq and ChIP-Seq, demonstrates that while HIRA is largely dispensable for enhancer activation and coactivator binding, it promotes transcription of target genes by facilitating RNA polymerase II pause release and subsequent elongation likely independently of H3.3 deposition. Our findings uncover a mechanism by which HIRA regulates transcription and establish HIRA’s critical role in insulin sensitivity and lipid metabolism, providing a potential therapeutic target for obesity and insulin resistance.
title_zh: 组蛋白伴侣 HIRA 通过促进 Pol II 暂停释放来调节脂联素表达和肥胖相关的脂肪扩张
abstract_zh:
脂肪组织对于维持哺乳动物的葡萄糖和脂质稳态至关重要。然而，脂肪组织功能背后的表观基因组机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们将组蛋白伴侣 HIRA 确定为脂肪组织功能的表观基因组调节剂。脂肪组织特异性敲除
                    希拉
                    在小鼠中，在高脂肪饮食引起的肥胖期间，它会损害胰岛素敏感性并抑制脂肪组织的扩张。从机制上讲，HIRA 是表达
                    脂肪酶
                    ，编码脂肪因子脂联素和脂肪组织中的脂质代谢基因。基因组作图表明 HIRA 与以下基因的启动子和增强子结合：
                    脂肪酶
                    和脂肪细胞中的脂质代谢基因。使用 dTAG 系统急性 HIRA 耗竭，然后进行新生的 RNA-Seq 和 ChIP-Seq，表明虽然 HIRA 对于增强子激活和共激活子结合来说在很大程度上是可有可无的，但它通过促进 RNA 聚合酶 II 暂停释放和随后的延伸（可能与 H3.3 沉积无关）来促进靶基因的转录。我们的研究结果揭示了 HIRA 调节转录的机制，并确立了 HIRA 在胰岛素敏感性和脂质代谢中的关键作用，为肥胖和胰岛素抵抗提供了潜在的治疗靶点。

source: Recent Articles in Phys. Rev. C
abstract: Author(s): Giorgio Almirante, Theodora Kaskitsi, and Michael UrbanThis work addresses the important issue of the determination of the superfluid neutron fraction in the inner crust of neutrons stars. Knowing this fraction is important to understand if the inner crust can provide enough angular momentum to drive observed pulsar glitches. The paper presents, for the first time, fully self-consistent Hartree-Fock-Bogoliubov calculations of the flow of superfluid neutrons through the periodic lattice of nuclear clusters, which show that the superfluid fraction can reach 90% and support a sufficient superfluid angular momentum reservoir to drive pulsar glitches.[Phys. abstract_zh: 作者：Thibault Damour、Tamanna Jain 和 Ulrich Sperhake 我们通过将数值相对论模拟的四个序列（固定能量和不同的撞击参数）与有效的单体分析描述进行比较，研究了两颗玻色子星的散射，同时考虑了引力效应（点质量和潮汐）和短程标量场……[Phys.莱特牧师。 137, 021401] 2026 年 7 月 6 日星期一发布

title: All-emission control in 2D-photonic crystal microlasers
source: Matter
title_zh: 二维光子晶体微型激光器的全发射控制

title: Thermally activated proton transfer enables air-processed perovskite solar cells approaching 27%
source: Joule
abstract: Making high-performance perovskite solar cells in ordinary air is difficult because moisture and heat disrupt film formation. Here, a small molecular additive guides crystal growth at the start and then stabilizes the material during annealing, enabling highly efficient devices made outside a glovebox. The work shows that additive design can control both processing and stability at once, offering a practical path toward lower-cost, scalable perovskite solar manufacturing.
title_zh: 热激活质子转移使空气处理钙钛矿太阳能电池的效率接近 27%
abstract_zh: 在普通空气中制造高性能钙钛矿太阳能电池很困难，因为水分和热量会破坏薄膜的形成。在这里，小分子添加剂在开始时引导晶体生长，然后在退火过程中稳定材料，从而实现在手套箱外制造的高效设备。这项工作表明，增材设计可以同时控制加工和稳定性，为实现低成本、可扩展的钙钛矿太阳能制造提供了一条实用途径。

title: Creating sustainable infrastructure with continuum robots
source: Nature Electronics
abstract: Robots that bend, twist and adapt through continuous deformation could be used to inspect and maintain the infrastructure of modern society. But challenges related to force application, shape estimation, robustness and contact-aware control will need to be addressed before they can have a practical impact.
title_zh: 使用连续体机器人创建可持续基础设施
abstract_zh: 通过连续变形进行弯曲、扭曲和适应的机器人可用于检查和维护现代社会的基础设施。但在产生实际影响之前，需要解决与力施加、形状估计、鲁棒性和接触感知控制相关的挑战。

title: In situ optical techniques for perovskite crystallization
source: Joule
abstract: In situ optical characterization techniques have emerged as powerful tools for probing nucleation, phase evolution, and intermediate-state formation in real time. This review provides a systematic overview of the development and application of in situ optical techniques for studying perovskite crystallization. It aims to offer a comprehensive technical guide for researchers seeking to employ in situ optical methods to investigate perovskite crystallization.
title_zh: 钙钛矿结晶的原位光学技术
abstract_zh: 原位光学表征技术已成为实时探测成核、相演化和中间态形成的强大工具。本综述系统地概述了用于研究钙钛矿结晶的原位光学技术的发展和应用。它旨在为寻求采用原位光学方法研究钙钛矿结晶的研究人员提供全面的技术指南。

title: Electrostatic regulation of solvation chemistry enables ampere-hour-scale high-energy lithium metal batteries
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Achieving high specific energy in lithium metal batteries requires rational electrolyte design to promote effective interphase formation. State-of-the-art electrolyte design strategies fall short because they lack fundamental guidelines that connect solvent characteristics with electrolyte properties. Here we explain the influence of the medium environment on solvation states and anion reduction, and propose a mediator-enhanced electrolyte design strategy by quantitatively exploring various solvent classes using designed polarity indices. The solvent mediator approach generates, at the nanoscale, intermolecular electrostatic fields through separated solvent surface charges, enhancing interactions to better accommodate solvated lithium ions and decreasing the reduction energy barrier for anions. These tailored mediator-enhanced electrolyte solutions (MEEs) exhibit stable solvation states and adequate interphase formation, enabling robust interfacial chemistries and preventing side reactions. Using the MEE design in a 6-Ah Li ‖ LiNi0.8Co0.1Mn0.1O2 pouch cell results in an initial specific energy of 508 Wh kg−1 (based on the cell’s total mass) at 21 mA g−1 (based on the cell’s cathode mass), with 93% energy retention after 149 cycles at 42 mA g−1. In a 16-Ah zero-lithium-excess Cu ‖ LiNi0.90Mn0.05Co0.05O2 pouch cell, the MEE approach also enables an initial specific energy of about 550 Wh kg−1 (based on the cell’s total mass) at 23 mA g−1.
title_zh: 溶剂化化学的静电调节使安时级高能锂金属电池成为可能
abstract_zh: 要在锂金属电池中实现高比能量，需要合理的电解质设计以促进有效的界面形成。最先进的电解质设计策略存在缺陷，因为它们缺乏将溶剂特性与电解质特性联系起来的基本准则。在这里，我们解释了介质环境对溶剂化状态和阴离子还原的影响，并通过使用设计的极性指数定量探索各种溶剂类别，提出了介体增强电解质设计策略。溶剂介体方法通过分离的溶剂表面电荷产生纳米级分子间静电场，增强相互作用以更好地容纳溶剂化锂离子并降低阴离子的还原能垒。这些定制的介体增强电解质溶液 (MEE) 表现出稳定的溶剂化状态和充分的界面形成，从而实现稳健的界面化学并防止副反应。在 6-Ah Li ‖ LiNi0.8Co0.1Mn0.1O2 软包电池中使用 MEE 设计，在 21 mA g−1（基于电池的阴极质量）下的初始比能量为 508 Wh kg−1（基于电池的总质量），在 42 mA g−1 下经过 149 个循环后能量保留率为 93%。在 16-Ah 零锂过量 Cu ‖ LiNi0.90Mn0.05Co0.05O2 软包电池中，MEE 方法还可以在 23 mA g−1 电流下实现约 550 Wh kg−1 （基于电池总质量）的初始比能。

title: Spatiotemporal dynamics of scattering exceptional points
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Exceptional points (EPs) offer new routes to control wave-matter interactions in non-Hermitian systems. Whereas conventional EPs arise in Hamiltonians and mark eigenstate coalescence, scattering EPs recast them in input-output responses for free-space wave control. Yet the rich topology of EPs is largely concealed in steady-state observables, exhibiting similar asymmetric patterns governed by identical Jordan-block forms. Here we exploit scattering as an evolving process in space and time to resolve spatiotemporal dynamics. We establish a cross-domain mapping from momentum-frequency to space-time, connecting static EPs to dynamic scattering singularities. By projecting a unitary scattering matrix onto lower-dimensional subspaces, EP topology is imprinted into a wave packet as a spatiotemporal vortex (STV), whose phase singularity is anchored to the EP and carries its quantized topological charge. In a liquid-surface-wave platform, we observe a charge-1 STV and a disintegrated charge-2 STV, generated by distinct EPs in a single device. Our work links fixed exceptional topology to dynamic wave topology, establishing a framework for spatiotemporal wave control.
title_zh: 散射异常点的时空动力学
abstract_zh: 特异点（EP）提供了控制非厄米系统中波与物质相互作用的新途径。传统的 EP 出现在哈密顿量中并标记本征态合并，而散射 EP 在自由空间波控制的输入输出响应中重新塑造它们。然而，EP 丰富的拓扑结构很大程度上隐藏在稳态可观测值中，表现出由相同乔丹块形式控制的类似不对称模式。在这里，我们利用散射作为空间和时间的演化过程来解决时空动力学问题。我们建立了从动量频率到时空的跨域映射，将静态 EP 与动态散射奇点连接起来。通过将酉散射矩阵投影到低维子空间上，EP 拓扑被作为时空涡旋 (STV) 印记到波包中，其相位奇点被锚定到 EP 并携带其量化的拓扑电荷。在液体表面波平台中，我们观察到由单个设备中不同的 EP 生成的电荷 1 STV 和分解的电荷 2 STV。我们的工作将固定的特殊拓扑与动态波拓扑联系起来，建立了时空波控制的框架。

title: Prognostic RNA-splicing archetypes in breast cancer identified by extended pre-training of histopathology foundation models
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Recently, histopathology foundation models (hFM) have rapidly advanced in size and complexity, achieving excellent performance in cancer diagnosis and biomarker discovery. Here, we specialise pre-trained hFMs to invasive tumour tissue and present three key contributions. First, we systematically evaluate the biological concepts encoded in hFM representations across multiple biological scales. Second, we demonstrate that informed extended pre-training transforms generalist models into tumour-specialised ones encoding richer semantic information, enabling discovery of recurrent tumour archetypes with consistent morphological and molecular identities across patients. Third, we identify dominant tumour archetypes with aberrant gene-expression programs coexisting within tumours and recurring across heterogeneous epithelial cancers, including HER2-positive and triple-negative breast cancer. Crucially, these archetypes exhibit prognostic value, with RNA splicing-associated archetypes consistently predicting poorer outcomes. Our work shows that tumour-specialised hFMs unlock rich molecular and morphological information from routine H&E slides, providing computationally efficient and biologically informed solutions for biological discovery and patient stratification.
title_zh: 通过组织病理学基础模型的扩展预训练识别乳腺癌的预后 RNA 剪接原型
abstract_zh: 最近，组织病理学基础模型（hFM）在规模和复杂性方面迅速发展，在癌症诊断和生物标志物发现方面取得了优异的性能。在这里，我们专门针对侵袭性肿瘤组织进行预训练 hFM，并提出了三个关键贡献。首先，我们系统地评估跨多个生物尺度的 hFM 表示中编码的生物概念。其次，我们证明，知情的扩展预训练将通才模型转变为编码更丰富语义信息的肿瘤专用模型，从而能够发现患者之间具有一致形态和分子身份的复发肿瘤原型。第三，我们确定了在肿瘤内共存并在异质上皮癌（包括 HER2 阳性和三阴性乳腺癌）中反复出现的异常基因表达程序的显性肿瘤原型。至关重要的是，这些原型表现出预后价值，与 RNA 剪接相关的原型始终预测较差的结果。我们的工作表明，肿瘤专用 hFM 可从常规 H&E 切片中解锁丰富的分子和形态学信息，为生物发现和患者分层提供计算高效且生物学信息丰富的解决方案。

title: Multi-metallic additive manufacturing: Interfaces and microstructures
source: Matter
abstract: Multi-metallic additive manufacturing integrates dissimilar metals into monolithic components with site-specific properties, yet inadequate atomic-level interfacial adhesion and inhomogeneous microstructural transitions remain critical challenges. This review elucidates the thermodynamic miscibility rules governing heterointerface formation, clarifies defect origins including intermetallic compounds, pores, and elemental segregation, and reveals the interface-microstructure-property correlations. A systematic framework encompassing compatibility evaluation, process decision-making, and defect control is established, advancing the materials science foundation for industrializing multi-metallic printed structures.
title_zh: 多金属增材制造：界面和微观结构
abstract_zh: 多金属增材制造将不同金属集成到具有特定位置特性的整体部件中，但原子级界面粘附力不足和微观结构转变不均匀仍然是关键挑战。这篇综述阐明了控制异质界面形成的热力学混溶性规则，阐明了缺陷起源，包括金属间化合物、孔隙和元素偏析，并揭示了界面-微观结构-性能之间的相关性。建立了涵盖兼容性评估、工艺决策和缺陷控制的系统框架，为多金属印刷结构工业化奠定了材料科学基础。

title: Disruption of microtubules with low intensity ultrasound rescues hair follicle damage by paclitaxel in mouse models
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Paclitaxel exemplifies one of the key taxanes, a group of versatile and effective drugs commonly used in chemotherapy for several major cancer types. These drugs work by stabilizing cellular microtubules, a unique mechanism to account for their impressive success in oncology. Hair loss (alopecia) is a well-known adverse side effect and poses a significant quality of life issue for many patients. We discovered that a brief exposure to low intensity and low frequency ultrasound at a defined timing was able to break cellular microtubules and mitotic spindles transiently, and thus annulled the consequent hair follicle damage and suppression of hair growth following paclitaxel administrations. These experimental findings herald a practical method that is within reach to prevent hair loss in cancer chemotherapy using taxanes.
title_zh: 用低强度超声破坏微管可挽救小鼠模型中紫杉醇造成的毛囊损伤
abstract_zh: 紫杉醇是关键紫杉烷类药物之一，是一组通用且有效的药物，常用于几种主要癌症类型的化疗。这些药物通过稳定细胞微管发挥作用，这是一种独特的机制，可以解释它们在肿瘤学方面取得的令人印象深刻的成功。脱发（脱发）是一种众所周知的不良副作用，给许多患者带来了严重的生活质量问题。我们发现，在规定的时间短暂暴露于低强度和低频超声波能够暂时破坏细胞微管和有丝分裂纺锤体，从而消除紫杉醇给药后随之而来的毛囊损伤和毛发生长抑制。这些实验结果预示着一种实用的方法可以在使用紫杉烷类药物的癌症化疗中预防脱发。

title: Large-area two-dimensional MoO3 as a high-κ dielectric for van der Waals integration
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Large-area high-quality dielectrics are essential for the integration of two-dimensional (2D) transistors. However, this integration remains challenging, especially for conventional dielectrics that require deposition processes. Adopting van der Waals (vdW) dielectrics is attractive. Molybdenum trioxide (α-MoO3) has been demonstrated as a vdW dielectric in 2D field-effect transistors (FETs), but previous demonstrations showed limited performance and small size. Here, we grow large-area single-crystalline MoO3 with uniform thickness and explore its properties as a dielectric. Single-crystalline MoO3 reaches the millimeter scale and maintains a high dielectric constant of ~ 18.5, low gate leakage of approximately 10−2 A cm−2 at 3.0 MV cm−1, and a large breakdown field of ~ 26.75 MV cm−1. Top-gated molybdenum disulfide (MoS2) transistors exhibit an average subthreshold swing of ~ 71 mV dec−1, and an on/off current ratio exceeding 108. Furthermore, we demonstrate MoO3-based integrated circuits and low-power complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) inverters.
title_zh: 大面积二维 MoO3 作为范德华积分的高 κ 电介质
abstract_zh: 大面积高质量电介质对于二维 (2D) 晶体管的集成至关重要。然而，这种集成仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于需要沉积工艺的传统电介质。采用范德华 (vdW) 电介质很有吸引力。三氧化钼 (α-MoO3) 已被证明可作为二维场效应晶体管 (FET) 中的 vdW 电介质，但之前的演示显示性能有限且尺寸较小。在这里，我们生长了厚度均匀的大面积单晶 MoO3，并探索了其作为电介质的特性。单晶 MoO3 达到毫米级，并保持约 18.5 的高介电常数、在 3.0 MV cm−1 时约 10−2 A cm−2 的低栅极泄漏以及约 26.75 MV cm−1 的大击穿场。顶栅二硫化钼 (MoS2) 晶体管的平均亚阈值摆幅约为 71 mV dec−1，开/关电流比超过 108。此外，我们还演示了基于 MoO3 的集成电路和低功耗互补金属氧化物半导体 (CMOS) 逆变器。

title: Cationic carbon nanotube modulates surface fields for general acidic CO2 reduction with aqueous organic cations
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The (bi)carbonate formation in neutral or alkaline media severely limits the carbon and energy efficiency of electrochemical CO2 reduction reaction (CO2RR). Alkali metal cations and polymer coatings employed to inhibit hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) during acidic CO2RR often exacerbate salt precipitation or increase cell resistivity. Here we report cationic carbon nanotubes (CCNTs) as universal additives enabling efficient CO2RR in strong acids. Using bismuth, silver, and copper oxide catalysts, we attain Faradaic efficiency (FE) of 95%, 100%, and 67% for HCOOH, CO, and C2H4 in pH≤1 electrolyte. Notably, while organic cations typically suffer from poor proton shielding and inferior selectivity, CCNT additives enable their use as electrolytes for selective acidic CO2RR. Their higher solubility permits elevated concentrations, improving stability and energy efficiency. Quantum Mechanics reveals that CCNTs physically mixed with metal catalysts alter the distribution of electric field at the electrolyte/electrode interfaces, impeding HER by suppressing hydronium ions migration while promoting CO2RR. These findings highlight CCNTs as versatile and effective additives for advancing acidic CO2RR with improved selectivity, carbon efficiency, energy efficiency, and stability.
title_zh: 阳离子碳纳米管调节表面场，用于水性有机阳离子还原一般酸性二氧化碳
abstract_zh: 中性或碱性介质中碳酸（氢）盐的形成严重限制了电化学二氧化碳还原反应（CO2RR）的碳和能量效率。用于抑制酸性 CO2RR 过程中析氢反应 (HER) 的碱金属阳离子和聚合物涂层通常会加剧盐沉淀或增加电池电阻率。在此，我们报告了阳离子碳纳米管 (CCNT) 作为通用添加剂，可在强酸中实现高效的 CO2RR。使用铋、银和氧化铜催化剂，我们在 pH≤1 电解液中对 HCOOH、CO 和 C2H4 的法拉第效率 (FE) 分别达到 95%、100% 和 67%。值得注意的是，虽然有机阳离子通常存在较差的质子屏蔽和较差的选择性，但 CCNT 添加剂使其能够用作选择性酸性 CO2RR 的电解质。它们较高的溶解度可以提高浓度，从而提高稳定性和能源效率。量子力学揭示，CCNT 与金属催化剂物理混合会改变电解质/电极界面处的电场分布，通过抑制水合氢离子迁移同时促进 CO2RR 来阻碍 HER。这些发现凸显了 CCNT 作为通用且有效的添加剂，可促进酸性 CO2RR 的发展，并提高选择性、碳效率、能源效率和稳定性。

title: Two-dimensional pixel-level addressable mid-infrared metasurface spatial light modulator
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Active metasurfaces enable dynamic control of light for applications in beam steering, pixelated holography, and adaptive optics, but demonstrations of two-dimensional electrically addressable arrays have so far been limited. Here we introduce a scalable two-dimensional architecture based on phase-change materials integrated metasurfaces and apply it to realize the first transmissive mid-infrared amplitude-only spatial light modulator. The device is fabricated through standard silicon photonic foundry processing combined with backend-of-line integration and employs multilayer backend metal interconnects to implement a crossbar addressing scheme. Each pixel is integrated with a silicon diode selector to suppress sneak-path currents, a feature essential for scaling to large arrays. The result establishes a foundry-compatible route to high-density, large-area active metasurfaces with independently tunable pixels.
title_zh: 二维像素级可寻址中红外超表面空间光调制器
abstract_zh: 有源超表面能够对光束控制、像素化全息术和自适应光学等应用中的光进行动态控制，但二维电可寻址阵列的演示迄今为止还很有限。在这里，我们介绍了一种基于相变材料集成超表面的可扩展二维架构，并将其应用于实现第一个透射式中红外纯振幅空间光调制器。该器件通过标准硅光子代工工艺与后端生产线集成相结合来制造，并采用多层后端金属互连来实现交叉寻址方案。每个像素都与硅二极管选择器集成，以抑制潜行电流，这是扩展到大型阵列的重要功能。结果建立了一条与铸造厂兼容的路线，以实现具有独立可调像素的高密度、大面积有源超表面。

title: Shedding light on bacterial fitness in a tug-of-war with liquid crystal emulsions
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Rapid and reliable quantification of bacterial dynamics at the cellular level is critical for pathogen sensing, live-dead bacterial assays, and monitoring of bacteria fitness and viability. Here, we demonstrate bacterial fitness quantification by capturing individual cells on topological defects of micro-scale liquid crystal emulsion droplets. The emulsion droplets are composed of phase-separated nematic liquid crystal and fluorocarbon components and exhibit an asymmetric mass distribution. A topological singularity in the director field of the liquid crystal phase localizes tailormade surfactants that tether a single bacterium per droplet. Active motion of the bacterium induces a tilt and azimuthal rotation of the droplet trap, which is counteracted by gravity acting on the droplet center of mass. By comparing the observed dynamics of a tethered bacterium’s stochastic movement to a computational model of bacterial motion on spherical surfaces that is based on the classical Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process, we quantify the fitness of bacteria subjected to starvation over several days. This pathogen fitness sensing concept, which relies on the scalable chemical design of single bacterial cell traps, a robust optical readout, and a theoretical understanding of bacterial dynamics on spherical surfaces, offers opportunities for rapid pathogen activity assessment, micro-biological sensing, and biologically powered micro-actuator systems.
title_zh: 揭示液晶乳液拉锯战中细菌的适应性
abstract_zh: 在细胞水平上快速、可靠地定量细菌动态对于病原体传感、活死细菌测定以及细菌适应性和活力监测至关重要。在这里，我们通过捕获微米级液晶乳液液滴的拓扑缺陷上的单个细胞来演示细菌适应性定量。乳液液滴由相分离的向列液晶和碳氟化合物成分组成，并表现出不对称的质量分布。液晶相导向场中的拓扑奇点定位了定制的表面活性剂，每个液滴束缚单个细菌。细菌的主动运动引起液滴捕集器的倾斜和方位角旋转，这被作用在液滴质心上的重力所抵消。通过将观察到的系留细菌随机运动的动力学与基于经典 Ornstein-Uhlenbeck 过程的球面上细菌运动的计算模型进行比较，我们量化了几天内遭受饥饿的细菌的适应性。这种病原体适应性传感概念依赖于单细菌细胞陷阱的可扩展化学设计、强大的光学读数以及对球形表面细菌动力学的理论理解，为快速病原体活性评估、微生物传感和生物动力微执行器系统提供了机会。

title: Thermally symbiotic integration of osmotic membrane distillation and electrolysis for direct seawater hydrogen production
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Integrating water purification membranes with electrolysis for in situ hydrogen (H2) production from seawater offers a rapid pathway to net-zero, but is limited by salt crossover and insufficient water production in existing approaches. Here we overcome these limitations by integrating osmotic membrane distillation (OMD) with alkaline water electrolysis (AWE). Driven by dual thermal and osmotic gradients to enhance salt-free water vapour transport, the OMD-AWE delivers a H2 production rate of 60 kg m–2 day–1 with excellent stability over 500 h of continuous operation. To eliminate the external heating energy penalty of OMD, we propose a thermally symbiotic architecture that converts the AWE’s waste heat to OMD’s thermal driving force while OMD simultaneously providing cooling to maintain AWE optimal temperatures, as validated by our thermal-water-hydrogen model. This thermal symbiosis not only makes OMD-AWE energy self-sufficient with energy efficiency of 51 kWh kg(H2)–1 but also establishes a self-regulating mechanism that phase-locks thermal driving force to fluctuating electrical inputs, synchronising water supply with demand to overcome renewable intermittency. Our approach enables flexible component matching and thermal self-sufficiency at any scale, providing a framework for membrane-integrated electrolysis, demonstrating both technical excellence and economic viability towards a sustainable hydrogen economy.
title_zh: 渗透膜蒸馏和电解的热共生集成直接海水制氢
abstract_zh: 将水净化膜与电解相结合，从海水中原位生产氢气（H2）提供了一条快速实现净零排放的途径，但现有方法受到盐交叉和产水不足的限制。在这里，我们通过将渗透膜蒸馏（OMD）与碱性水电解（AWE）相结合来克服这些限制。在双重热梯度和渗透梯度的驱动下，OMD-AWE 可提供 60 kg m–2 day–1 的氢气生产率，并在连续运行 500 小时内具有出色的稳定性。为了消除 OMD 的外部加热能量损失，我们提出了一种热共生架构，将 AWE 的废热转化为 OMD 的热驱动力，同时 OMD 提供冷却以维持 AWE 最佳温度，这一点已通过我们的热水-水-氢模型验证。这种热共生不仅使 OMD-AWE 能源自给自足，能源效率达到 51 kWh kg(H2)–1，而且还建立了一种自我调节机制，将热驱动力锁相到波动的电力输入，使供水与需求同步，以克服可再生能源的间歇性。我们的方法可以实现任何规模的灵活组件匹配和热自给自足，为膜集成电解提供框架，展示了可持续氢经济的技术卓越性和经济可行性。

title: From thermodynamically metastable to stable: Stimuli-independent transformable nanophotosensitizers for practical photodynamic therapy
source: Matter
abstract: A key technical bottleneck in further translation of cancer nanomedicine is balancing deep tissue penetration with long-term retention. This study reports a stimuli-independent transformable nanophotosensitizer (SITNPS) that penetrates tumors as nanospheres and gradually converts into nanorods, prolonging tumor residence. SITNPS can be activated by either two-photon laser or smartphone torch excitation and facilitates repeated light treatments after a single administration, paving an accessible route toward more practical cancer phototherapy.
title_zh: 从热力学亚稳态到稳定：用于实际光动力治疗的独立于刺激的可转化纳米光敏剂
abstract_zh: 癌症纳米医学进一步转化的一个关键技术瓶颈是平衡深层组织渗透与长期保留。这项研究报告了一种不依赖刺激的可转化纳米光敏剂（SITNPS），它以纳米球的形式穿透肿瘤，并逐渐转化为纳米棒，从而延长肿瘤的停留时间。 SITNPS 可以通过双光子激光或智能手机火炬激发来激活，并有助于在单次给药后重复进行光治疗，为更实用的癌症光疗铺平了一条可行的途径。

title: Sequential Zn2+-H+ storage in a 2D conductive metal-organic framework for advanced aqueous zinc-ion battery
source: Chem
abstract: The conductive 2D MOF Cu3(HHTATP)2 addresses H+-induced side reactions in acidic aqueous zinc-ion batteries by enabling voltage-separated sequential Zn2+ and H+ storage. Its multi-site redox chemistry, including reversible H+-mediated amine/imine conversion at pendant amines, suppresses LDH-related interference while affording high capacity, rapid ion diffusion, and excellent rate capability.
title_zh: 用于先进水性锌离子电池的二维导电金属有机框架中的连续 Zn2+-H+ 存储
abstract_zh: 导电 2D MOF Cu3(HHTATP)2 通过实现电压分离的连续 Zn2+ 和 H+ 存储来解决酸性水性锌离子电池中 H+ 引起的副反应。其多位点氧化还原化学，包括侧胺上可逆的 H+ 介导的胺/亚胺转化，可抑制 LDH 相关干扰，同时提供高容量、快速离子扩散和出色的倍率性能。

title: Switching from insertion to conversion for multielectron aqueous vanadium batteries
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Conventional vanadium chemistries have been hindered by limited capacity inherent to the ion-insertion mechanism and modest redox potentials in near-neutral media, constraining their suitability for high-energy aqueous batteries. Here we demonstrate a conversion-type vanadium redox that delivers concomitant superiority in capacity and potential for aqueous batteries. OH−-mediated chemical activation promotes V–O bond cleavage, thereby driving a transition from the single-electron insertion reaction to the four-electron conversion reaction. As confirmed by in situ synchrotron characterizations, a tailored mesoporous architecture enriches local OH−, facilitating the reversible conversion between V2O3 and Na3VO4. The conversion anode delivers a high specific capacity of 700 mAh g−1 with 98% vanadium utilization, a low redox potential of −0.95 V versus standard hydrogen electrode and reversible cycling over 3,000 cycles. An alkaline Ni–V battery is fabricated, with a projected whole-battery-level energy density of up to 110 Wh kg−1. This work paves the way to tuning the reaction pathway and offers insights into multielectron redox design for next-generation aqueous batteries.
title_zh: 多电子水性钒电池从插入切换到转换
abstract_zh: 传统的钒化学物质受到离子插入机制固有的有限容量和近中性介质中适度的氧化还原电位的阻碍，限制了它们对高能水电池的适用性。在这里，我们展示了一种转换型钒氧化还原剂，它在水性电池的容量和潜力方面同时具有优越性。 OH−介导的化学活化促进V-O键断裂，从而驱动从单电子插入反应到四电子转换反应的转变。原位同步加速器表征证实，定制的介孔结构丰富了局部 OH−，促进 V2O3 和 Na3VO4 之间的可逆转化。该转换阳极具有 700 mAh g−1 的高比容量，钒利用率为 98%，与标准氢电极相比，氧化还原电位低至 -0.95 V，可逆循环超过 3,000 次。制造出碱性 Ni-V 电池，预计整个电池级能量密度高达 110 Wh kg−1。这项工作为调整反应途径铺平了道路，并为下一代水性电池的多电子氧化还原设计提供了见解。
