title: Propagation of fluid-driven aseismic slip fronts under upper crustal conditions
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Fracture mechanics models suggest that aseismic slip may either lag behind or outpace the fluid pressure front, depending on injection conditions and the fault’s initial stress state. However, direct experimental validation of these predictions has been lacking. Here, we report laboratory experiments on granite samples under upper crustal stress conditions, where we simultaneously tracked the propagation of fluid pressure and aseismic slip during fluid injection. We show that aseismic slip lags the pressure front at low injection rates and low initial stress but rapidly outpaces it under high-rate injection or near-failure initial stress conditions. The transition is governed by a dimensionless loading parameter that integrates injection rate, fault strength, and initial shear stress. Our results provide direct support for fracture mechanics models of fluid-induced aseismic slip and suggest that in critically stressed crustal faults, rupture propagation may commonly outpace fluid diffusion.
title_zh: 上地壳条件下流体驱动的地震滑动锋的传播
abstract_zh: 断裂力学模型表明，抗震滑动可能滞后于或超过流体压力前沿，具体取决于注入条件和断层的初始应力状态。然而，这些预测缺乏直接的实验验证。在这里，我们报告了上地壳应力条件下花岗岩样品的实验室实验，其中我们同时跟踪了流体注入过程中流体压力和地震滑移的传播。我们发现，在低注入速率和低初始应力下，抗震滑动滞后于压力前沿，但在高速率注入或接近失效初始应力条件下，抗震滑动迅速超过压力前沿。该转变由无量纲加载参数控制，该参数集成了注入速率、断层强度和初始剪切应力。我们的结果为流体引起的抗震滑移的断裂力学模型提供了直接支持，并表明在临界应力的地壳断层中，破裂传播通常可能超过流体扩散。

title: A chemistry-informed deep learning network for mitigating the stratospheric OH data gap
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The hydroxyl (OH) radical is a key species in stratospheric chemistry, driving ozone loss and the coupling of other chemical families. However, global OH observations are very sparse, with a critical gap in satellite-based observations since 2009. Although alternative chemical methods attempt to mitigate such gaps, they have limitations. Here, we present DRCAT, a chemistry-informed deep learning network to predict stratospheric OH profiles using coincident satellite observations of chemically related species. Trained on only 2 years of data, DRCAT provides reconstruction of a continuous and reliable global stratospheric OH dataset from late 2004 to the present. Results show that DRCAT outperforms both a chemical transport model and an observation-constrained steady-state approximation. Moreover, DRCAT successfully predicts anomalous OH enhancements after the 2022 Hunga volcanic eruption, showing generalizability to extreme conditions outside of the training regime. DRCAT thus provides a robust pathway to fill OH observational voids. Beyond OH, this work offers a scalable framework for similar reconstruction of other key short-lived species.
title_zh: 用于缩小平流层 OH 数据差距的化学信息深度学习网络
abstract_zh: 羟基 (OH) 自由基是平流层化学中的关键物质，导致臭氧损失和其他化学家族的耦合。然而，全球 OH 观测非常稀疏，自 2009 年以来卫星观测存在严重差距。尽管替代化学方法试图缩小这种差距，但它们具有局限性。在这里，我们提出了 DRCAT，这是一个化学信息深度学习网络，可利用化学相关物种的同步卫星观测来预测平流层 OH 分布。 DRCAT 仅使用 2 年的数据进行训练，提供了从 2004 年底至今连续可靠的全球平流层 OH 数据集的重建。结果表明，DRCAT 的性能优于化学输运模型和观测约束的稳态近似模型。此外，DRCAT 成功预测了 2022 年洪加火山喷发后的异常 OH 增强，显示出对训练制度之外的极端条件的普适性。因此，DRCAT 提供了一条填补 OH 观测空白的强大途径。除了 OH 之外，这项工作还为其他关键短命物种的类似重建提供了一个可扩展的框架。

title: Two distinct regions in micellar aggregates identified with pyrene-labeled dendrimers
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: This study challenges the basic representation that micellar aggregates (MAs) are simple assemblies of ionic surfactants held together by their hydrophobic tails and stabilized by their charged headgroups by demonstrating that they exhibit specific surfactant microdomains. These microdomains are the result of local phase separation between charged and partially neutralized with sodium chloride surfactants inside the same MA of SDS. They were characterized with pyrene-labeled polyamidoamine dendrimers. The charged and partially neutralized surfactants were found to constitute the polar edge and apolar middle regions of MA, respectively, among which the dendrimers would spatially partition themselves. The fluorescence response of the dendrimers was directly related to the volume fraction of the edge region calculated by assuming that the MAs were cylinders whose edges were capped with two identical hemispheres consisting of 35 charged SDS molecules. The fact that merging the two hemispheres generates a spherical SDS micelle led to a general mechanism rationalizing the formation of MA.
title_zh: 用芘标记的树枝状聚合物鉴定出胶束聚集体中的两个不同区域
abstract_zh: 这项研究通过证明胶束聚集体（MA）具有特定的表面活性剂微域，挑战了胶束聚集体（MA）是离子表面活性剂的简单组装体的基本表征，这些离子表面活性剂通过疏水尾部结合在一起并通过带电头基稳定。这些微域是在 SDS 的同一 MA 内带电和被氯化钠表面活性剂部分中和之间局部相分离的结果。它们用芘标记的聚酰胺胺树枝状聚合物进行表征。发现带电和部分中和的表面活性剂分别构成MA的极性边缘和非极性中间区域，其中树枝状聚合物将在空间上分隔自身。树枝状聚合物的荧光响应与边缘区域的体积分数直接相关，该体积分数是通过假设 MA 是圆柱体而计算的，其边缘被两个相同的半球所覆盖，该半球由 35 个带电的 SDS 分子组成。两个半球合并生成球形 SDS 胶束这一事实导致了合理化 MA 形成的一般机制。

title: Liquid–liquid phase separation enables chromatography-free purification and high-performance spidroin-amyloid hybrid silk fibers
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Large-scale production of artificial spider silk fibers requires heterologous expression of spider silk proteins (spidroins), yet current methods remain limited by low yields and costly purification processes. To overcome these challenges, we engineered mini-spidroins in which the poly-alanine motifs of the repetitive region were replaced with the non-natural amyloidogenic β16 peptide, significantly enhancing expression yields and solubility. Furthermore, we developed a simple, chromatography-free purification method for these constructs based on NaCl-induced liquid–liquid phase separation (LLPS). This one-step purification strategy reduced processing costs by up to 99% compared to conventional affinity chromatography while achieving yields of ~300 mg of purified protein per liter of shake flask culture and ~25 g L
                    −1
                    from bioreactor cultivations. The purified engineered mini-spidroins could be spun into continuous fibers using an all-aqueous, biomimetic spinning process triggered by a pH drop. The resulting fibers exhibited mechanical properties comparable to those produced from the mini-spidroin NT2RepCT, which requires conventional chromatographic purification. Together, our protein-engineering approach and LLPS-based purification method provide a potentially scalable, sustainable, and cost-effective platform for artificial spider silk, representing a major step toward the commercial viability of recombinant silk-based materials.
title_zh: 液-液相分离可实现免色谱纯化和高性能蛛丝蛋白-淀粉样蛋白混合丝纤维
abstract_zh:
大规模生产人造蜘蛛丝纤维需要蜘蛛丝蛋白（蜘蛛蛋白）的异源表达，但目前的方法仍然受到产量低和纯化过程昂贵的限制。为了克服这些挑战，我们设计了迷你蜘蛛蛋白，其中重复区域的聚丙氨酸基序被非天然淀粉样蛋白β16肽取代，显着提高了表达产量和溶解度。此外，我们基于 NaCl 诱导的液-液相分离 (LLPS) 为这些构建体开发了一种简单的、免色谱纯化方法。与传统亲和层析相比，这一一步纯化策略可降低高达 99% 的处理成本，同时实现每升摇瓶培养物约 300 mg 纯化蛋白和约 25 g L 的纯化蛋白产量
                    −1
                    来自生物反应器培养。纯化的工程迷你蛛丝可以通过 pH 值下降触发的全水仿生纺丝过程纺成连续纤维。所得纤维的机械性能与迷你蛛丝蛋白 NT2RepCT 生产的纤维相当，后者需要传统的色谱纯化。我们的蛋白质工程方法和基于 LLPS 的纯化方法共同为人造蜘蛛丝提供了一个潜在可扩展、可持续且具有成本效益的平台，代表着重组丝基材料的商业可行性迈出了重要一步。

title: Trainable soft electronics with memory in liquid crystal polymers
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: State-of-the-art soft materials can be engineered as sensors and actuators, yet, methods for learning from external information remain a subject of current research. Inspired by the use of large datasets to train artificial intelligence, tuning physical responsiveness to relayed data would introduce learning behavior in soft materials. In this work, we develop a trainable liquid crystal oligomer network (LCON) that stores digital information directly into its molecular configuration. By functionalizing the anisotropic LCON with photo-switchable azobenzene, we simultaneously integrate basic logic and memory in a material through a binary-state system; we coin this design the trainable self-propelled gate (T-SPG). We can tune the memory of our T-SPG with photonic stimuli, allowing the system to be trained by a conventional digital controller. We demonstrate the trainability of the T-SPG through two hierarchical tasks: a lower-level binary classification task where the decision boundary is stored as material memory, and a higher-level motion task that uses the stored memory to trigger actuation.
title_zh: 具有液晶聚合物记忆功能的可训练软电子器件
abstract_zh: 最先进的软材料可以设计为传感器和执行器，然而，从外部信息中学习的方法仍然是当前研究的主题。受使用大型数据集训练人工智能的启发，调整对中继数据的物理响应将引入软材料的学习行为。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种可训练的液晶低聚物网络（LCON），它将数字信息直接存储到其分子配置中。通过用光可切换偶氮苯功能化各向异性 LCON，我们通过二元态系统同时将基本逻辑和存储器集成在材料中；我们将这种设计命名为可训练自走门（T-SPG）。我们可以通过光子刺激来调整 T-SPG 的记忆，从而允许系统通过传统的数字控制器进行训练。我们通过两个分层任务展示了 T-SPG 的可训练性：一个较低级别的二元分类任务，其中决策边界存储为材料内存；另一个较高级别的运动任务，使用存储的内存来触发驱动。

title: In vivo engineering tumor cells to a universal “all-in-one” cancer vaccine with full antigen spectrum
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Cancer vaccines offer a promising strategy to initiate de novo T cell responses or enhance existing ones, either functioning independently or synergizing with T cell–modulating therapeutics to reduce tumor burden. The clinical development of cancer vaccines faces challenges such as limited antigen coverage, insufficient antigen presentation, immune suppressive microenvironment, and the availability of personalized vaccines. In this study, we developed a universal “all-in-one” cancer cell–derived vaccine (UniCVac) with comprehensive antigen spectrum coverage by programming tumor cells into antigen-presenting cells (APCs) through the codelivery of CIITA, NLRC5, CD80, and IL-2. This reprogramming mimics the professional APC phenotype, providing simultaneous HLA-I and HLA-II antigen presentation, costimulation, and T cell proliferation signals. These tumor-derived UniCVac can directly activate both CD4
                    +
                    and CD8
                    +
                    T cells in vitro, independent of APCs. In addition, their costimulation and T cell growth-stimulating capabilities result in superior CD4
                    +
                    and CD8
                    +
                    T cell activation and proliferation comparable to traditional APCs, with enhanced PI3K-AKT pathways activation. Single-cell transcriptome analysis confirmed the similarity in cellular subtypes between UniCVac-activated and traditional APC-activated T cells. In mouse models, the UniCVac vaccination reprogramed the tumor microenvironment from immunosuppressive to immune-permissive, induced robust CD4
                    +
                    and CD8
                    +
                    T cell expansion in both preventive and therapeutic tumor models, and achieved complete tumor regression in vivo. Our approach provides a platform for the development of universal cancer vaccines with full antigen spectrum coverage and the ability to directly activate both CD4
                    +
                    and CD8
                    +
                    T cells, offering potential combinatorial opportunities with existing T cell–based immunotherapies against cancer.
title_zh: 将肿瘤细胞体内工程改造为具有全抗原谱的通用“一体化”癌症疫苗
abstract_zh:
癌症疫苗提供了一种很有前途的策略，可以启动从头的 T 细胞反应或增强现有的反应，可以独立发挥作用，也可以与 T 细胞调节疗法协同作用，以减轻肿瘤负担。癌症疫苗的临床开发面临着抗原覆盖范围有限、抗原呈递不足、免疫抑制微环境以及个性化疫苗的可用性等挑战。在这项研究中，我们通过 CIITA、NLRC5、CD80 和 IL-2 的共同传递将肿瘤细胞编程为抗原呈递细胞 (APC)，开发了一种具有全面抗原谱覆盖的通用“一体化”癌细胞衍生疫苗 (UniCVac)。这种重编程模仿专业的 APC 表型，同时提供 HLA-I 和 HLA-II 抗原呈递、共刺激和 T 细胞增殖信号。这些肿瘤来源的 UniCVac 可以直接激活 CD4
                    +
                    和CD8
                    +
                    体外 T 细胞，独立于 APC。此外，它们的共刺激和 T 细胞生长刺激能力可产生卓越的 CD4
                    +
                    和CD8
                    +
                    T 细胞活化和增殖与传统 APC 相当，并具有增强的 PI3K-AKT 通路激活。单细胞转录组分析证实了 UniCVac 激活的 T 细胞和传统 APC 激活的 T 细胞之间细胞亚型的相似性。在小鼠模型中，UniCVac 疫苗接种将肿瘤微环境从免疫抑制重新编程为免疫抑制。

title: Redirecting radical phosphonylation via energy-transfer–enabled diradical rearrangement
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Radical phosphonylation has traditionally relied on single-electron transfer mechanisms. In contrast, strategies using energy-transfer pathways to enable scaffold rearrangement are rare. Here, we report an energy transfer catalysis strategy that diverts reactivity toward a previously unexplored pathway: a direct photochemical diradical rearrangement between homoallylic alcohols and phosphorus(III) reagents. Mechanistic studies, supported by computational calculation, provide definitive support for an energy-transfer–mediated diradical mechanism. This operationally simple and mild process, driven by visible light, forges strained phosphorylated cyclopropanes with high efficiency via diradical intermediates that undergo radical addition to phosphorus, β-scission, and recombination. With broad substrate compatibility and excellent functional group tolerance, this method delivers diverse three-membered rings containing phosphine oxide in good to excellent yields. This work establishes a new reaction manifold for organophosphorus synthesis, demonstrating how energy transfer catalysis can redirect traditional reactivity to access valuable strained architectures through previously inaccessible rearrangement pathways.
title_zh: 通过能量转移双自由基重排重定向自由基磷酸化
abstract_zh: 自由基磷酸化传统上依赖于单电子转移机制。相比之下，利用能量转移途径实现支架重排的策略很少见。在这里，我们报告了一种能量转移催化策略，该策略将反应性转向以前未探索的途径：高烯丙醇和磷（III）试剂之间的直接光化学双自由基重排。由计算计算支持的机理研究为能量转移介导的双自由基机制提供了明确的支持。这种操作简单且温和的过程在可见光驱动下，通过双自由基中间体与磷进行自由基加成、β-断裂和重组，高效地形成应变磷酸化环丙烷。该方法具有广泛的底物兼容性和出色的官能团耐受性，可以以良好至优异的产率提供含有氧化膦的多种三元环。这项工作为有机磷合成建立了一种新的反应流形，展示了能量转移催化如何重新定向传统反应性，以通过以前无法实现的重排途径获得有价值的应变结构。

title: Metamorphic sulfur release as a driver of sustained cooling and mass extinction
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The emplacement of large igneous provinces may drive catastrophic volatile release, both directly through volcanic degassing and indirectly through heating of carbon- and sulfur-bearing host sediments. It is broadly assumed that sulfur injection must reach the stratosphere to drive long-term cooling; thus, these indirect metamorphic sulfur emissions have been almost entirely ignored. Here, we demonstrate that plausible carbon and sulfur emissions from contact metamorphism may be sustained long enough to cause centennial-scale sulfate aerosol–driven cooling spikes of several kelvins superimposed on millennial-scale warming from the carbon dioxide greenhouse effect. We use modeling of sediment metamorphism along with simple carbon cycle and planetary energy balance models of the climate response to explore this relationship. Our results suggest that a metamorphic sulfur source should be considered as a driver of sustained global cooling during large igneous province emplacement, with potential implications for Phanerozoic biotic crises such as the End-Triassic Mass Extinction.
title_zh: 变质硫释放是持续冷却和大规模灭绝的驱动因素
abstract_zh: 大型火成岩省的侵位可能会直接通过火山脱气以及通过含碳和硫的宿主沉积物的加热间接导致灾难性的挥发物释放。人们普遍认为，硫磺注入必须到达平流层才能驱动长期冷却；因此，这些间接变质硫排放几乎完全被忽略。在这里，我们证明，接触变质作用引起的碳和硫排放可能会持续足够长的时间，从而导致百年规模的硫酸盐气溶胶驱动的几个开尔文的冷却峰值，叠加在二氧化碳温室效应造成的千年规模的变暖之上。我们使用沉积物变质作用模型以及简单的碳循环和气候响应的行星能量平衡模型来探索这种关系。我们的研究结果表明，变质硫源应被视为大型火成岩省侵占期间全球持续变冷的驱动因素，对显生宙生物危机（例如三叠纪末期大规模灭绝）具有潜在影响。

title: Effect of cellular nutrient economy on the evolution of genome size in phytoplankton
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The origin of genome size variation remains a central question in evolutionary biology. While energetic costs have been proposed to influence genome size through selection on insertions and deletions (indels), nutrient availability may be a more relevant constraint in primary producers such as phytoplankton. We derived an expression for the selection coefficient of indels based on the phosphorus and nitrogen costs of nucleotides and the cellular nutrient requirements. Selection coefficient estimates indicate that natural selection dominates over genetic drift and favors the fixation of mutations that reduce genome size in phytoplankton with low nutrient requirements. Model predictions are supported by comparative genomics and metagenomic analyses. Together, this model provides a rigorous quantitative framework for understanding genome size evolution, particularly in small cells and oligotrophic environments, highlighting how nutrient limitation drives genome streamlining.
title_zh: 细胞营养经济对浮游植物基因组大小进化的影响
abstract_zh: 基因组大小变异的起源仍然是进化生物学的一个中心问题。虽然能量成本已被提出通过插入和缺失（indels）的选择来影响基因组大小，但营养物质的可用性可能是浮游植物等初级生产者中更相关的限制。我们根据核苷酸的磷和氮成本以及细胞营养需求导出了插入缺失选择系数的表达式。选择系数估计表明，自然选择主导了遗传漂变，并有利于突变的固定，从而减少了营养需求低的浮游植物的基因组大小。模型预测得到比较基因组学和宏基因组分析的支持。总之，该模型为理解基因组大小进化提供了严格的定量框架，特别是在小细胞和寡营养环境中，强调了营养限制如何驱动基因组精简。

title: Communicating coral: Art and science for global reef action
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Coral reefs are experiencing unprecedented rapid decline. Art can act as a beacon to engage audiences, influence policy, and inspire global action.
title_zh: 沟通珊瑚：全球珊瑚礁行动的艺术和科学
abstract_zh: 珊瑚礁正在经历前所未有的快速衰退。艺术可以充当吸引观众、影响政策和激发全球行动的灯塔。

title: High-resolution structure of monomorphic Aβ1-40 fibrils
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Amyloid-β (Aβ) fibrils primarily composed of Aβ
                    1-40
                    and Aβ
                    1-42
                    form the core of senile plaques in Alzheimer’s disease. Aβ
                    1-40
                    fibrils may exhibit significant polymorphism influenced by sample preparation conditions, complicating atomic resolution structural characterization. To establish a reliable structural baseline, we developed a protocol for expressing and purifying recombinant Aβ
                    1-40
                    that forms monomorphic fibrils under physiological conditions (pH 7.4). We present a high-resolution structure of these unseeded, monomorphic Aβ
                    1-40
                    fibrils obtained using magic-angle spinning NMR spectroscopy (PDB ID 12GB). We obtained unambiguous chemical shift assignments for approximately 90% of the residues and measured over 500 distance and torsion angle restraints. The resolved structure, with a backbone RMSD of 0.63 ± 0.06 Å, shows two monomers per filament plane, with two distinct β-sheets (residues E11-E22 and K28-V39, respectively) running along the fibril axis with H-bonding between each plane, and the two strands linked by a flexible loop region. This structure reveals three continuous hydrophobic cores inside each filament which bury 24 hydrophobic side chains per filament plane: those of L17, F19, A21, V24, A30, I32, M35, V40 between the two β-strands within each monomer and I31, L34, V36, V39 between the two monomers. Small angle X-ray scattering reveals the size and geometry of the fibril cross-section, which is compatible with a two-filament arrangement with a total of 4 monomers per fibril plane.
title_zh: 单形 Aβ1-40 原纤维的高分辨率结构
abstract_zh:
主要由 Aβ 组成的淀粉样蛋白 (Aβ) 原纤维
                    1-40
                    和 Aβ
                    1-42
                    形成阿尔茨海默病老年斑的核心。 Aβ
                    1-40
                    原纤维可能会表现出受样品制备条件影响的显着多态性，从而使原子分辨率结构表征变得复杂。为了建立可靠的结构基线，我们开发了表达和纯化重组 Aβ 的方案
                    1-40
                    在生理条件下（pH 7.4）形成单形原纤维。我们展示了这些非种子单态 Aβ 的高分辨率结构
                    1-40
                    使用魔角旋转核磁共振波谱 (PDB ID 12GB) 获得原纤维。我们获得了大约 90% 残基的明确化学位移分配，并测量了 500 多个距离和扭转角约束。解析出的结构，主链 RMSD 为 0.63 ± 0.06 Å，显示每个丝平面有两个单体，具有两个不同的 β-折叠（分别为残基 E11-E22 和 K28-V39），沿着原纤维轴延伸，每个平面之间具有 H 键合，并且两条链通过柔性环区域连接。这种结构揭示了每个长丝内部的三个连续的疏水核心，每个长丝平面埋藏了24个疏水侧链：每个单体内的两个β链之间的L17、F19、A21、V24、A30、I32、M35、V40的侧链和两个单体之间的I31、L34、V36、V39的侧链。小角度 X 射线散射揭示了尺寸和几何形状

title: Optical photothermal infrared imaging of fatty acid esterification in the ER of living cells
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Lipotoxicity is an accumulation of lipids that leads to cell death and metabolic disease. Saturated fatty acids are more likely to cause lipotoxicity; however, the mechanism remains unclear due to challenges visualizing reactions in live cells. Here, we use optical photothermal infrared microspectroscopy to investigate palmitic acid (PA) metabolism in hepatocytes with submicron spatial resolution. Upon PA feeding, we found a time-dependent ester carbonyl stretch localized to the endoplasmic reticulum (ER) near lipid droplets with abnormal morphology. This stretch is assigned to diacylglycerol intermediates in the glycerol-3-phosphate pathway. C─D stretches of deuterated PA provide complementary molecular details, supporting a model whereby PA acyl chain packing in the ER reduces enzyme diffusion slowing PA metabolism. Our results provide a deeper understanding of how phase changes induced by high melting temperature fatty acids and their metabolites change ER chemistry as well as provide a tool for detecting chemical and environmental changes associated with lipotoxicity in live cells.
title_zh: 活细胞内质网脂肪酸酯化的光学光热红外成像
abstract_zh: 脂毒性是导致细胞死亡和代谢疾病的脂质积累。饱和脂肪酸更容易引起脂毒性；然而，由于活细胞中反应可视化的挑战，其机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们使用光学光热红外显微光谱以亚微米空间分辨率研究肝细胞中的棕榈酸（PA）代谢。 PA 喂养后，我们发现时间依赖性酯羰基拉伸位于内质网 (ER) 附近的脂滴附近，形态异常。该片段属于甘油-3-磷酸途径中的二酰甘油中间体。氘化 PA 的 C─D 延伸段提供了互补的分子细节，支持了这样一种模型：内质网中 PA 酰基链堆积可减少酶扩散，从而减缓 PA 代谢。我们的结果提供了对高熔点脂肪酸及其代谢物诱导的相变如何改变内质网化学的更深入的了解，并提供了检测与活细胞脂毒性相关的化学和环境变化的工具。

title: A caddisfly larva case–mimicked gel polymer electrolyte with high toughness and enhanced ion transport for safe lithium metal batteries
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Lithium (Li) metal batteries (LMBs) promise higher energy density than Li-ion cells but face a trade-off between ionic conductivity and mechanical strength in gel polymer electrolytes (GPEs). Inspired by caddisfly larvae cases, which assemble silk with particles for toughness and permeability, we develop a caddisfly larva case–mimicked gel polymer electrolyte (CLC GPE) with high toughness and enhanced ion transport. It integrates an electrospun polyvinylidene fluoride-hexafluoropropylene scaffold with shear thickening fluid. CLC GPE achieves a high ionic conductivity (2.80 × 10
                    −3
                    siemens per centimeter), a Li
                    +
                    transference number of 0.89, superior toughness (7.29 megajoules per cubic meter), and a puncture energy of 49.69 millijoules, which can resist thermal abuse (150°C), flame, and bullet impact (225 kilometers per hour). Symmetric Li||Li cells exhibit stable cycling over 800 hours, while Li||LFP (LiFePO
                    4
                    ) full cells maintain 97.6% capacity after 700 cycles at 0.5C. This design couples mechanical robustness with fast ion transport, offering a scalable route to safer, high-performance LMBs.
title_zh: 一种仿石蛾幼虫案例的凝胶聚合物电解质，具有高韧性和增强的离子传输能力，适用于安全的锂金属电池
abstract_zh:
锂（Li）金属电池（LMB）比锂离子电池具有更高的能量密度，但在凝胶聚合物电解质（GPE）中面临着离子电导率和机械强度之间的权衡。受到石蛾幼虫壳的启发，石蛾幼虫壳将丝与颗粒组装起来以提高韧性和渗透性，我们开发了一种具有高韧性和增强离子传输的仿石蛾幼虫壳凝胶聚合物电解质（CLC GPE）。它将静电纺丝聚偏二氟乙烯-六氟丙烯支架与剪切增稠液集成在一起。 CLC GPE 实现了高离子电导率 (2.80 × 10
                    −3
                    西门子每厘米），一李
                    +
                    传递数为0.89，韧性优越（每立方米7.29兆焦耳），穿刺能为49.69毫焦耳，可抵抗热滥用（150°C）、火焰和子弹冲击（225公里/小时）。对称 Li||Li 电池表现出超过 800 小时的稳定循环，而 Li||LFP (LiFePO
                    4
                    ）全电池在 0.5C 下循环 700 次后仍保持 97.6% 的容量。该设计将机械稳健性与快速离子传输相结合，为更安全、高性能的 LMB 提供了可扩展的途径。

title: Physically intelligent capsule robots with embodied memory and logic in the gastrointestinal tract
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Miniaturized medical robots offer a promising solution for minimally invasive measurements and interventions in the gastrointestinal (GI) tract. Clinical assessment of GI disorders is commonly guided by threshold-based physiological indicators, including pressure, temperature, and pH, which motivate event-triggered strategies for personalized medicine. However, identifying homeostatic dysregulation and enabling in-situ therapy remains challenging, because ingestible robotic systems must tightly integrate sensing, decision-making, and actuation under severe constraints of size, power, and biosafety. Inspired by the autonomy of microorganisms that operate without neural processing, this work introduces physically intelligent capsule robots (PI Capbots) that enable homeostatic monitoring and targeted delivery within the GI tract, without relying on centralized electronic control. Through embodied stimuli-responsive memory and logic, PI Capbots effectively distill rich, detailed, and redundant physiological information into a small set of decoupled and event-triggered outputs suitable for operations in in vivo environments. In each PI Capbot, multistable metamaterials encode intraluminal pressure as mechanical memory, programmable hydrogels implement orthogonal sensing and logic operations, and helical fibers enable multimodal locomotion. Ex vivo and in vivo studies in large animal models demonstrate the efficacy, robustness, and reproducibility of PI Capbots, highlighting its potential for their translational medical applications.
title_zh: 具有胃肠道内具身记忆和逻辑功能的物理智能胶囊机器人
abstract_zh: 微型医疗机器人为胃肠道 (GI) 的微创测量和干预提供了一种有前途的解决方案。胃肠道疾病的临床评估通常以基于阈值的生理指标为指导，包括压力、温度和 pH 值，这些指标激发了个性化医疗的事件触发策略。然而，识别稳态失调并实现原位治疗仍然具有挑战性，因为可摄入机器人系统必须在尺寸、功率和生物安全的严格限制下紧密集成传感、决策和驱动。受到无需神经处理的微生物自主性的启发，这项工作引入了物理智能胶囊机器人 (PI Capbots)，该机器人能够在胃肠道内进行稳态监测和有针对性的输送，而无需依赖集中电子控制。通过具体的刺激响应记忆和逻辑，PI Capbot 可以有效地将丰富、详细和冗余的生理信息提取为一小组适合体内环境操作的解耦和事件触发的输出。在每个 PI Capbot 中，多稳态超材料将腔内压力编码为机械记忆，可编程水凝胶实现正交传感和逻辑运算，螺旋纤维实现多模式运动。大型动物模型的离体和体内研究证明了 PI Capbot 的功效、稳健性和可重复性，凸显了其转化医学应用的潜力。

title: Circadian screening of neutrophils identifies therapeutic targets in multiple sclerosis
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Circadian rhythms are intrinsic time-keeping mechanisms that play a critical role in tuning immunity. Here, we investigated the impact of circadian rhythms on the pathogenesis of experimental autoimmune encephalomyelitis (EAE), a mouse model for multiple sclerosis (MS). We demonstrate that circulating neutrophils in blood significantly increase early in EAE, prior to symptoms onset. Importantly, we found that these cells infiltrate the central nervous system (CNS) in a time-of-day (ToD)-dependent manner, with increased infiltration at the onset of the behavioral active phase of the mice (evening). Transcriptomic analysis of CNS-infiltrating neutrophils revealed distinct ToD-dependent gene expression profiles, which identified Formyl peptide receptor 2 (FPR2) as a potential therapeutic candidate, since pharmacological inhibition of FPR2 led to reduced EAE disease severity. Furthermore, combinatorial treatment with a drug that targets VLA-4 (used in clinical practice under the trade name Natalizumab to treat MS) led to additive effects, substantially reducing EAE symptoms. Together, these findings highlight the importance of circadian immune cell dynamics during EAE development and provide a characterization of the circadian immune landscape in an animal model of MS, identifying potential targets for MS therapies.
title_zh: 中性粒细胞的昼夜节律筛查可确定多发性硬化症的治疗靶点
abstract_zh: 昼夜节律是内在的计时机制，在调节免疫力方面发挥着关键作用。在这里，我们研究了昼夜节律对实验性自身免疫性脑脊髓炎（EAE）（多发性硬化症（MS）小鼠模型）发病机制的影响。我们证明，在 EAE 早期，即症状出现之前，血液中的循环中性粒细胞显着增加。重要的是，我们发现这些细胞以一天中的时间（ToD）依赖性方式浸润中枢神经系统（CNS），在小鼠行为活跃期（晚上）开始时浸润增加。 CNS 浸润性中性粒细胞的转录组分析揭示了独特的 ToD 依赖性基因表达谱，将甲酰肽受体 2 (FPR2) 确定为潜在的治疗候选者，因为 FPR2 的药理抑制可降低 EAE 疾病的严重程度。此外，与靶向 VLA-4 的药物（在临床实践中以商品名 Natalizumab 用于治疗多发性硬化症）的组合治疗会产生累加效应，显着减轻 EAE 症状。总之，这些发现强调了 EAE 发展过程中昼夜免疫细胞动态的重要性，并提供了 MS 动物模型中昼夜免疫景观的特征，从而确定了 MS 治疗的潜在靶点。

title: Circulating PEG-indoleamine 2,3-dioxygenase ameliorates diverse inflammatory diseases without toxicity or compromising immunocompetence
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Indoleamine 2,3-dioxygenase (IDO), the enzyme responsible for tryptophan catabolism, is protective in many autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. We previously developed a localized immunomodulation approach through the fusion of IDO to a carbohydrate binding protein [E. Bracho-Sanchez
                    et al.
                    ,
                    Nat. Biomed. Eng.
                    7
                    , 1156–1169 (2023)]. Here we further develop IDO as a protein therapeutic for inflammation, investigating systemic delivery via conjugation of poly(ethylene glycol) (PEG) to IDO. PEGylation extended circulation time and treatment PEG-IDO demonstrated therapeutic efficacy in five autoimmune and inflammatory models. Treatment with a single dose of PEG-IDO resulted in reversal of hind limb paralysis in experimental autoimmune encephalomyelitis as model of multiple sclerosis; protected against hepatic damage in liver ischemia-reperfusion injury; prevention of abdominal aortic aneurysm; and decreased severity of imiquimod-induced psoriasis. Treatment with two doses of PEG-IDO provided maintenance of body weight and colon length in acute ulcerative colitis. PEG-IDO treatment increased regulatory T cell populations and reduced pathogenic Th17 cell populations and inflammatory cytokine production. Systemic delivery of PEG-IDO had little-to-no off-target effects. Mice maintained immunocompetency, clearing the
                    Listeria
                    monocytogenes infection, and had no observed toxicity. Additionally, PEG-IDO increased serum kynurenine, consistent with a kynurenine-mediated mechanism of action. These findings demonstrate systemic immunomodulation via circulating PEG-IDO ameliorates a breadth of disparate autoinflammatory diseases, protecting against inflammation-driven tissue destruction in spinal cord, liver, abdominal aorta, skin, and colon, while presenting a positive safety profile, and expanding the scope of potential applications for this therapeutic approach.

title: Diffusion-induced instabilities promote cooperation in eco-evolutionary networks
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Understanding how cooperation persists despite the advantage of selfish behavior remains a central challenge in evolutionary dynamics. Classical models of public goods dilemmas predict dominance of defectors, yet natural and social systems often sustain cooperation. We study an eco-evolutionary public goods game on complex networks where cooperators and defectors diffuse at different rates. When the isolated system is in a defector-dominated coexistence regime, faster dispersal of defectors than cooperators leads to a symmetry-breaking transition that produces localized clusters of cooperators. In heterogeneous networks, nodes with higher connectivity become significantly more likely to exhibit cooperative dominance. A degree-based mean-field reduction supports this result by showing that network connectivity controls an effective coupling strength proportional to node degree, thereby producing a bifurcation that separates defector-dominated and cooperative states. We also address why not all hubs become cooperative by means of a multistability analysis. These results reveal how asymmetric mobility and heterogeneous connectivity jointly promote cooperation in structured populations.
title_zh: 扩散引起的不稳定性促进生态进化网络中的合作
abstract_zh: 尽管自私行为具有优势，但理解合作如何持续存在仍然是进化动力学中的一个核心挑战。公共物品困境的经典模型预测叛逃者占主导地位，但自然和社会系统往往维持合作。我们研究了复杂网络上的生态进化公共物品博弈，其中合作者和叛逃者以不同的速率扩散。当孤立系统处于叛逃者主导的共存状态时，叛逃者比合作者更快地分散，导致对称性破缺转变，从而产生局部的合作者集群。在异构网络中，具有较高连接性的节点变得更有可能表现出合作优势。基于度数的平均场缩减通过表明网络连接性控制与节点度数成比例的有效耦合强度来支持这一结果，从而产生将叛逃者主导状态和合作状态分开的分叉。我们还解决了为什么并非所有中心都通过多稳定性分析进行合作的原因。这些结果揭示了不对称流动性和异构连通性如何共同促进结构化人群中的合作。

title: Deep magma underpressure and connectivity drive large dike intrusions
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Large dikes are the main mechanism of crustal extension in volcanic areas, but the processes in the underlying magma system that supply the required volumes remain unclear. We show that 1.4 cubic kilometers of magma propagated under the Ethiopian rift in December 2024 and continued for ~3 months. Geodesy and seismicity reveal that the dike was fed from a network of magma reservoirs between 6 to 12 kilometers in depth with pathways rapidly forming between them. We calculate pressure changes in the reservoirs and show that underpressure developed in the deeper portion, creating the conditions to drain large magma volumes. We find that tectonic stress and availability of magma alone are not enough to drive intrusion of massive dikes. These events will start only after magma connectivity and deep underpressure develop. Similar conditions may be important for the transfer of large magma volumes from the mantle and the formation of large igneous provinces.
title_zh: 深层岩浆负压和连通性导致大型堤坝侵入
abstract_zh: 大型岩墙是火山地区地壳扩张的主要机制，但提供所需体积的底层岩浆系统的过程仍不清楚。我们发现 2024 年 12 月，1.4 立方公里的岩浆在埃塞俄比亚裂谷下传播，并持续了约 3 个月。大地测量学和地震活动表明，该堤坝的水源来自深度为 6 至 12 公里的岩浆库网络，岩浆库网络在岩浆库之间迅速形成。我们计算了储层中的压力变化，并表明在更深的部分形成了负压，为排出大量岩浆创造了条件。我们发现，仅靠构造应力和岩浆的可用性不足以驱动大规模岩墙的侵入。这些事件只有在岩浆连通和深层负压发展之后才会开始。类似的条件对于大量岩浆从地幔的转移和大型火成岩省的形成可能很重要。

source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Exploring the potential for secondary utilization of wastewater is a prudent strategy to achieve “take-make-use-reuse” circular economy. Taking advantages of wood’s hierarchical structure and large surface area, in this project, we fabricate surface-encapsulated anion-selective and cation-selective wood membranes (comprising up to 98% eco-friendly materials) through a two-step process: dip-coating with either positively charged 2(dimethylamino)ethyl methacrylate or negatively charged acrylic acid, followed by energy-efficient sunlight-induced polymerization. The output voltage and current of a single modified wood cell (20 × 20 × 3 mm3) in modulated wastewater from flue gas desulfurization are 55 mV and 0.6 µA, respectively, tenfold higher than that of untreated wood cells. When five cells are connected in series, the output voltage reaches 0.27 V, sufficient to power simple electronic devices. This underscores its potential for scaling up and its viability for future applications in industrial power plants.
title_zh: 使用木质离子选择性发电机从废水中带电的总溶解固体中连续发电
abstract_zh: 探索废水二次利用潜力是实现“取用-再利用-再利用”循环经济的审慎策略。利用木材的分层结构和大表面积的优势，在该项目中，我们通过两步工艺制造了表面封装的阴离子选择性和阳离子选择性木质膜（包含高达98％的环保材料）：用带正电的甲基丙烯酸2（二甲氨基）乙酯或带负电的丙烯酸浸涂，然后进行节能的阳光诱导聚合。烟气脱硫调制废水中单个改性木细胞​​（20×20×3 mm3）的输出电压和电流分别为 55 mV 和 0.6 µA，比未经处理的木细胞高十倍。当五个电池串联时，输出电压达到 0.27 V，足以为简单的电子设备供电。这强调了其扩大规模的潜力及其未来在工业发电厂应用的可行性。

title: Household coordination can aid solar adoption
source: Nature Energy
abstract: Coordination and active deliberation that includes the whole household can facilitate solar adoption. Interventions targeting energy adoption are likely to be more effective when they are designed to support collective decision making rather than focusing on a single member of the household.
title_zh: 家庭协调有助于太阳能的采用
abstract_zh: 整个家庭的协调和积极审议可以促进太阳能的采用。当针对能源采用的干预措施旨在支持集体决策而不是关注单个家庭成员时，它们可能会更有效。

title: Family dynamics are a missing piece in understanding residential solar adoption
source: Nature Energy
abstract: Residential solar adoption is typically conceptualized as an individual-level decision, overlooking the relational complexity that underpins household decision-making. Here we examine how intrahousehold dynamics shape solar adoption by carrying out two studies. Using interview data from 39 couples, Study 1 identified role sets: ‘in sync’, observed among adopter households and characterized by shared goals and division of labour, and ‘oppositional’, marked by disagreement and found among non-adopters. However, catalysts (for example, expiring tax credits, escalating bills) were often necessary to move in-sync households to adoption. Using surveys of lost and current adopters (N = 394), Study 2 investigated the roles of household actors: in adopter households, romantic partners and parents played larger roles, executed more tasks, initiated more discussions and expressed greater positivity than in lost-customer households. Greater household-wide support and even disagreement predicted adoption. Together, these results highlight that household coordination is critical for adoption.
title_zh: 家庭动态是理解住宅太阳能采用的缺失部分
abstract_zh: 住宅太阳能的采用通常被概念化为个人层面的决策，忽视了支撑家庭决策的关系复杂性。在这里，我们通过开展两项研究来探讨家庭内部动态如何影响太阳能的采用。研究 1 使用 39 对夫妇的访谈数据确定了角色组：“同步”，在收养家庭中观察到，其特征是共同的目标和分工；以及“对立”，以分歧为特征，在非收养者中发现。然而，催化剂（例如，即将到期的税收抵免、不断上涨的账单）通常是推动同步家庭采用的必要条件。通过对失去的和当前的收养者（N = 394）的调查，研究 2 调查了家庭参与者的角色：在收养者家庭中，浪漫伴侣和父母比失去的顾客家庭发挥更大的作用，执行更多的任务，发起更多的讨论并表现出更大的积极性。家庭范围内更大的支持甚至反对都预示着采用。总之，这些结果凸显了家庭协调对于收养至关重要。

title: A ferroelectric-induced few-nm-thick graphene membrane enables molecular sliding for ultra-fast separation
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Graphene’s atomically smooth surface offers a promising platform for achieving superlubricity, not only in solid-state contacts but also in mass transport. While its ability to minimize interfacial friction has been extensively explored in microelectromechanical systems, engines, and biomedical implants, harnessing this property for near-frictionless molecular flow to enable ultra-fast permeation remains a fundamental challenge. The principal limitation lies in the fabrication of defect-free graphene membranes with an exposed surface for probing intrinsic molecular friction and the associated transport phenomena. Here, we demonstrate a ferroelectric-polarization-assisted strategy for fabricating a 3.5 nm-thick graphene skin membrane for ultra-fast and selective separation. This is achieved by electrospinning a graphene oxide (GO)-poly(vinylidene fluoride) (PVDF) mixture, followed by thermal reduction. The crucial step involves the electric-field-induced transition of PVDF from the paraelectric (α) to the ferroelectric (β) phase, which promotes ordered chain packing and reduces the polymer’s affinity for GO, thereby driving the spontaneous segregation of GO to the PVDF nanofiber surface. The resulting graphene surface minimizes interfacial interactions with permeating molecules, reducing the molecular flow friction coefficient by 2–3 orders of magnitude. Acting either a selective layer or a support, the membrane exhibits ultra-fast permeation of water and organic solvents, surpassing current state-of-the-art membranes for water and solvent purification. For instance, water flux up to 105.1 L m-2 h-1, salt rejection of > 99.99% and long-term stability of 1000 h are achieved for desalination of hypersaline with salt concentration >150 g L-1. This work establishes a new paradigm for realizing ultra-fast molecular transport and provides a versatile platform for investigating nanoscale fluidics at material interfaces.
title_zh: 铁电诱导的几纳米厚的石墨烯膜能够实现分子滑动以实现超快速分离
abstract_zh: 石墨烯的原子级光滑表面为实现超润滑性提供了一个有前途的平台，不仅在固态接触中而且在质量传输中。虽然其最小化界面摩擦的能力已在微机电系统、发动机和生物医学植入物中得到广泛探索，但利用这一特性实现近乎无摩擦的分子流以实现超快渗透仍然是一个基本挑战。主要限制在于制造具有暴露表面的无缺陷石墨烯膜，用于探测内在分子摩擦和相关的传输现象。在这里，我们展示了一种铁电极化辅助策略，用于制造 3.5 nm 厚的石墨烯皮膜，以实现超快速和选择性分离。这是通过静电纺丝氧化石墨烯（GO）-聚偏二氟乙烯（PVDF）混合物，然后进行热还原来实现的。关键步骤涉及电场诱导 PVDF 从顺电 (α) 相转变为铁电 (β) 相，从而促进有序链堆积并降低聚合物对 GO 的亲和力，从而驱动 GO 自发偏析到 PVDF 纳米纤维表面。由此产生的石墨烯表面最大限度地减少了与渗透分子的界面相互作用，将分子流动摩擦系数降低了 2-3 个数量级。该膜既可以作为选择性层，也可以作为支撑体，对水和有机溶剂具有超快的渗透能力，超越了当前最先进的水和溶剂纯化膜。例如，水 f

title: Geopolymer-based electrolytes derived from industrial solid waste for structural energy storage
source: Joule
abstract: Turning waste into useful infrastructure is central to low-carbon energy storage. This study converts fly ash and slag into a strong, ion-conducting geopolymer electrolyte for zinc-ion brick batteries. By engineering connected pores that guide ions efficiently, the material combines mechanical durability with long-term electrochemical performance, pointing toward building components that can both bear loads and store energy.
title_zh: 来自工业固体废物的地质聚合物电解质用于结构储能
abstract_zh: 将废物转化为有用的基础设施是低碳能源存储的核心。这项研究将飞灰和矿渣转化为用于锌离子砖电池的强离子导电地质聚合物电解质。通过设计有效引导离子的连通孔，该材料将机械耐久性与长期电化学性能结合起来，指向构建既能承受负载又能储存能量的组件。

title: Self-single-atomization of active sites in electrochemical ammonia synthesis unveiled by machine learning potential
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Electrochemical NO reduction reaction (eNORR) has emerged as a promising route for the synthesis of green ammonia. Fe was observed experimentally with great activity and selectivity for eNORR to ammonia. However, we found the electrochemical performance over iron is not due to its intrinsic activity, but from an adaptive capability of self-single-atomization in operando condition. We first performed Grand Canonical Monte Carlo (GCMC) simulations driven by a machine learning potential (MLP), where we explored ∼2.5 million possible active structures and their evolution with increased electrode potential. Microkinetic modelling indicates that Fe surface will be predominantly covered by adsorbed N* species in reaction, resulting in the formation of FeNx motifs by self-single-atomizing. Statistical results indicate that the top sites of isolated FeNx motifs contribute higher activity of ammonia synthesis than bridge and hollow sites. Furthermore, based on the self-single-atomized active sites, we reproduced and rationalized the variation trends of experimental Faradaic efficiency of different products with electrode potential, verifying the reliability of proposed active site herein. Hence, we propose to make use of the self-single-atomization capability of catalysts in working conditions to construct active sites beyond ammonia synthesis.
title_zh: 机器学习潜力揭示电化学氨合成中活性位点的自单原子化
abstract_zh: 电化学NO还原反应（eNORR）已成为合成绿色氨的一种有前景的途径。实验观察到 Fe 对 eNORR 对氨具有很高的活性和选择性。然而，我们发现铁的电化学性能并不是由于其固有活性，而是源于操作条件下自单原子化的自适应能力。我们首先进行了由机器学习势 (MLP) 驱动的大正则蒙特卡罗 (GCMC) 模拟，其中我们探索了约 250 万种可能的活性结构及其随电极势增加而演化的情况。微动力学模型表明，Fe 表面将主要被反应中吸附的 N* 物质覆盖，从而通过自单原子化形成 FeNx 基序。统计结果表明，孤立的 FeNx 基序的顶部位点比桥位和空心位点贡献更高的氨合成活性。此外，基于自单原子化活性位点，我们再现并合理化了不同产品的实验法拉第效率随电极电位的变化趋势，验证了本文提出的活性位点的可靠性。因此，我们建议利用催化剂在工作条件下的自单原子化能力来构建氨合成以外的活性位点。

title: A dilute nitrate electrolyte for all-climate batteries
source: Joule
abstract: You et al. report a data-driven strategy that enables inexpensive lithium nitrate to serve as the main salt in a dilute lithium-ion battery electrolyte. The designed low-concentration electrolyte reduces cost while stabilizing battery interfaces, enabling all-climate operation in pouch cells.

abstract: This study presents a bilayer strategy employing graphene oxide and a self-assembled monolayer for Sn-Pb perovskite solar cells. This approach enables efficient and stable triple-junction all-perovskite solar cells, achieving a 27.3% efficiency alongside exceptional operational stability with a T90 of 770 h.

source: Joule
abstract: Vacuum deposition offers an industry-compatible route for perovskite solar cells, yet controlling perovskite crystallization remains challenging. Choi et al. introduce a structure-directing layer beneath a perovskite absorber and use in situ photoluminescence to monitor the nucleation, strain, and defects of perovskite, leading to efficient devices with improved stability.

title: Leveraging thermal regimes and connectivity networks to promote evolutionary adaptation across coral reef seascapes
source: One Earth
abstract: The rise of marine heat waves threatens coral reefs, potentially outpacing adaptation. Managing reef seascapes to support thermal evolution is well recognized, but specific actions and site prioritizations are only emerging. We present an operational framework that leverages heat-wave exposure and larval dispersal patterns to create reef functional units with distinct roles and management needs. Using the Great Barrier Reef, we explore the emergent management portfolio and find complementary regional priorities: protection and outplanting for assisted evolution are prioritized in southern reefs, while northern reefs serve as valuable heat-tolerant sources. Strategic, evolution-informed management is critical for reef survival as climate pressures intensify.
title_zh: 利用热状况和连接网络促进珊瑚礁海景的进化适应
abstract_zh: 海洋热浪的兴起威胁着珊瑚礁，其适应速度可能超过了珊瑚礁的适应速度。管理珊瑚礁海景以支持热演化已得到广泛认可，但具体行动和地点优先顺序才刚刚出现。我们提出了一个操作框架，利用热浪暴露和幼虫扩散模式来创建具有不同作用和管理需求的珊瑚礁功能单元。利用大堡礁，我们探索了紧急管理组合，并找到了互补的区域优先事项：南部珊瑚礁优先考虑保护和外植以辅助进化，而北部珊瑚礁则作为宝贵的耐热源。随着气候压力的加剧，基于进化的战略管理对于珊瑚礁的生存至关重要。

title: Self-reconfiguring modular robotic boats
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Self-reconfiguring aquatic robots offer promise for a wide range of marine applications, including building temporary infrastructure, remote maintenance and search-and-rescue operations, environmental monitoring, and on-demand transportation. However, achieving autonomous water-based self-reconfiguration, even in two dimensions on the water surface, remains challenging, due to complex nonlinear hydrodynamics, disturbances from self-motion and neighboring robots, as well as external environmental factors. Here, we present the FloatForm platform, a group of miniature modular robotic boats capable of self-assembling into physically connected structures, self-reconfiguring, and collectively traveling as larger assemblies via a hybrid coordination framework. Each robot unit is equipped with onboard sensing, motion control, and the ability to coordinate and physically connect with its neighbors. We demonstrate the feasibility of aquatic self-reconfiguration via hybrid coordination, where distributed controllers on each robot handle coordination tasks such as aggregating into desired shapes and avoiding collisions, while a minimalist central planner oversees the overall success of each task and fixes final imperfections. This work advances the design, control, and coordination of modular robotic systems in aquatic environments, enabling flexible, robust, and scalable applications on the water.
title_zh: 自重构模块化机器人船
abstract_zh: 自重构水生机器人为广泛的海洋应用提供了前景，包括建造临时基础设施、远程维护和搜救行动、环境监测和按需运输。然而，由于复杂的非线性流体动力学、自运动和邻近机器人的干扰以及外部环境因素，即使在水面的二维空间中实现自主的水基自重构仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们展示了 FloatForm 平台，这是一组微型模块化机器人船，能够自组装成物理连接的结构、自重新配置，并通过混合协调框架作为更大的组件集体行驶。每个机器人单元都配备了机载传感、运动控制以及与其邻居协调和物理连接的能力。我们证明了通过混合协调进行水生自我重构的可行性，其中每个机器人上的分布式控制器处理协调任务，例如聚合成所需的形状和避免碰撞，而极简中央规划器则监督每个任务的整体成功并修复最终的缺陷。这项工作推进了水生环境中模块化机器人系统的设计、控制和协调，实现了灵活、稳健和可扩展的水上应用。

title: Unravelling the key factors governing O2 evolution upon charging a reversible LiOH-based nonaqueous Li | |O2 battery
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Achieving a reversible four-electron-per-oxygen-molecule oxygen evolution reaction is an essential yet highly challenging task for nonaqueous lithium hydroxide-based Li | |O2 batteries, as the kinetically sluggish oxygen evolution reaction tends to entangle with competing parasitic reactions, whose origins and mitigating strategies remain largely elusive. Here we construct a highly reversible lithium hydroxide-based Li | |O2 battery using iron–cobalt–nickel layered double hydroxide catalysts and tetramethylene sulfone-based electrolytes. Lithium hydroxide decomposition toward oxygen evolution involves key reactive oxygen species of surface-bound hydroxyl and hydroxyl radicals, but no singlet oxygen. These hydroxyl species corrode the electrolyte and carbon support, predominantly accounting for charging irreversibility. While oxidation-resistant solvents and electrical conductors are necessary to reduce hydroxyl-induced side reactions, the synergistic interplay of interfacial water solvation and catalytic surface structures hold the key to steering hydroxyl activity toward the desirable oxygen evolution reaction or by-product formation. This work offers insights into achieving long-life lithium hydroxide-based Li | |O2 batteries.
title_zh: 揭示在充电可逆 LiOH 基非水锂时控制 O2 释放的关键因素 | |氧气电池
abstract_zh: 对于非水氢氧化锂基锂来说，实现可逆的每个氧分子四个电子的析氧反应是一项重要但极具挑战性的任务。 |氧气电池，因为动力学缓慢的析氧反应往往会与竞争性的寄生反应纠缠在一起，而其起源和缓解策略在很大程度上仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们构建了一种高度可逆的氢氧化锂基Li | |使用铁-钴-镍层状双氢氧化物催化剂和四亚甲基砜基电解质的O2电池。氢氧化锂向氧气释放的分解涉及表面结合的羟基和羟基自由基的关键活性氧物种，但不涉及单线态氧。这些羟基物质会腐蚀电解质和碳载体，这主要是造成充电不可逆性的原因。虽然抗氧化溶剂和电导体对于减少羟基引起的副反应是必要的，但界面水溶剂化和催化表面结构的协同相互作用是控制羟基活性转向所需的析氧反应或副产物形成的关键。这项工作为实现长寿命氢氧化锂基锂提供了见解。 |氧气电池。

title: An adaptive modeling method with optimal order selection for thermostatically controlled loads
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Applied Energy
title_zh: 一种具有最佳阶数选择的恒温控制负载的自适应建模方法

title: Lysosome self-sorting nanodegraders for hepatic clearance of pathogenic serum mediators
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Extracellular targeted protein degradation is an emerging therapeutic strategy but has been rarely explored for clearing circulating pathogenic mediators. Here we report stiffness-oriented lysosome self-sorting nanodegraders (SOLIDs) for hepatic lysosomal degradation of serum immune mediators. SOLIDs feature a rigid semiconducting polymer core that is revealed for the first time to confer near-quantitative lysosomal accumulation across diverse cell types. After surface bioconjugation, SOLIDs capture the immune mediators of interest from blood via controlled protein corona formation. The resulting corona composition directs biodistribution, producing predominant accumulation in the liver, where they get degraded in hepatic lysosomes. We show that IL-6-capturing SOLIDs reduced serum IL-6 by an additional 70% versus IL-6 antibody therapy and increased 7-day survival in a murine sepsis model from 0% to 66.7%. In an acute lung injury model, CpG-capturing SOLIDs reduced pulmonary immune cell infiltration 1.7-fold relative to CpG neutralization and suppressed expression of co-stimulatory molecules. This work identifies nanoparticle mechanics as a critical factor in organelle targeting and proposes a nano-therapeutic approach for the degradation of pathogenic serum biomolecules.
title_zh: 溶酶体自分选纳米降解剂用于肝脏清除致病性血清介质
abstract_zh: 细胞外靶向蛋白质降解是一种新兴的治疗策略，但很少探索用于清除循环致病介质。在这里，我们报告了用于血清免疫介质的肝溶酶体降解的刚性导向溶酶体自排序纳米降解剂（SOLID）。固体具有刚性半导体聚合物核心，首次揭示了该核心可在不同细胞类型中实现近乎定量的溶酶体积累。表面生物共轭后，SOLID 通过受控的蛋白质电晕形成从血液中捕获感兴趣的免疫介质。由此产生的电晕成分指导生物分布，在肝脏中产生主要积累，并在肝溶酶体中被降解。我们发现，与 IL-6 抗体疗法相比，捕获 IL-6 的 SOLID 可使血清 IL-6 额外降低 70%，并将小鼠脓毒症模型中的 7 天存活率从 0% 提高到 66.7%。在急性肺损伤模型中，与 CpG 中和相比，捕获 CpG 的 SOLID 使肺部免疫细胞浸润减少了 1.7 倍，并抑制了共刺激分子的表达。这项工作将纳米颗粒力学确定为细胞器靶向的关键因素，并提出了一种降解致病性血清生物分子的纳米治疗方法。

title: Toward trustworthy AI in real-time event-driven power system emergency control: A knowledge-surrogate-guided deep learning approach
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Applied Energy
title_zh: 在实时事件驱动的电力系统应急控制中迈向值得信赖的人工智能：知识替代引导的深度学习方法

title: Pathways to cost competitive and viable lithium production from Salton Sea geothermal brines
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Lithium supply chains remain heavily concentrated in hard rock and brine resources, creating significant supply risks. Geothermal brines represent an underutilized alternative, yet commercial progress is hindered by the absence of facility-scale cost assessments. Here, we present a techno-economic analysis of large-scale lithium extraction from Salton Sea geothermal brines, drawing on primary company disclosures, process patents, and brine resource modeling. Caused by varying lithium and impurity concentrations, brine dilution over time, and process configurations (e.g., production via carbonation and conversion vs. electrolysis), we find that large-scale production costs may reach ~10,000 United States dollars per ton, but increase up to 22,000 United States dollars per ton with higher certainty of brine modeling, raising concerns about economic competitiveness to conventional low-cost sources. Finally, a project feasibility-focused scenario analyses shows that leveraging brine pre-treatment by-product sales could lower long-term lithium break-even prices by ~5,000 United States dollars per ton, whereas capital cost optimization of 20% could further reduce lithium break-even prices by 10%.
title_zh: 从索尔顿海地热盐水中生产具有成本竞争力且可行的锂的途径
abstract_zh: 锂供应链仍然严重集中在硬岩和盐水资源中，造成了巨大的供应风险。地热盐水是一种未得到充分利用的替代方案，但由于缺乏设施规模的成本评估，商业进展受到阻碍。在这里，我们利用公司的主要披露信息、工艺专利和卤水资源模型，对从索尔顿海地热盐水中大规模提取锂进行了技术经济分析。由于锂和杂质浓度的变化、盐水随时间的稀释以及工艺配置（例如，通过碳酸化和转化与电解进行生产），我们发现大规模生产成本可能达到每吨约 10,000 美元，但随着盐水建模的确定性更高，每吨成本将增加至 22,000 美元，这引发了人们对传统低成本来源的经济竞争力的担忧。最后，以项目可行性为重点的情景分析表明，利用盐水预处理副产品销售可以将长期锂盈亏平衡价格降低约5,000美元/吨，而资本成本优化20%可以进一步将锂盈亏平衡价格降低10%。

title: Eight-qubit operation of a 300 mm SiMOS foundry-fabricated device
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Silicon spin qubits are a promising platform for quantum computing due to their high coherence, controllability, and CMOS manufacturability, yet scalable implementations have so far been limited to a few qubits. Here, to take a step towards larger qubit systems, we tune and coherently control an eight-dot linear array of silicon spin qubits fabricated in a 300 mm CMOS-compatible foundry process, establishing operational scalability beyond the two-qubit regime. All eight qubits are successfully tuned and characterized as four double-dot pairs, exhibiting Ramsey dephasing times T2∗" role="presentation">T2∗{T}_{2}^{*} up to 41(2) μs and Hahn-echo coherence times T2Hahn" role="presentation">T2Hahn{T}_{2}^{{{{\rm{Hahn}}}}} up to 1.31(4) ms. Readout of the central four qubits is achieved via a cascaded charge-sensing protocol, enabling high-fidelity measurements of the entire multi-qubit array in a two step process. Additionally, we demonstrate a two-qubit gate operation between adjacent qubits with low phase noise. We show that silicon spin qubit arrays can be scaled to medium-sized arrays of 8 qubits while maintaining system coherence.
title_zh: 300 mm SiMOS 代工制造器件的八量子位运行
abstract_zh: 硅自旋量子位因其高相干性、可控性和 CMOS 可制造性而成为量子计算的一个有前途的平台，但迄今为止可扩展的实现仅限于几个量子位。在这里，为了向更大的量子位系统迈出一步，我们调整并连贯地控制在 300 mm CMOS 兼容铸造工艺中制造的硅自旋量子位的八点线性阵列，建立超越两个量子位体系的操作可扩展性。所有八个量子位都成功调谐并表征为四个双点对，拉姆齐相干时间 T2*" role="presentation">T2*{T}_{2}^{*} 高达 41(2) μs，哈恩回波相干时间 T2Hahn" role="presentation">T2Hahn{T}_{2}^{{{{\rm{Hahn}}}}} 高达 1.31(4)女士。中央四个量子位的读出是通过级联电荷传感协议实现的，从而能够在两步过程中对整个多量子位阵列进行高保真测量。此外，我们还演示了具有低相位噪声的相邻量子位之间的双量子位门操作。我们证明，硅自旋量子位阵列可以扩展到 8 个量子位的中型阵列，同时保持系统的一致性。

title: Force-based reading and writing of individual single-atom magnets
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The integration of single-atom bits enables the realization of the highest data-density memory. Reading and writing information to these bits through mechanical interactions opens the possibility of operating the magnetic devices with low heat generation and high density recording. To achieve this visionary goal, we demonstrate the use of magnetic exchange force microscopy to read and write the spin orientation of individual holmium adatoms on MgO thin films. The spin orientation of the holmium adatom is stabilized by the strong uniaxial anisotropy of the adsorption site and can be read out by measuring the exchange forces between the magnetic tip and the atom. The spin orientation can be written by approaching the tip closer to the holmium adatom. We explain this writing mechanism by the symmetry reduction of the adsorption site of the Ho adatom. These findings demonstrate the potential for information storage with minimal energy loss and pave the way for a new field of atomic-scale mechano-spintronics.
title_zh: 基于力的单个单原子磁体的读写
abstract_zh: 单原子位的集成可以实现最高数据密度的存储器。通过机械相互作用向这些位读取和写入信息开启了以低热量产生和高密度记录操作磁性设备的可能性。为了实现这一愿景，我们演示了使用磁交换力显微镜来读取和写入 MgO 薄膜上单个钬吸附原子的自旋方向。钬吸附原子的自旋方向通过吸附位点的强单轴各向异性来稳定，并且可以通过测量磁性尖端和原子之间的交换力来读出。自旋方向可以通过使尖端更靠近钬吸附原子来写入。我们通过Ho吸附原子吸附位点的对称性还原来解释这种写入机制。这些发现证明了以最小能量损失存储信息的潜力，并为原子级机械自旋电子学的新领域铺平了道路。

title: Deep Learning Predicts Dissimilar DNA-DNA Binding and Engineers Hyperconnected Networks
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Common frameworks in molecular bioengineering and synthetic biology focus on orthogonality, viewing weak or non-specific interactions as problems to avoid. This constrains the usable sequence space, limits scalability, and neglects scenarios where synthetic systems must operate within natural backgrounds of high sequence diversity. Harnessing the full space is difficult because models are lacking that can accurately and quickly predict non-orthogonal interactions and be validated against ground truth data. Here we develop BINND — Binding and Interaction Neural Network for DNA — using DNA-DNA interactions as a testbed. BINND combines an ultra-high throughput platform measuring millions of interactions with a deep learning model attaining accuracies above 80%, generalizing across diverse sequences and running 50 times faster than current models. We demonstrate its value with a searchable DNA network of fictitious storybook characters. BINND enables accurate prediction for diagnostics, bioengineering, and DNA origami, supporting a shift toward exploiting the full sequence space.
title_zh: 深度学习预测不同的 DNA-DNA 结合并设计超连接网络
abstract_zh: 分子生物工程和合成生物学的通用框架侧重于正交性，将弱或非特异性相互作用视为需要避免的问题。这限制了可用的序列空间，限制了可扩展性，并忽略了合成系统必须在高序列多样性的自然背景下运行的场景。利用整个空间很困难，因为缺乏能够准确、快速预测非正交相互作用并根据地面实况数据进行验证的模型。在这里，我们使用 DNA-DNA 相互作用作为测试平台开发 BINND（DNA 结合和相互作用神经网络）。 BINND 将测量数百万次交互的超高吞吐量平台与深度学习模型相结合，准确率达到 80% 以上，可泛化不同的序列，运行速度比当前模型快 50 倍。我们通过虚构故事书中人物的可搜索 DNA 网络展示了它的价值。 BINND 能够准确预测诊断、生物工程和 DNA 折纸，支持向利用完整序列空间的转变。

title: Realization of the Bienenstock-Cooper-Munro rule in a single memristor
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Neuromorphic computing aims to build electronic systems that mimic the brain’s remarkable efficiency and adaptability. A key feature of brain is homeostatic plasticity, which stabilizes neural activity; the Bienenstock–Cooper–Munro (BCM) rule accurately describes this by adjusting a neuron’s sensitivity threshold based on past activity. However, implementing the homeostatic rule in synaptic device remains challenging. Here we show that a CuInP₂S₆ memristor naturally realizes the complete BCM rule. We reveal that the device’s intrinsic junction capacitance generates reverse spikes that cause spike-rate-dependent conductance depression, combining with second-order ionic dynamics to replicate key BCM features. Through simulations, we demonstrate that adding a similar capacitance can universally enable this behavior in conventional memristors. Finally, we build a physical reservoir computing system based on this strategy that exhibits robust, noise-tolerant spatiotemporal processing. This work provides a viable path for deploying adaptive homeostatic plasticity in hardware, enhancing the reliability of neuromorphic systems.
title_zh: 在单个忆阻器中实现 Bienenstock-Cooper-Munro 规则
abstract_zh: 神经形态计算旨在构建模仿大脑卓越效率和适应性的电子系统。大脑的一个关键特征是稳态可塑性，它可以稳定神经活动。 Bienenstock-Cooper-Munro (BCM) 规则通过根据过去的活动调整神经元的敏感度阈值准确地描述了这一点。然而，在突触装置中实施稳态规则仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们展示了 CuInP2S₆ 忆阻器自然地实现了完整的 BCM 规则。我们发现，该器件的固有结电容会产生反向尖峰，从而导致尖峰速率相关的电导下降，并与二阶离子动力学相结合来复制关键的 BCM 特征。通过模拟，我们证明添加类似的电容可以在传统忆阻器中普遍实现这种行为。最后，我们基于该策略构建了一个物理油藏计算系统，该系统具有鲁棒、耐噪声的时空处理能力。这项工作为在硬件中部署自适应稳态可塑性提供了一条可行的途径，从而增强了神经形态系统的可靠性。

title: Dynamic and synergic effects of energy transition, carbon policy and trade conflicts: A mixed-frequency approach
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Energy Policy
title_zh: 能源转型、碳政策和贸易冲突的动态和协同效应：混合频率方法

title: Bound states in doped charge transfer insulators
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Understanding the physics of doped charge transfer insulators is the most important problem in high-temperature superconductivity. In this work, we show that an in-gap bound state emerges from the localized hole of the doped charge transfer insulator. We propose an approximate ground state wavefunction based on one localized Zhang-Rice singlet and the Néel state. By calculating the excitation states with one hole added and removed from this ground state, we successfully identify the existence of bound states inside the charge transfer gap. This feature is further confirmed by a Lanczos calculation based on matrix product states (MPS) for a system of 4 × 4 CuO2 unit cells. How these bound states evolve into metallic states is further discussed. Our findings identify the key component of recent STM results on lightly doped Ca2CuO2Cl2 and provide a new understanding of hole-doped charge transfer insulators.
title_zh: 掺杂电荷转移绝缘体中的束缚态
abstract_zh: 了解掺杂电荷转移绝缘体的物理原理是高温超导中最重要的问题。在这项工作中，我们证明了带隙内束缚态从掺杂电荷转移绝缘体的局域空穴中出现。我们提出了一种基于局部张赖斯单线态和尼尔态的近似基态波函数。通过计算在基态上添加和去除一个空穴的激发态，我们成功地识别了电荷转移间隙内束缚态的存在。基于 4 × 4 CuO2 晶胞系统的矩阵积态 (MPS) 的 Lanczos 计算进一步证实了这一特性。进一步讨论了这些束缚态如何演化成金属态。我们的研究结果确定了轻掺杂 Ca2CuO2Cl2 近期 STM 结果的关键组成部分，并提供了对空穴掺杂电荷转移绝缘体的新认识。

title: Reversibly Stacked Monolithic 3D Integrated Circuits
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Monolithic three-dimensional integration enables dense vertical stacking of devices with fine-pitch interconnects, offering a promising route toward high-density, energy-efficient logic and memory systems. However, its implementation is constrained by the thermal budget of back-end-of-line processes, which must remain below 400 °C to avoid degrading underlying circuitry. While various low-temperature semiconductors have been explored, current demonstrations remain confined to fixed stacking sequences due to high-temperature growth or transfer requirements. Here, we demonstrate a M3D complementary field-effect transistor architecture using low-temperature-deposited n-type In2O3 and p-type Te semiconductors. This platform resolves existing thermal constraints, demonstrating the design freedom to reverse n- and p-type sequences. This capability enables the integration of CMOS inverters, multilayer logic stacks, and a fully functional 3D SRAM storage cell, all fabricated below 300 °C. This scalable platform provides a practical pathway for constructing vertically integrated complementary logic with intrinsic interconnects, paving the way for next-generation 3D system-on-chip technologies.
title_zh: 可逆堆叠单片 3D 集成电路
abstract_zh: 单片三维集成可实现具有细间距互连的器件的密集垂直堆叠，为实现高密度、节能逻辑和存储系统提供了一条有前途的途径。然而，其实施受到后端工艺热预算的限制，后端工艺必须保持在 400°C 以下，以避免降低底层电路的性能。尽管已经探索了各种低温半导体，但由于高温生长或转移要求，当前的演示仍然局限于固定的堆叠顺序。在这里，我们展示了使用低温沉积的 n 型 In2O3 和 p 型 Te 半导体的 M3D 互补场效应晶体管架构。该平台解决了现有的热限制，展示了反转 n 型和 p 型序列的设计自由度。此功能可实现 CMOS 反相器、多层逻辑堆栈和功能齐全的 3D SRAM 存储单元的集成，所有这些均在 300 °C 以下制造。该可扩展平台为构建具有内在互连的垂直集成互补逻辑提供了实用途径，为下一代 3D 片上系统技术铺平了道路。

title: Author Correction: Photothermal effects control ultrafast charge transport in titanium carbide MXenes
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
title_zh: 作者更正：光热效应控制碳化钛 MXene 中的超快电荷传输

title: Propagation effects in high harmonic generation media driven by bright squeezed vacuum light
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Recent developments in quantum light engineering have enabled the use of infrared bright squeezed vacuum (BSV) femtosecond pulses in nonlinear optics, including strong-field physics and high-harmonic generation. However, theory has focused on single-atom interactions, neglecting the crucial macroscopic aspect of light propagation through media. This raises a key question: How does BSV propagate in nonlinear media, and how this affects the nonlinear signals and the radiation’s quantumness? We address this with a fully quantized framework for propagation in gas media undergoing high-harmonic generation. We find that ionization and the associated photon losses cause decoherence, which limits the propagation length, degrades radiation’s quantumness, and reduces the emitted harmonics. However, these effects are not detrimental. We identify conditions that minimize propagation-induced decoherence while preserving detectable harmonics with super-Poissonian photon statistics. Our results establish fully quantized basis for exploring BSV in nonlinear optics, strong-field-quantum optics, and ultrafast science in all states of matter.
title_zh: 明亮压缩真空光驱动的高次谐波产生介质中的传播效应
abstract_zh: 量子光工程的最新发展使得红外亮压缩真空（BSV）飞秒脉冲能够在非线性光学中使用，包括强场物理和高次谐波产生。然而，理论集中于单原子相互作用，忽略了光通过介质传播的关键宏观方面。这就提出了一个关键问题：BSV 如何在非线性介质中传播，以及这如何影响非线性信号和辐射的量子性？我们通过一个完全量化的框架来解决这个问题，该框架用于在发生高次谐波产生的气体介质中传播。我们发现电离和相关的光子损失会导致退相干，从而限制传播长度，降低辐射的量子性，并减少发射的谐波。然而，这些影响并不是有害的。我们确定了最小化传播引起的退相干的条件，同时通过超泊松光子统计保留可检测的谐波。我们的结果为在所有物质状态下探索非线性光学、强场量子光学和超快科学中的 BSV 奠定了完全量化的基础。

title: Rapid quasi-periodic reconfiguration of the accretion column in pulsar 1A 0535+262
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Accretion onto strongly magnetised neutron stars is commonly interpreted using quasi-steady models, in which the accretion-column structure adjusts smoothly to the mass inflow rate. The cyclotron line in the X-ray spectrum, whose centroid energy traces the magnetic field strength and thus the height of the line-forming region, provides a key diagnostic of this structure. Whether this simple quasi-steady description remains valid on short dynamical timescales has remained uncertain. Here we show that, during a giant outburst of the X-ray pulsar 1A 0535+262, quasi-periodic hard X-ray flux variations are accompanied by synchronised oscillations of the cyclotron line energy, with amplitudes exceeding those expected from simple accretion-rate fluctuations. The anti-correlation between cyclotron energy and apparent flux provides direct spectral-timing evidence for rapid changes in the line-forming region, which we interpret as geometric reconfiguration of the accretion column. The variability emerges in the luminosity regime where radiation pressure becomes dynamically important. These results reveal limitations of a simple quasi-steady interpretation for this source and suggest that radiation-supported columns can enter intrinsically dynamical states in high-luminosity accreting pulsars.
title_zh: 脉冲星 1A 0535+262 中吸积柱的快速准周期重构
abstract_zh: 强磁化中子星上的吸积通常使用准稳态模型来解释，其中吸积柱结构平滑地调整到质量流入速率。 X射线光谱中的回旋加速器线，其质心能量追踪磁场强度，从而追踪线形成区域的高度，提供了对该结构的关键诊断。这种简单的准稳态描述在短动态时间尺度上是否仍然有效仍然不确定。在这里，我们表明，在 X 射线脉冲星 1A 0535+262 的巨大爆发期间，准周期硬 X 射线通量变化伴随着回旋加速器线能量的同步振荡，其幅度超出了简单吸积率波动所预期的幅度。回旋加速器能量和表观通量之间的反相关性为线形成区域的快速变化提供了直接的光谱定时证据，我们将其解释为吸积柱的几何重新配置​​。变化性出现在光度范围内，其中辐射压变得动态重要。这些结果揭示了对该源的简单准稳态解释的局限性，并表明辐射支持的柱可以在高光度吸积脉冲星中进入本质动态状态。

title: Unveiling surface and subsurface atomic vacancies in MoS2 with lateral force microscopy
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Atomic-scale defects govern materials properties, with their influence amplified in low-dimensional systems. Understanding and controlling such defects is therefore essential for both fundamental science and technological applications. However, precise defect identification and localization remain major challenges. Lateral force microscopy (LFM), an atomic force microscopy mode that measures friction forces through the lateral torsion of the cantilever, is an appealing technique for probing surface properties. Nevertheless, it has conventionally been regarded as insensitive to structural features beneath the topmost atomic layer. In this study, we overturn this paradigm by demonstrating that LFM can not only detect but also classify atomic vacancies in MoS2 according to their depth. By combining experiments with molecular dynamics and Prandtl-Tomlinson (PT) modeling, we identify unique frictional fingerprints associated with each defect type: surface vacancies produce a characteristic ’drop-and-rise’ signature, whereas subsurface vacancies generate a pronounced exit barrier without an entry drop. While molecular dynamics validates these specific MoS2 signatures, the PT model reveals a generic, geometric lattice-disruption mechanism, extending the validity of our findings beyond MoS2. Furthermore, we apply these findings to compare the defect density and defect types in MoS2 flakes obtained via chemical vapor deposition (CVD) and mechanical exfoliation.
title_zh: 用横向力显微镜揭示 MoS2 中的表面和次表面原子空位
abstract_zh: 原子尺度的缺陷控制着材料的特性，其影响在低维系统中被放大。因此，了解和控制这些缺陷对于基础科学和技术应用都至关重要。然而，精确的缺陷识别和定位仍然是主要挑战。横向力显微镜 (LFM) 是一种通过悬臂横向扭转测量摩擦力的原子力显微镜模式，是探测表面特性的一种颇具吸引力的技术。然而，传统上它被认为对最顶层原子层下方的结构特征不敏感。在本研究中，我们通过证明 LFM 不仅可以检测而且可以根据深度对 MoS2 中的原子空位进行分类，从而推翻了这一范式。通过将实验与分子动力学和 Prandtl-Tomlinson (PT) 模型相结合，我们确定了与每种缺陷类型相关的独特摩擦指纹：表面空位产生特征性的“下降和上升”特征，而地下空位则产生明显的出口势垒，而没有入口下降。虽然分子动力学验证了这些特定的 MoS2 特征，但 PT 模型揭示了一种通用的几何晶格破坏机制，将我们研究结果的有效性扩展到 MoS2 之外。此外，我们应用这些发现来比较通过化学气相沉积 (CVD) 和机械剥离获得的 MoS2 薄片中的缺陷密度和缺陷类型。

title: Kekulé superconductivity in twisted magic angle bilayer graphene
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: While it has been one of the most important new physics discoveries in the last decade, the nature of superconductivity in the twisted graphene family remains an unsolved problem. Motivated by recent scanning tunneling experiments that report Kekulé ordering in moiré graphene superconductors, we develop a microscopic theory of this superconductivity for the twisted bilayer system. The pairing we find is an intra-valley, finite-momentum pair-density wave (PDW) that intrinsically carries a Kekulé modulation. This state exhibits four salient features: (i) spontaneous breaking of C3 rotation symmetry, producing nematic order; (ii) triplet pairing; and (iii) a quasiparticle density of states that evolves from a V-shaped profile to a fully gapped, U-shaped spectrum as the attraction increases, which is accompanied by (iv) systematic behavior of the temperature dependent zero bias conductance. These features align with key experimental signatures. We find, as well, that with only modest interaction strengths, the state is near to a BEC-like phase, consistent with the observed extremely short coherence lengths. Taken together, these results identify a microscopic intra-valley Kekulé PDW as a compelling candidate for unconventional superconductivity in the twisted graphene family.
title_zh: 扭曲魔角双层石墨烯中的凯库勒超导
abstract_zh: 虽然它是过去十年中最重要的新物理发现之一，但扭曲石墨烯家族的超导性质仍然是一个未解决的问题。受最近报告莫尔石墨烯超导体凯库勒有序的扫描隧道实验的启发，我们开发了扭曲双层系统超导性的微观理论。我们发现的配对是谷内有限动量配对密度波（PDW），本质上带有凯库勒调制。这种状态表现出四个显着特征：（i）C3旋转对称性自发破缺，产生向列有序； (ii) 三联体配对； (iii) 随着吸引力的增加，准粒子态密度从 V 形轮廓演变为完全带隙的 U 形谱，同时伴随着 (iv) 温度相关的零偏置电导的系统行为。这些功能与关键的实验特征相一致。我们还发现，只要有适度的相互作用强度，该状态就接近类似 BEC 的相位，这与观察到的极短相干长度一致。综上所述，这些结果表明微观谷内 Kekulé PDW 是扭曲石墨烯家族中非常规超导性的有力候选者。

title: Fractal hierarchy enables exponential scaling of topological boundary states
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Exponential growth describes an extremely rapid process ubiquitous in mathematics and across diverse physical, biological, and technological systems. Here, we introduce a class of fractal-inspired lattices that combine long-range periodic order with self-similar hierarchy, establishing a structural motif that enables exponential scaling of topological boundary states. We demonstrate this phenomenon in (i) a quasi-one-dimensional lattice chain constructed from Koch-curve unit cells and (ii) a two-dimensional periodic tiling lattice composed of Sierpiński-gasket unit cells. We show that, for suitable coupling parameters, both the number of topological boundary states Nℓ" role="presentation">Nℓ{N}_{{\ell}} and the number of topological minigaps Mℓ" role="presentation">Mℓ{M}_{{\ell}} grow exponentially with the fractal generation index ℓ" role="presentation">ℓ{\ell}. We find that Nℓ" role="presentation">Nℓ{N}_{{\ell}} is an integer multiple of Mℓ" role="presentation">Mℓ{M}_{{\ell}}, with the integer determined by the underlying symmetry. This hierarchical scaling law is captured by the multi-topological-phase theory and confirmed experimentally in laser-written photonic lattices. Our results identify fractal hierarchy as a design principle for controlling boundary-state multiplicity, revealing a fundamental interplay between topology, self-similar geometry, and periodic order. More broadly, this work suggests a route toward synthetic materials and integrated photonic platforms in which large numbers of robust boundary modes can be engineered within hierarchically structured architectures.
title_zh: 分形层次结构可以实现拓扑边界状态的指数缩放
abstract_zh: 指数增长描述了数学中以及不同的物理、生物和技术系统中普遍存在的极其快速的过程。在这里，我们引入了一类受分形启发的晶格，它将长程周期顺序与自相似层次结构相结合，建立了一个能够实现拓扑边界状态指数缩放的结构基序。我们在（i）由科赫曲线晶胞构成的准一维晶格链和（ii）由谢尔宾斯基垫片晶胞构成的二维周期性平铺晶格中证明了这种现象。我们发现，对于合适的耦合参数，拓扑边界态的数量 Nℓ" role="presentation">Nℓ{N}_{{\ell}} 和拓扑小间隙的数量 Mℓ" role="presentation">Mℓ{M}_{{\ell}} 随着分形生成指数 ℓ" role="presentation">ℓ{\ell} 呈指数增长。我们发现 Nℓ" role="presentation">Nℓ{N}_{{\ell}} 是 Mℓ" role="presentation">Mℓ{M}_{{\ell}} 的整数倍，其整数由基础对称性决定。这种分层缩放定律由多拓扑相理论捕获，并在激光写入光子晶格中得到实验证实。我们的结果将分形层次确定为控制边界态多重性的设计原理，揭示了拓扑之间的基本相互作用，更广泛地说，这项工作提出了一条通往合成材料和集成光子平台的途径，在该平台中可以设计大量鲁棒的边界模式。

title: Direct correspondence between liquid and glass polymorphism in densely packed metallic alloys
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Liquid and glass are two closely related disordered states of matter. Whether each can exhibit two or more structurally distinct yet chemically identical forms have been debated for decades and the relationship between polymorphism in equilibrium liquids and that in non-equilibrium glasses remains elusive. Here, we address these long-standing issues in two prototype glass-forming metallic alloys using in situ high-pressure high-temperature synchrotron X-ray diffraction in diamond anvil cells. We identify distinct liquids above their melting temperatures and corresponding glasses formed upon melt quenching at different pressures, as evidenced by reproducible discontinuous changes in multiple diffraction-derived structural descriptors. Comprehensive structural and compositional characterizations consistently demonstrate that the recovered samples are fully amorphous and chemically homogeneous glasses. By continuously monitoring the formation and transformation pathways with in situ structural probes, our study provides compelling experimental evidence for the more general existence of liquid and glass polymorphism in densely packed metallic alloy systems.
title_zh: 致密金属合金中液体和玻璃多晶型之间的直接对应关系
abstract_zh: 液体和玻璃是两种密切相关的无序物质状态。每种物质是否可以表现出两种或多种结构上不同但化学上相同的形式已经争论了几十年，平衡液体中的多晶型与非平衡玻璃中的多晶型之间的关系仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们利用金刚石砧池中的原位高压高温同步加速器 X 射线衍射技术解决了两种原型玻璃形成金属合金中长期存在的问题。我们识别出高于其熔化温度的不同液体以及在不同压力下熔融淬火时形成的相应玻璃，如多个衍射衍生的结构描述符中可再现的不连续变化所证明的那样。全面的结构和成分表征一致表明，回收的样品是完全无定形且化学均匀的玻璃。通过使用原位结构探针持续监测形成和转变途径，我们的研究为密集金属合金系统中更普遍存在液体和玻璃多晶型现象提供了令人信服的实验证据。

title: Why cities cannot learn
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: For most of the world’s urban history, changes in policies and responses to hazards have proceeded on a timescale that made adaptation possible, however slow or politically contested. The Great Fire of London in 1666 produced building regulations within 2 years of the devastating blaze. Repeated flooding events along the Rhine and Danube Rivers through the late 20th century spurred zoning rules and hazard mapping that are now standard across Europe’s urban planning systems. What drove these improvements was a general pathway in which disruption produced evidence, evidence generated pressure, and pressure forced modifications by agencies responsible for governing a city’s well-being. However, that process has been degrading across every inhabited continent. What has emerged in its place is a volatile urbanism that is threatening resilience.
title_zh: 为什么城市无法学习
abstract_zh: 对于世界上大多数城市历史来说，政策和灾害应对措施的变化都在一定的时间范围内进行，使得适应成为可能，无论速度多么缓慢或存在政治争议。 1666 年伦敦大火在毁灭性大火发生后的两年内制定了建筑法规。 20 世纪末，莱茵河和多瑙河沿岸反复发生的洪水事件催生了分区规则和灾害图绘制，这些规则和灾害图现已成为欧洲城市规划系统的标准。推动这些改进的是一个普遍途径，在这个途径中，破坏产生证据，证据产生压力，压力迫使负责管理城市福祉的机构进行修改。然而，这一进程在每个有人居住的大陆上都在恶化。取而代之的是不稳定的城市化，威胁着恢复力。

title: Leaping out of the water: Aerial-aquatic locomotion with flapping wings
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Wing-propelled diving birds flap their wings to move through air and water, yet the wing morphology and kinematics that enable this behavior remain poorly understood because of the difficulty of collecting in situ data. The impact of flapping frequency, wing size, and stiffness on locomotion in—and transition between—the two media are still unknown. We compared data from diving birds against experiments using a flapping-wing robot capable of flying, swimming, plunge diving, and exiting the water. We show that frequency adaptation, flexible wings, and powerful actuation enable seamless transitions without folding wings or legs, that large wings enhance flight without substantially reducing underwater efficiency, and that tail-body distance and egress angle affect water exit. These results clarify how birds (and robots) balance multifluid locomotion constraints.
title_zh: 跃出水面：扑动翅膀的空中-水中运动
abstract_zh: 用翅膀驱动的潜水鸟拍动翅膀在空气和水中移动，但由于现场数据收集困难，导致这种行为的翅膀形态和运动学仍然知之甚少。扑动频率、机翼尺寸和刚度对两种介质中的运动以及两种介质之间的过渡的影响仍然未知。我们将潜水鸟类的数据与使用能够飞行、游泳、跳水和离开水面的扑翼机器人的实验进行了比较。我们表明，频率适应、灵活的机翼和强大的驱动可以实现无缝过渡，而无需折叠机翼或腿，大机翼可以增强飞行而不显着降低水下效率，尾体距离和出口角度会影响出水。这些结果阐明了鸟类（和机器人）如何平衡多流体运动约束。

title: Degron-independent recruitment of KAT2A expands the target space of CRBN molecular glues
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Lysine acetyltransferases (KATs) cooperate with oncogenes such as c-Myc, estrogen receptor, and lysine methyltransferase 2A (KMT2A) fusions to sustain malignant programs. Targeting of KAT proteins has shown clinical efficacy; however, achieving homolog selectivity for most KATs remains a major challenge. By extending cereblon (CRBN)–based molecular glues beyond the canonical degron space, we developed an exquisitely selective degrader of KAT2A. Cryo–electron microscopy revealed that CRBN recruits KAT2A independently of a degron; instead, the molecular glue engages a surface-exposed tyrosine, mimicking antibody-like molecular recognition. Selective KAT2A degradation leads to potent ablation of histone H3 lysine 9 acetylation (H3K9Ac), antiproliferative effects in acute myeloid leukemia cell lines, and in vivo efficacy in a patient-derived xenograft model, establishing KAT2A as a targetable vulnerability to treat a wide range of malignancies. More generally, degron-independent recruitment extends the CRBN-targetable proteome.
title_zh: KAT2A 独立于降解决定子的招募扩大了 CRBN 分子胶的靶空间
abstract_zh: 赖氨酸乙酰转移酶 (KAT) 与 c-Myc、雌激素受体和赖氨酸甲基转移酶 2A (KMT2A) 融合等癌基因合作维持恶性程序。 KAT 蛋白靶向已显示出临床疗效；然而，实现大多数 KAT 的同系物选择性仍然是一个重大挑战。通过将基于 cereblon (CRBN) 的分子胶扩展到规范降解子空间之外，我们开发了一种 KAT2A 的精细选择性降解剂。冷冻电镜显示 CRBN 独立于降解决定子招募 KAT2A；相反，分子胶与表面暴露的酪氨酸结合，模仿抗体样分子识别。选择性 KAT2A 降解导致组蛋白 H3 赖氨酸 9 乙酰化 (H3K9Ac) 的有效消除，对急性髓性白血病细胞系具有抗增殖作用，以及在患者来源的异种移植模型中的体内功效，从而确立了 KAT2A 作为治疗多种恶性肿瘤的可靶向脆弱性。更一般地说，不依赖降解决定子的招募扩展了 CRBN 靶向蛋白质组。
